items.name: Hammer
items.description: A small, lightweight tool used in the building industry. Can also be used as a weapon.

items.name: Baseball Bat
items.description: A long, solid wooden bat. As a weapon, it can land quite a blow on your enemy.

items.name: Crowbar
items.description: Used for opening crates and large boxes. The sharp hook at one end makes this a great weapon.

items.name: Knuckle Dusters
items.description: They won't know what hit them with these strong, hard, brass knuckle dusters. They won't even see it coming!

items.name: Pen Knife
items.description: High quality knife--a great survival tool. Ideal for climbers, adventurers, military personnel, and close combat in dark alleys.

items.name: Kitchen Knife
items.description: Do your attempts to prepare food like your favourite TV chef end up more like hack and saw than slice and dice? If so, a sharp new knife could be your saviour.

items.name: Dagger
items.description: A short, sharp metal dagger useful for quick attacks. Straight in, straight out.

items.name: Axe
items.description: Used mainly for chopping tree roots and splitting kindling. Can bash and split many other substances, too.

items.name: Scimitar
items.description: The deeply-curved, high-carbon steel blade of the scimitar can terrify your opponent as you attack with a swashbuckling slash.

items.name: Chainsaw
items.description: A compact chainsaw lets you cut quickly in tight spots. Its standard diamond chain is more than a match for almost anything you might need to slice up.

items.name: Samurai Sword
items.description: A ninja-grade, full-tang samurai sword, created for us by a master artisan. The sword balances perfectly, takes and holds a razor edge, and can divide an eyelash or a full skull in one swipe.

items.name: Glock 17
items.description: The Glock 17 is a lightweight semi-automatic pistol holding up to 20 rounds in a magazine.

items.name: Raven MP25
items.description: The Raven MP25 holds 6 rounds per magazine. It can deliver powerful, quick blows to the opponent at short range.

items.name: Ruger 57
items.description: A fast firing pistol chambered for the 5.7mm cartridge, holding 20 rounds per magazine. An accurate and moderately powerful weapon.

items.name: Beretta M9
items.description: The M9 Beretta is the standard Army sidearm. Accurate and fast firing. 17 rounds per magazine.

items.name: USP
items.description: A good short range weapon that holds 15 rounds per magazine. Very accurate and has fast semi-automatic firing.

items.name: Beretta 92FS
items.description: A direct-feed, double-stacked pistol with a 20-round magazine. This model has improvements to prevent the slide flying off if it cracks.

items.name: Fiveseven
items.description: A small and light firearm that holds up to 20 rounds per magazine. Widely used by counter-terrorists all around the world.

items.name: Magnum
items.description: A very slow but powerful weapon. It holds only 6 rounds, but delivers a mighty blow to the enemy.

items.name: Desert Eagle
items.description: Fast-firing and very powerful. If you hit your opponent, he goes down and stays down. The magazine only holds eight rounds but the strength of each impact makes up for that.

items.name: Dual 92G Berettas
items.description: One of the greatest pistols in the world. And when you are packing a pair, the results are incredible: 46 powerful shots to take your opponent down. The Dual 92G Berettas are very hard to get hold of, so cost a premium. But the extra impact is worth the extra price.

items.name: Sawed-Off Shotgun
items.description: Loads and fires two cartridges at a time. If you hit your opponent, you will open up a huge hole.

items.name: Benelli M1 Tactical
items.description: Simple and sturdy. Takes seven cartridges and delivers each round with power.

items.name: MP5 Navy
items.description: Lightweight and air-cooled, one of the most widely used submachine guns in the world. 30 rounds per magazine.

items.name: P90
items.description: Effective close-range automatic weapon. 50-round magazine. Not particularly accurate, but its fast firing will cause heavy damage on anything it hits.

items.name: AK-47
items.description: Powerful, accurate and virtually unbreakable. This 30-round magazine fed rifle is a favourite among discerning hit men.

items.name: M4A1 Colt Carbine
items.description: The Colt is a powerful and accurate rifle. It's one of the best weapons around, a good choice!

items.name: Benelli M4 Super
items.description: The Auto Shotgun is the best close-range weapon around. Although you may have to reload often as it only holds 7 rounds, the amount of rounds you can pump into your enemy in just a few seconds is amazing.

items.name: M16 A2 Rifle
items.description: Much like the Colt, but more powerful and accurate. 30 rounds per magazine, with a fast-fire option.

items.name: Steyr AUG
items.description: The Steyr AUG holds 30 rounds. It can be very accurate, although its standard scope is a little weak. A great weapon for the price.

items.name: M249 SAW
items.description: The M249 Squad Automatic Weapon is a light machine-gun that combines the precision and mobility of a rifle with the relentless ferocity of rapid machine-gun fire. A favorite of the US Military, this gas-operated LMG can cut down several targets in a matter of seconds.

items.name: Leather Vest
items.description: Simple and lightweight. If you're lucky, it will protect you from a few shots.

items.name: Police Vest
items.description: Strong and durable body armor that will absorb a lot of damage to your torso.

items.name: Bulletproof Vest
items.description: Body armor that can absorb a certain amount of heavy-weapons fire, although it will not turn you into Iron Man.

items.name: Box of Chocolate Bars
items.description: A box of chocolate bars. Provides a small happiness increase when consumed.
items.effect: Increases happiness by 25 and booster cooldown by 30 minutes.

items.name: Big Box of Chocolate Bars
items.description: A very large box of chocolate bars. Provides a small happiness increase when consumed.
items.effect: Increases happiness by 35 and booster cooldown by 30 minutes.

items.name: Bag of Bon Bons
items.description: A pack of Bon Bons. Provides a small happiness increase when consumed.
items.effect: Increases happiness by 25 and booster cooldown by 30 minutes.

items.name: Box of Bon Bons
items.description: A box of four luxurious Bon Bons. Provides a small happiness increase when consumed.
items.effect: Increases happiness by 25 and booster cooldown by 30 minutes.

items.name: Box of Extra Strong Mints
items.description: Wow, whoever needs these must have very bad breath. Provides a small happiness increase when consumed.
items.effect: Increases happiness by 25 and booster cooldown by 30 minutes.

items.name: Pack of Music CDs
items.description: Some of the hottest bands around, all in one pack of CDs.

items.name: DVD Player
items.description: Sony DVD player with MP3 reading ability.

items.name: MP3 Player
items.description: Brand new MP3 player made by Sony. Comes with a 512 MEG card.
items.effect: Converts 1, 3 or 5 energy into happiness.

items.name: CD Player
items.description: This stylish home stereo system was top of the range back in 1994, with its CD player capable of reading even the most scratched up compact discs in your collection.
items.effect: Converts 1, 3 or 5 energy into happiness.

items.name: Blank DVDs : 100
items.description: This spindle pack of 100 writable DVD-R DVDs are suitable for video and data applications, and compatible with a variety of different drives.

items.name: Hard Drive
items.description: A large hard drive to extend your computer's storage capacity.

items.name: Tank Top
items.description: A stylish low cut tank top.

items.name: Trainers
items.description: A nice pair of trainers.

items.name: Jacket
items.description: A very stylish summer jacket.

items.name: Full Body Armor
items.description: Full body armor made of high-grade bulletproof material. It will absorb some of the damage from hits taken by the wearer.

items.name: Outer Tactical Vest
items.description: Despite the Combat Vest offering improved protection, its predecessor the Outer Tactical Vest is far from obsolete. The increased survivability and enhanced maneuverability provided makes it a more than worthwhile addition to your combat wardrobe.

items.name: Plain Silver Ring
items.description: A simple silver ring.
items.effect: Can be used to propose to someone with.

items.name: Sapphire Ring
items.description: A sapphire ring.
items.effect: Can be used to propose to someone with.

items.name: Gold Ring
items.description: A solid gold ring.
items.effect: Can be used to propose to someone with.

items.name: Diamond Ring
items.description: An expensive diamond ring.
items.effect: Can be used to propose to someone with.

items.name: Pearl Necklace
items.description: Matched cultured pearls in an understated but elegant setting.

items.name: Silver Necklace
items.description: A silver necklace featuring a pattern of semi-precious stones.

items.name: Gold Necklace
items.description: A mesmerizing spiral of 14-karat gold.

items.name: Plastic Watch
items.description: This watch is absolutely accurate at least twice a day.

items.name: Stainless Steel Watch
items.description: Continues working when dropped, stepped on, or hit with a rubber mallet.

items.name: Gold Watch
items.description: Elegance and luxury at sixty seconds per minute.

items.name: Personal Computer
items.description: A high-tech personal computer. Can be used to program viruses.
items.effect: Can be used to program viruses.

items.name: Microwave
items.description: A brand new microwave.

items.name: Minigun
items.description: This gun has a 200-round magazine. When you are done with a burst, your enemy will be in fragments.

items.name: Pack of Cuban Cigars
items.description: A pack of great quality, very expensive Cuban cigars.

items.name: Television
items.description: A king size Sony TV screen.
items.effect: Converts 3, 5 or 10 energy into happiness.

items.name: Morphine
items.description: Known on the street as Miss Emma, Morphine is a potent opiate painkiller whose addictive qualities are less than ladylike. With one shot, you'll be taken on a high-speed trip to your happy place, a pleasant destination where your leg is in one piece and your face is no longer mangled beyond repair.
items.effect: Reduces hospital time by 70 mins and restores 15% life. Increases medical cooldown by 20 mins.

items.name: First Aid Kit
items.description: This comprehensive collection of medical necessities contains everything you need to treat burns, blood loss, and broken bones. Whether you're bleeding out on the battlefield or you've slipped in the bath and sat on a shampoo bottle, you'll be back on your feet in moments.
items.effect: Reduces hospital time by 40 minutes and restores 10% life. Increases medical cooldown by 15 mins.

items.name: Small First Aid Kit
items.description: A small medical kit containing bandages, gauze, and antiseptic wipes. There's not enough in here to put someone's guts back in, but you'll have no problem patching up a minor flesh-wound or a nasty boo-boo on your knee.
items.effect: Reduces hospital time by 20 minutes and restores 5% life. Increases medical cooldown by 10 mins.

items.name: Simple Virus
items.description: A very simple virus that was written by an amateur.
items.effect: Used to plant a virus in Crimes 1.0.

items.name: Polymorphic Virus
items.description: Polymorphic viruses are semi-sentient: they adapt themselves with each infection. With a virus-writing toolkit you can even design new viruses.
items.effect:
Used to plant a virus in Crimes 1.0.
Used by the Hacker role during the Counter Offer scenario.

items.name: Tunneling Virus
items.description: This virus will attempt to tunnel under anti-virus monitoring programs in order to bypass their monitoring functions.
items.effect:
Used to plant a virus in Crimes 1.0.
Used by the Hacker role during the Sneaky Git Grab scenario.

items.name: Armored Virus
items.description: This virus attempts to make disassembly difficult. Great for systems with weak virus protection.
items.effect: Used to plant a virus in Crimes 1.0.

items.name: Stealth Virus
items.description: In order to avoid detection, a virus will often take over virus protection system functions likely to spot it and use them to hide itself. An extremely hard virus to write.
items.effect:
Used to plant a virus in Crimes 1.0.
Used by the Hacker role during the Stacking the Deck scenario.
Used by the Hacker role during the Manifest Cruelty scenario.

items.name: Santa Hat '04
items.description: A well crafted Santa hat made especially for the 2004 Christmas!

items.name: Christmas Cracker '04
items.description: An expensive Christmas cracker made especially for the 2004 Christmas!

items.name: Snow Cannon
items.description: A very rare special weapon, made and crafted by Santa himself!

items.name: Tabata RM2
items.description: Considered a must-have for those in Class D, the Japanese-made Tabata RM2 possesses a stunning amount of top-end speed - just make sure you leave yourself plenty of time to stop! This vehicle is a great Class D option on long tarmac tracks.

items.name: Edomondo NSX
items.description: Edomondo's NSX is often at the top of most drivers' list when they reach Class A, and is a must-have for those who consider themselves an elite racer. If you're looking to set records on a track that will test your car's handling and braking, the NSX has no equal, with this model finding its home on some of Torn's most testing tracks.

items.name: Echo Quadrato
items.description: Echo' Quadrato is a popular among both the ladies and the lads, as its streamlined exterior means it has no problem getting up to speed from a cold start. Sadly, European road laws mean this vehicle is limited when it comes to speed, hence why it tops out at a measly 155mph.

items.name: Bavaria M5
items.description: Class B racers whose budget can't stretch to a Colina Tanprice could do much worse than a Bavaria M5. The fastest 4-door saloon of its type, the M5 model has a top speed of 186mph, but it will take some time to get there due to its subpar acceleration ability.

items.name: Bavaria Z8
items.description: The Bavaria Z8's rear wheel drive means it can often struggle for grip off the line, so if you're heading to a drag race you'll probably want something a little more reactive. But if you're taking this Class C car down a few windy roads, the Z8's poise and balance make this car stable under braking, giving you a crucial speed advantage on corners.

items.name: Chevalier CZ06
items.description: Like most American cars, Chevalier's CZ06 doesn't handle particularly well. But what it lacks in maneuverability it more than makes up for with a sky-high top speed thanks to its glorious 7 liter V8 engine. The CZ06 is one of the most popular options for Class C drivers as it is the fastest in its class.

items.name: Dart Rampager
items.description: An all-American icon, the Dart Rampager is as fast as it is chaotic, with this vehicle treating corners as a suggestion rather than a guide. You'll likely abandon the Dart once you've finished your time in Class B, but you can be sure that your ride to the top is an absolute gas.

items.name: Knight Firebrand
items.description: Weak cornering caused by severe understeer means that the Knight Firebrand relies heavily on its straight line speed in order to remain competitive. In that respect, the Firebrand can tussle with the best cars Class C has to offer - just don't expect it to do well in a small, country village.

items.name: Volt GT
items.description: Volt's GT model handles like a racing car should, but is slightly let down by its acceleration, despite its low weight. Nevertheless, this model is often unbeatable down at the Docks, and comes recommended as a versatile option for drivers who are new to Class A racing.

items.name: Invader H3
items.description: This civilian version of a military favorite works fantastically on the dirt thanks to its superb braking ability, making it a fine, albeit slower Class D alternative to the Bavaria X5. You won't want to take this beast on the freeway, however, as not only is it highly unsuited to tarmac, you'll also look like a massive wally driving this through the city.

items.name: Echo S4
items.description: The Echo S4's superb braking ability allows it to really dig in on the corners, making for a great exit speed once the turbos kick in. The S4 won't win any awards for acceleration due to its limiting four wheel drive system, but it remains a staple in the garage of many great Class B drivers.

items.name: Edomondo IR
items.description: The IR model is slow for its class and suffers from braking issues, but the superior handling for which Edomondo is known makes this a decent option for those battling away in Class C. Widely regarded as one of the best front-wheel drive cars of all time, the IR is the closest you'll get to a race car from a factory model.

items.name: Edomondo ACD
items.description: Edomondos are often blessed with great handling, and the ACD is no exception thanks to its wide wheelbase and stiff suspension springs. The car's weight is its biggest downfall, however, and this drags back the ACD's top speed to make it a mid-range option among Class D cars.

items.name: Edomondo Localé
items.description: The Edomondo Localé is popular among those new to racing due to its recommendation in Baldr's racing guide. In fact, so versatile is the Localé, that some drivers have been known to take it all the way from Class E to A, a strategy that allows them to save those precious racing points for future use.

items.name: Verpestung Insecta
items.description: Described as one of the few good things to come out of WWII, the Verpestung Insecta's limited top speed may put some consumers off this cheap and cheerful vehicle. But for Class D racers, the Insecta is a versatile motor whose handling allows it to compete with faster cars on short tarmac tracks full of sharp turns.

items.name: Chevalier CVR
items.description: Like most American cars, the Chevalier CVR simply cannot take a corner, so you're limited as to what you can achieve with this vehicle. What you do get is a beast of an engine at 2,800cc, so don't be surprised if you see the CVR zipping past you midway through a Class D race, only to let you pass with ease on the inside.

items.name: Volt MNG
items.description: Volt's MNG is an iconic car for one reason and one reason alone - it is literally unstoppable. Its combination of an extreme top speed and brakes made of sponge means you're just as likely to see the back of an ambulance as you are the chequered flag when driving this thing. Baldr's guide considers the MNG to be one of the best Class B cars around, but those in the Torn City hospital refer to their drivers as organ donors.

items.name: Trident
items.description: As you might expect from a three wheeler, the Trident isn't much in terms of pace, and is actually one of the slowest cars available in Torn City. That being said, this iconic car's handling isn't too bad for an E class vehicle - just don't go heavy on the brakes into a sharp turn, or you may topple over!

items.name: Oceania SS
items.description: Pacy but poor out of the blocks is an apt description of the Oceania SS - but hey, it works for Usain Bolt! This Australian powerhouse comes recommended for class C tarmac races, but if you're approaching a corner you'd be advised to check your rear-view mirror, because nine times out of ten there will be someone on your shoulder.

items.name: Coat Hanger
items.description: A metal coat hanger, often used for picking the locks of cars.
items.effect: Required for stealing locked cars.

items.name: Bunch of Flowers
items.description: A bunch of flowers, a perfect gift!

items.name: Neutrilux 2000
items.description: Very rare: a Leprechaun's most powerful weapon, created out of green nuclear energy. Or at least, that's how the legend goes.

items.name: Springfield 1911
items.description: Steel and light weight aluminium frames, stainless, blued and parkerized finishes, V-12 barrel porting... What more could you want?

items.name: Egg Propelled Launcher
items.description: Very rare: the Easter Bunny's most powerful weapon, created out of jelly bean and chocolate egg technology.

items.name: Bunny Suit
items.description: Very rare, and created out of the strongest fur yet discovered, this serves as the Easter Bunny's most stylish and most protective armor.

items.name: Chocolate Egg '05
items.description: Every person's favourite treat, made for the 2005 Easter celebration!

items.name: Firewalk Virus
items.description: This type of virus is unknown.
items.effect: Used by the Hacker role during the Blast from the Past scenario.

items.name: Game Console
items.description: This Game Console is a generic gaming device exclusive to Torn City, and was made from parts cannibalized from an Xbox, PlayStation, and a Sega Saturn. Game Consoles are unique in that they actually bring people happiness when they put effort into them, unlike careers, relationships, or children.
items.effect: Converts 1, 3 or 5 energy into happiness.

items.name: Xbox
items.description: A games console used for playing games.
items.effect: Converts 5 energy into 8-15 happiness.

items.name: Parachute
items.description: A collapsible device used to retard the descent of a falling body.
items.effect: Permanently increases Dexterity by 1%. Increases booster cooldown by 6 hours.

items.name: Trench Coat
items.description: A thick trench coat that covers most of the body.

items.name: 9mm Uzi
items.description: This Uzi is a compact, boxy, light-weight sub machine gun used throughout the world as a police and special forces firearm.

items.name: RPG Launcher
items.description: The anti-tank RPG launcher is one of the most common and most effective infantry weapons in contemporary conflicts.

items.name: Leather Bullwhip
items.description: A whip made of rawhide. In the right hands, it can be a stealthy and deadly weapon. In the wrong hands...you may lose an eye!

items.name: Ninja Claws
items.description: Traditional ninja weapon for close combat, with four needle-sharp spikes.

items.name: Test Trophy
items.description: Test!

items.name: Pet Rock
items.description: One of the rarest items in Torn, first discovered by Matt. Warning: this pet is extremely dangerous! Only the very brave or the very stupid should take it on. Matt takes no responsibility for the loss of life or fingertips caused by this pet.

items.name: Non-Anon Doll
items.description: The perfect gift for when you want to add insult to injury. Patented by Someone...

items.name: Poker Doll
items.description: Feisty red haired doll made in the image of Peachy complete with bellybutton poking action!

items.name: Yoda Figurine
items.description: Have a doll like Yoda You must.

items.name: Trojan Horse
items.description: This sweet gift from Tebbs seems innocently useful. Inside, it is highly infectious!

items.name: Doll's Head
items.description: A doll's head owned by the Evil Female Admin known as Wynn. Believed to be responsible for lost stats, site lag, mass kicks on IRC, and random deletions.

items.name: Rubber Ducky of Doom
items.description: Most powerful weapon in the game can only be used by those with the knowledge to unleash its fearsome Duck Powers. Most often used after being asked the same n00b question for the 5th time in a row. Has also been seen dive bombing random people in IRC.

items.name: Teppic Bear
items.description: Only known of by a very select few, this Teddy Bear stands as proof that even the toughest of players, such as Teppic, do indeed have a softer side.

items.name: RockerHead Doll
items.description: It has no uses and does nothing just like the staff member it resembles.

items.name: Mouser Doll
items.description: Similar to the one used by Mouser to relieve the stress of dealing with uncooperative staff, annoying n00bs, and day to day business of being a Coder in Torn City.

items.name: Elite Action Man
items.description: Mimics the actions of the real man. Has been known to abuse Caps Lock Abusers.

items.name: Toy Reactor
items.description: Miniature model of a Nuclear Reactor similar to the one that Sec. Les_Claypool will be working on when he leaves for the Navy.

items.name: Royal Doll
items.description: This doll will give its user the feeling of being royalty just like KingAce while in possession. Player will receive special treatment from friends and rivals while carrying this special item!

items.name: Blue Dragon
items.description: A blue dragon spawned from the evil TC admin named blue comes packed with evil intentions and wild powers.. Some say rubbing the dragons head makes one 100 times stronger than any normal man!

items.name: China Tea Set
items.description: Be just like Chedburn, sit in the garden and sip tea with this China Tea Set.

items.name: Mufasa Toy
items.description: Replica of a plush toy owned by Randi it looks just like the majestic lion Mufasa... before he was trampled of course.

items.name: Dozen Roses
items.description: A dozen roses. This bouquet is available in assorted colors, from red for that special someone to black to send to your enemy after you hospitalize him or her.

items.name: Skanky Doll
items.description: Just like the one owned by Infrit, this doll comes with blood red lipstick, a mini skirt, and a corset.

items.name: Lego Hurin
items.description: This life like model is comprised completely of legos. Comes with upgrades such as the multi hunting goggles and evilarium connects to the brain. Read instructions for more details. Not intended for use by children age 6 and under.

items.name: Mystical Sphere
items.description: A rare object created by Phyrax when he was a helper... Only possessed by a select few in all of Torn City. Every now and then lights and mist shoot out of the sphere and at this time the holder may obtain all knowledge and wisdom.

items.name: 10 Ton Pacifier
items.description: Used for that special baby out there.. the one you would like to crush because you just cant get them to stop crying. Drive this pacifier in their mouth and you will get dead silence. Created by Rock for all the babies out there.

items.name: Horse Toy
items.description: First seen by those who crossed the Godfather, this strange object greatly increases your desire to annoy people in the chat rooms, while simultaneously draining away all your religious beliefs.

items.name: Uriel's Speakers
items.description: These tripped out speakers will blow you away with thundering bass and a beat that won't quit. Putting out 5000W with a crushing 600 decibels.

items.name: Strife Clown
items.description: This Ominous Clown is full of discord. This rare item channels all the pain and torture this world has to offer.

items.name: Locked Teddy
items.description: This bear is covered in chains connected with padlocks. He has been seen locking forum topics around Torn City, but has yet to have any of his locks picked.

items.name: Riddle's Bat
items.description: This baseball bat belongs to Riddle. All know it and most fear it. It causes panic in the IRC realm. Random kicks occur when he is in a bad mood or when mass slapping occurs. Don't mess with the bat!

items.name: Soup Nazi Doll
items.description: Often seen running loose on IRC, usually before kicking rule breakers with the message No Soup For You!! Believed to have been released by Lestat.

items.name: Pouncer Doll
items.description: Be careful of Pouncer. She might pounce on you unexpectedly, or hit you with a pillow or ducks, just like her creator SexySassy.

items.name: Spammer Doll
items.description: A very friendly doll with good interactions, until you make it mad. It can hit back pretty hard, and it will start spamming you, even when you think it should be sleeping, just like Templar.

items.name: Cookie Jar
items.description: Cookie Jar - Just like the one Is0lati0n has at home, this jar is stocked full of chocolate cookies for late nights working in the IRC channel.

items.name: Vanity Mirror
items.description: Complete with 24 carat gold rim and handle with YT's initials engraved on it.

items.name: Banana Phone
items.description: Bright yellow, shaped like a banana, and plays Titan's favourite song when it rings. Known to annoy other staff members... may be part of the reason he loves it.

items.name: Xbox 360
items.description: A games console used for playing games.
items.effect: Converts 5 energy into 8-15 happiness.

items.name: Yasukuni Sword
items.description: A rare Japanese blade of exceptional quality and craftsmanship.

items.name: Rusty Sword
items.description: An old rusty sword.

items.name: Dance Toy
items.description: Although its name refers to Syrup it's nothing near slow. Just press the button on the back and watch this crazy toy dance himself to death!

items.name: Lucky Dime
items.description: Found deep within a lost cavern in Torn City was a rare bag of dimes that were stolen during the first bank robbery in Torn City. They were thought to have been lost forever, but a few have survived and are said to bring luck to those who play roulette in the Casino.

items.name: Crystal Carousel
items.description: Created by w1ld_h0rs3s this replica Carousel shows her favourite horses running wild and free.

items.name: Pixie Sticks
items.description: Small plastic tubes filled with flavoured sugar. Available in orange, raspberry, grape and strawberry. Provides a large happiness increase when consumed.
items.effect: Increases happiness by 150 and booster cooldown by 30 minutes.

items.name: Ice Sculpture
items.description: Some believe that the reclusive artist who carved these sculptures meant them to depict friendliness and good will. However, some who gaze on these rare pieces feel an icy coldness and a sinking detachment from the world. Only the artist knows his true intent.

items.name: Case of Whiskey
items.description: Recovered during a raid at his Mansion this is the last case of Whiskey that mdshare produced before being captured by Torn City Police for violation of the alcohol ordinance.

items.name: Laptop
items.description: A high-tech wireless laptop. You can use it on your long travels to check your mail and see how things are going at home.
items.effect: Can be used to access additional services while traveling and program viruses.

items.name: Purple Frog
items.description: A very rare species of frog that lives in Torn City. Sometimes seen on IRC hopping into people's pockets. Usually friendly, but can become extremely violent if provoked.

items.name: Hooorang's Key
items.description: Hooorang's skeleton key lets you bypass any locked doors and open lockers and safes. Nothing can stop its holder. Holding this item makes you feel invincible.

items.name: Patriot Whip
items.description: UTBracket's own design, comes in either Union Jack or St. George style. Don't mess with the owner of this collectible or expect to have your day ruined by some painful marks on your butt and the ability to sit down removed!!

items.name: Statue Of Aeolus
items.description: Aeolus Keeper of The Wind possess the power to control the strength and direction of the wind. A Greek Mystical Artifact with powers believed to be related to the wind.

items.name: Bolt Cutters
items.description: A pair of quality bolt cutters. Made of tempered steel with cushion-grip handles and durable, heat-treated jaws.
items.effect: Required by the Car Thief role during the No Reserve scenario.

items.name: Photographs
items.description: Four photographs of a man handing over a briefcase.

items.name: Black Unicorn
items.description: A friend for life and a ferocious fighter feared by all foes.

items.name: WarPaint Kit
items.description: The perfect accessory when going off to war. Fashioned after Scarlet's own personal kit, containing facial paints made of wolf's blood. Once applied, the user is said to gain the prowess of the wolf.

items.name: Official Ninja Kit
items.description: The Official Hiro Ninja Kit is a custom fit accessory set for any wannabe ninja. Contains: ninja suit for those stealthy attacks, grappling hook for those difficult larcenies, ninja guide book as penned by Hiro himself. Warning - not for novices.

items.name: Leukaemia Teddy Bear
items.description: Soft and fluffy, it likes to be cuddled and can comfort you on those lonely nights. But beware: mistreatment of your Leukaemia Teddy Bear will result in a mighty slap from its paws of steel.

items.name: Chocobo Flute
items.description: Long thought to be lost forever this small item was found in the far reaches of Torn City by CloudFFVII. Many believe peace of mind and swiftness in battle are brought to the holder of this charm.

items.name: Annoying Man
items.description: This little annoying man can be seen on IRC and on MSN annoying people and getting into trouble just like Manjot.

items.name: Article on Crime
items.description: An article written by the reporter George on specific criminals.

items.name: Unknown
items.description: This item does not exist.

items.name: Barbie Doll
items.description: Equipped with Kung Fu Grip, and hot pink nail polish, this doll resembles the Admin Clansdancer.

items.name: Wand of Destruction
items.description: A very rare special weapon, this wand was created by The Great Pumpkin himself to wreak havoc on Torn City.

items.name: Jack-O-Lantern '05
items.description: Given out by The Great Pumpkin, to good boys and girls all across Torn City.

items.name: Gasoline
items.description: Capable of storing five gallons of pure liquid warehouse repellent, this rusty red can makes it easy to transport gasoline across the city to your destination of choice. It burns hotter and spreads faster than other liquids, but it stinks to high heaven and leaves its fingerprints everywhere. If you're an arsonist, that destination could be a church, a brothel, or something weird like a yurt. If you're Toxic Terry, that gas is going on a straight shot to your digestive tract.
items.effect:
Dangerously fuels a fire with high suspicion in Arson.
Used during the burning method in Disposal.
Used by the Arsonist role during the Market Forces scenario.

items.name: Butterfly Knife
items.description: A small knife, deadly in the right hands. The handles fold up to conceal the blade of this dangerous weapon.

items.name: XM8 Rifle
items.description: Lightweight assault rifle, deadly when fired up close. Can break through the toughest armor.

items.name: Taser
items.description: An electroshock gun, non lethal, but will land your opponent in the hospital for a while just as quickly as a more aggressive weapon will.
items.effect: Opponent becomes Shocked, causing them to miss the next turn.

items.name: Chain Mail
items.description: Chain Mail consists of a series of individual metal rings linked together to form a mesh, resulting in a flexible yet resilient barrier capable of protecting the wearer during hand-to-hand combat. This form of armor was most commonly used by European warriors between 300 BC - 1600 AD, but today is mostly worn by overweight war reenactors who like to play dress-up on the weekends.

items.name: Cobra Derringer
items.description: A small, lightweight pistol. For some people two bullets are all you need.

items.name: Flak Jacket
items.description: Marine issued armor. Sturdy and effective against most small caliber rounds.

items.name: Birthday Cake '05
items.description: A slice of cake left over from Torn's first birthday.

items.name: Bottle of Beer
items.description: Immortalised by the Reel Big Fish song of the same name, Beer is the most popular alcoholic drink in the world, beating fancy-pants wine into second place. The earliest evidence for the brewing of beer dates back 13,000 years, though given mankind's vigorous consumption of the beverage, it could be much older and we've just forgotten.
items.effect: Increases nerve by 1 and booster cooldown by 1 hour.

items.name: Bottle of Champagne
items.description: A sparkling wine associated with royalty, celebration, and the launching of ships, Champagne may only be legally named as such if it originates from the Champagne wine region of France. However, this law only applies in parts of the world with nothing better to care about, hence why there are no repercussions for pretending that this generic bottle of fizzy plonk contains genuine champers.
items.effect: Increases nerve by 1 and booster cooldown by 1 hour.

items.name: Soap on a Rope
items.description: Necessity for the often-jailed felon.

items.name: Single Red Rose
items.description: For when words alone just aren't enough to say how you feel.

items.name: Bunch of Black Roses
items.description: Not sure your opponent got the meaning of that 4 hour hospital stay? Make SURE you get your point across with this bouquet of black roses.

items.name: Bunch of Balloons '05
items.description: Large bunch of brightly coloured balloons left over from the First Birthday of Torn City. How they stay inflated after the party's over, no one will ever figure out.

items.name: Sheep Plushie
items.description: Baaaaaa.

items.name: Teddy Bear Plushie
items.description: Soft plush teddy bear for your special someone to cuddle up with when you're not around.

items.name: Cracked Crystal Ball
items.description: A small glass globe with several deep cracks running through it. How can this be of any use?

items.name: S&W Revolver
items.description: Smith and Wesson revolver, commonly used in the game of Russian Roulette.

items.name: C4 Explosive
items.description: A C4 high-explosive device.
items.effect:
Used by the Bomber roles during the Bidding War scenario.
Used by the Bomber role during the Gone Fission scenario.

items.name: Memory Locket
items.description: It has a picture of a happy family inside it.

items.name: Rainbow Stud Earring
items.description: This earring is a symbol of Pride and Love.

items.name: Hamster Toy
items.description: Small plush hamster in a plastic ball. Replica of the one that powers parts of the TC Database and cause for most of the lag when he takes a weekend off. Known to annoy kittens and ducks alike he seems to like only one rather isolated admin.

items.name: Snowflake '05
items.description: A small crystal snowflake made especially for the 2005 Xmas season.

items.name: Christmas Tree '05
items.description: A fully decorated Christmas tree, perfect for decorating your home for the 2005 Christmas season.

items.name: Cannabis
items.description: This ain't your garden variety bud, no sir. Torn's Cannabis is so strong it'll melt the anxiety from your bones and dribble it out your ass. After a couple of puffs, you'll feel a special kind of relaxed that rids you of all fear, rendering you capable of some seriously heinous acts. Burgle a home? Why not. Pickpocket an old lady? Sounds fun! Dismember and dispose of a corpse you say? That's just a walk in the park, quite literally.
items.effect: Increases nerve by 8-12. Includes side effects.

items.name: Ecstasy
items.description: Hello, boys and girls. This is your old pal stinky wizzleteats. This is a song about a whale. No, this is a song about being happy. That's right, it's the happy, happy, joy, joy, song. Happy, happy, joy, joy. Happy, happy, joy, joy. Happy, happy, joy, joy. Happy, happy, joy, joy. Happy, happy, joy, joy. Happy, happy, joy, joy. Happy, happy, joy, joy, joy.
items.effect: Doubles happiness.

items.name: Ketamine
items.description: Originally deployed as a surgical anaesthetic during the Vietnam War, Ketamine is also popular among recreational drug users due to its capacity to induce dissociative sensations and hallucinations. However, in Torn City, you'll find its users in the foxhole rather than a k-hole, with ket used to numb the body against incoming attacks. Because everyone knows that if you can't feel it, it didn't happen!
items.effect: Temporarily increases Defense by 50%. Includes side effects.

items.name: LSD
items.description: Wanna get mad stupid? Drop a tab of acid and let fate control your body as your mind takes a trip to dreamland. While your consciousness is pre-occupied with the effects of this potent psychedelic, your physical form will be hit by a maelstrom of effects, rendering you strong yet slow, braced and bumbling. And once the surge of pleasure and enthusiasm has washed away, you may find yourself standing over what's left of your opponent's pulped human face.
items.effect: Increases energy by 50, nerve by 5, and happiness by 200-500. Includes side effects.

items.name: Opium
items.description: Prescribed for a range of ailments from diarrhea and psychosis through to menstrual pain and bronchitis, Opium is a reliable reliever of pain, consequence, and reality. Fortified by this timeless drug, your opponent's blows will feel naught more than tiny mouse breaths upon your body. And should you still find yourself laid up in the hospital, this medical marvel will see you right as rain in no time.
items.effect: Removes all hospital time and replenishes life to 50%. Temporarily increases Defense by 30%.

items.name: PCP
items.description: If you've ever been beaten to a pulp by a wide-eyed, grinning maniac, chances are they were hepped up on angel dust. PCP can turn even the most serene wallflower into a psychotic force of nature, imbibing users with the strength of an ox and the dexterity of an ox's effeminate young cousin who left his mining town to join the ballet. Essentially, this drug gives you all the physical benefits of being severely mentally challenged but without the obvious downsides.
items.effect:
Temporarily increases Strength and Dexterity by 20%. Increases happiness by 250.
Used by the Imitator role during the Snow Blind scenario.

items.name: Mr Torn Crown '07
items.description: Awarded to GZUS [18690] for winning the Mr Torn City awards 2007!

items.name: Shrooms
items.description: Have you ever found a blank sheet of paper absolutely fascinating? You soon will with a little help from a dose of Shrooms. These fantasy-inducing fungi tap into the brain's serotonin receptors to flood your gray matter with happy chemicals, transforming the mundane into magical in mere moments. Many people report feeling a little tired after taking psilocybin mushrooms, but don't worry, because the tap-dancing gorilla at the end of your bed will cuddle you to sleep.
items.effect: Increases happiness by 500 and reduces energy by 25. Includes side effects.

items.name: Speed
items.description: Speed does exactly what it says on the tin, making your hands move so fast your opponent will think they're having a stroke. But don't get too cocky, because while you're busy trying to land a hit, your clouded mind leaves you open to a counterattack. Sacrificing dexterity for velocity, you'll be equal parts swift and vulnerable, like a premature baby on rocket skates.
items.effect: Temporarily increases Speed by 20%. Increases happiness by 50. Includes side effects.

items.name: Vicodin
items.description: Vicodin is a powerful pain medication which is frequently abused by those looking to gain an edge in battle. The drug's ability to inhibit the body's pain perception allows users to perform physical feats at a higher level than before, while also making them a wee bit giddy. However, while Vicodin's effect on your strength, speed, defense, and dexterity is temporary, its damage to your liver is anything but.
items.effect: Temporarily increases all battle stats by 25%. Increases happiness by 75.

items.name: Xanax
items.description: Xanax in Torn City is very different to your typical pharmacy-bought Alprazolam, with its sedative effects giving way to an explosion of relentless energy. Researchers speculate that this phenomenon is rooted in the drug's ability to boost adenosine triphosphate production within neural cells, supercharging the brain into an overclocked state capable of firing neurons like a machine-gun. However it works, Torn Xanax is the grease that oils the gears of war, elevating a soldier to a state of aggressive frenzy that would make a Nazi Stormtrooper look like a slowpoke sissy.
items.effect: Increases energy by 250 and happiness by 75. Includes side effects.

items.name: Ms Torn Crown '07
items.description: Awarded to Vixen_ [140202] for winning the Miss Torn City awards 2007!

items.name: Unknown
items.description: This item does not exist.

items.name: Box of Sweet Hearts
items.description: Fun filled heart shaped candies with messages for your loved ones. Provides a small happiness increase when consumed.
items.effect: Increases happiness by 25 and booster cooldown by 30 minutes.

items.name: Bag of Chocolate Kisses
items.description: Sweet candy kiss for the one you love. Provides a small happiness increase when consumed.
items.effect: Increases happiness by 25 and booster cooldown by 30 minutes.

items.name: Crazy Cow
items.description: This is the most Famous Cow of Torn City protector of innocent pets, punisher of the scammer but watch out! Get to close to him and BOOM You have Mad Cow Disease.

items.name: Legend's Urn
items.description: This item is a urn holding all of the ashes of fallen legends killed by the Legend Killer himself.

items.name: Dreamcatcher
items.description: DL's dream catcher. Hung above a bed or in a window, catches bad dreams while good dreams slip on by.

items.name: Brutus Keychain
items.description: This key chain stands as proof the bearer has survived a brush with the mammoth known as Brutus.

items.name: Kitten Plushie
items.description: A small plush kitten. Rumour has it, if you pet its nose it will purr, but is more often heard saying Rawr!

items.name: Single White Rose
items.description: Found only near Valentine's Day in Torn City, this rose would be the perfect gift for your loved one on that special day.

items.name: Claymore Sword
items.description: The claymore is the mother of all broadswords. It's a huge, two-handed thing, approx 4ft long. Do you have the strength to wield this monster?

items.name: Crossbow
items.description: A crossbow has more impact damage than a normal bow and is capable of easily piercing metal.

items.name: Enfield SA-80
items.description: Gas-powered Enfield SA80 rifles have been the weapon of choice for the British Armed Forces since the 1980's. This edition comes with iron sights as standard, but various telescopic sights can be added to increase its aiming accuracy.

items.name: Grenade
items.description: A small fragmentation grenade. Pull the pin, count to three, then throw it at your enemy.

items.name: Stick Grenade
items.description: Stick grenades are less powerful and have shorter fuses than their British counterparts, but weigh significantly less.

items.name: Flash Grenade
items.description: Often used to blind opponents, can give an edge in battle that is very hard to overcome.
items.effect:
Opponent becomes Blinded, decreasing Speed to 1/5th for 15-20 seconds.
Used by the Robber role during the Bidding War scenario.

items.name: Jackhammer
items.description: A gas operated, fully automatic only shotgun. Able to fire 240 rounds per minute, this is not your average shotgun.

items.name: Swiss Army Knife
items.description: Elegant and light weight pocket knife, with several useful tools integrated.

items.name: Mag 7
items.description: Shotgun intended specially for close combat and operations in confined spaces, like the room-to-room searches.

items.name: Smoke Grenade
items.description: Typically used to send signals or create a smokescreen, this grenade can be used to temporarily blind your opponent, to allow you the upper hand in attacking.
items.effect:
Opponent becomes Smoked, decreasing Speed to 1/3rd for 120-180 seconds.
Used by the Driver role during the Stacking the Deck scenario.

items.name: Spear
items.description: A spear is an ancient weapon used for hunting and war, consisting of a shaft, usually of wood, with a sharpened head.

items.name: Vektor CR-21
items.description: Its futuristic looks are the result of the fact that the entire stock is made of a high-impact polymer. The only metal to be seen on the outside is part of the barrel and the flash-suppressor.

items.name: Claymore Mine
items.description: The mine contains 700 steel spheres (10.5 grains) and 1-1/2 pound layer of composition C-4 explosive and is initiated by an electric blasting cap.

items.name: Flare Gun
items.description: Can work as a weapon in a pinch, but only as a last resort.  Works best as a device to create light in some of the darker missions.

items.name: Heckler & Koch SL8
items.description: H&K SL8 is a lightweight semi automatic gas powered rifle. With a unique stock design this dependable weapon is widely sought after.

items.name: SIG 550
items.description: The SIG 550 is a custom assault rifle. With a 20 round magazine this weapon can switch between semi automatic and full automatic firing with a flip of a switch.

items.name: BT MP9
items.description: Offers a lower and more controllable rate of fire compared to other handguns, is also small enough to be effectively fired with one hand.

items.name: Chain Whip
items.description: Oriental version of the flail. Consists of 4 to 6 iron bars linked end to end by short lengths of chain.

items.name: Wooden Nunchaku
items.description: Consists of two wooden bars linked by a short length of chain.

items.name: Kama
items.description: A simple but very sharp and potentially deadly weapon like a small sickle, a favourite of ninjas.

items.name: Kodachi
items.description: This 2-foot blade is considered too short to be classified as a sword, and yet at the same time it is too long to be a dagger. Consisting of a curved, single-edged blade, the Kodachi was wielded by Samurai during Japan's feudal period, and it may also have been used by civilians, who were not permitted to own longer swords such as those used by warriors and officials.

items.name: Sai
items.description: The sai's distinctive shape makes it a versatile weapon. With skill, it can be used effectively against a long sword  by trapping the sword's blade between the sai's blade and the tsuba and breaking it with a twist of the hand.

items.name: Ninja Star
items.description: A lethal throwing weapon that can pierce an opponent's body before they realize an attack is under way. Conceal them, and then throw them underhand at an enemy when they least expect it.

items.name: Type 98 Anti Tank
items.description: Developed by the Chinese in the late ’90s, the Type 98 Anti-Tank is capable of firing unguided, high-explosive 120mm projectiles over a distance of nearly 2km. The weapon can be fired from the shoulder with minimal recoil and has been nicknamed the “Queen Bee” by its proponents.

items.name: Bushmaster Carbon 15
items.description: This top of the line assault weapon weighs less than three and a half pounds. A very effective weapon, regardless of the user's stats.

items.name: HEG
items.description: A high-explosive grenade used to cause casualties up to a maximum of 190 meters from the point of burst.

items.name: Taurus
items.description: This firearm has been engineered for reliability, accuracy and durability. One of the best low priced weapons you can buy.

items.name: Blowgun
items.description: Most often used with poison darts, can be quite effective if you don't wish your target to know they are under attack until it's far too late.

items.name: Bo Staff
items.description: A long stick carried in the hand. Can't take too much chopping, but its smooth reversal ability makes it a fluid and versatile weapon when used with skill.

items.name: Fireworks
items.description: A fascinating mix of charcoal, sulphur and saltpetre compressed into a bamboo tube.  Traditionally fireworks are the sign of getting rid of the old and welcoming the new. When this is ignited and thrown at an opponent they will get a nasty surprise!

items.name: Katana
items.description: Curved, single-edged sword, or dao, traditionally used by the Japanese samurai. In well trained hands, a deadly weapon.

items.name: Qsz-92
items.description: Most recent development of the Chinese state arms factories. Dual stack magazine holds 15 rounds. Front part of the frame under the barrel is shaped as an accessory rail to accept laser sights or flash lights.

items.name: SKS Carbine
items.description: This gun, with the proper cartridges, will serve for deer hunting, pest and predator control, and emergency self defense.

items.name: Twin Tiger Hooks
items.description: This versatile and lethal weapon combines the abilities of a sword, cane and dagger. Perfect for trapping, blocking and slashing.

items.name: Wushu Double Axes
items.description: This is a pair of lethal axes first forged by the legendary Wushu Warrior Li Kwei. Designed to launch a flurry attack at the enemy, hacking and slashing them to pieces.

items.name: Ithaca 37
items.description: One of the oldest pump action shotguns still in production, this is a favourite of several generations.

items.name: Lorcin 380
items.description: This is the handgun most frequently submitted by law enforcement agencies for tracing in connection to violent crimes. Very low quality, so very much a "use and discard" weapon for short-range attacks.

items.name: S&W M29
items.description: A six shot double action revolver chambered for the .44 Magnum cartridge. It will also chamber and fire .44 Special cartridges.

items.name: Flamethrower
items.description: Built like a backpack, with dual tanks to hold the highly flammable gas. Be careful though, a well placed bullet could be the end of this powerful weapon.. and the person carrying it.
items.effect: Dangerously and unpredictably ignites a fire with high spread, visibility, and suspicion in Arson.

items.name: Tear Gas
items.description: Typically used for riot control, this non-lethal gas will temporarily blind your opponent, possibly giving you a bit of an advantage in battle.
items.effect:
Opponent becomes Gassed, decreasing Dexterity to 1/3rd for 120-180 seconds.
Used by the Muscle role during the Crane Reaction scenario.

items.name: Throwing Knife
items.description: To make the best use of this weapon, skill and practice are needed, but in the right hands, this could be used for a devastating attack.

items.name: Jaguar Plushie
items.description: Modelled after the third largest cat in the world, this small spotted plushie could be easily confused for a leopard.

items.name: Mayan Statue
items.description: Small, dark jade statue of the Mayan God Quetzalcoatl. Quetzalcoatl is the god of human sustenance, penitence, self-sacrifice, re-birth and butterflies.

items.name: Dahlia
items.description: Spectacular pink bloom with pointed petals, this is the national flower of Mexico.

items.name: Wolverine Plushie
items.description: The wolverine has been described as the fiercest creature on earth, but this small plush version will only growl if you pull its tail.

items.name: Hockey Stick
items.description: Replica of the sticks used in the 1920 Olympics, the first year Hockey was recognized as an official Olympic sport. The Winnipeg Falcons had the honour of taking the Gold medal home to Canada.

items.name: Crocus
items.description: This bright blue flower is often considered the national flower of Canada.

items.name: Orchid
items.description: Delicate pink flower, the orchid may not be a native of Hawaii, but it has made the transition to this tropical climate with ease.

items.name: Pele Charm
items.description: This Pele Charm is a miniature testament to the goddess's power and grandeur. Crafted from lustrous gold, this small talisman captures the fiery spirit of Pele, Hawaiian Goddess of Fire and Volcanoes. Its intricate detailing and radiant shine serve as a constant reminder of Pele's passionate nature and formidable strength. A possession as enchanting as it is empowering, the charm invites the wielder to embrace their own inner fervor and resilience.

items.name: Nessie Plushie
items.description: Hidden in the depths of the Loch. Seeing this mythical creature will leave a lasting impression.

items.name: Heather
items.description: Believed to bring good luck to who possess it. These spiky purple and white flowers cover the hillsides of Scotland.

items.name: Red Fox Plushie
items.description: Small dark red fox plushie, will serve as a memento from your trip to Britain, and your participation in a local Fox Hunt.

items.name: Monkey Plushie
items.description: Small plush monkey, made in the image of the simians, often seen around the forests of Argentina.

items.name: Soccer Ball
items.description:
Named the Telstar, this iconic football was the official inflatable orb of the 1970 World Cup in Mexico. Consisting of 12 black pentagons and 20 white hexagons, the Telstar was designed to be more visible during black and white television broadcasts, even though hot pink and glitter would've stood out more.

Nobody is quite sure why this football is so popular in Argentina, especially as 1970 was the only year they failed to qualify for the World Cup. One theory posits that the ball is often deflated and used as a makeshift toilet to disrespect the tournament's eventual winner and Argentina's hated neighbour, Brazil.

items.name: Ceibo Flower
items.description: This unusual red flower is the national flower of Argentina.

items.name: Edelweiss
items.description: Small white blooms are the hallmark of this Swiss national flower.

items.name: Chamois Plushie
items.description: Small plushie of a Mountain Goat.

items.name: Panda Plushie
items.description: One of the most recognizable endangered species, Xiong Mao, as they are called in Chinese, instantly bring to mind bamboo forests and quiet contemplation.

items.name: Jade Buddha
items.description: In a controversy the instant we feel anger we have already ceased striving for the truth, and have begun striving for ourselves. - Buddha

items.name: Peony
items.description: While China has no official national flower, the peony, with its ruffled, pale pink blooms, is widely recognized as the national favourite.

items.name: Cherry Blossom
items.description: This beautiful pink blossom is often considered the official flower of Japan.

items.name: Kabuki Mask
items.description: Used in traditional Japanese theater productions, this beautiful mask can serve as a reminder of your recent trip to Tokyo.

items.name: Maneki Neko
items.description: Meant to bring good fortune and prosperity to its owner, this little cat is more than just a good luck charm.

items.name: Elephant Statue
items.description: This ancient ivory statue is made from the tusks of the very animal it represents,and harvesting the tusks for such artworks is ironically bringing the elephant to the brink of extinction.

items.name: Lion Plushie
items.description: This small plushie is modelled after the African lion. Squeeze his tummy to hear him roar.

items.name: African Violet
items.description: While not the national flower for Africa, this beautiful purple plant will remind you of your recent trip to the Southern African plains.

items.name: Donator Pack
items.description: A Torn City donator pack. Using this will credit you with 31 donator days and give you 60 points!
items.effect: Provides 31 days of donator status and 60 points upon opening.

items.name: Bronze Paint Brush
items.description: This item was given for third place in  one of the many art competitions held by Torn City Staff.

items.name: Silver Paint Brush
items.description: This item was given for second place in  one of the many art competitions held by Torn City Staff.

items.name: Gold Paint Brush
items.description: This item was given for first place in  one of the many art competitions held by Torn City Staff.

items.name: Pand0ra's Box
items.description: After being hidden for years this ancient relic has resurfaced. Mysterious wonders or tragic events await the owner. Open the box if you dare--but following your curiosity may take you down unexpected paths.

items.name: Mr Brownstone Doll
items.description: This rocked out doll will get up around seven Get outta bed around nine And dont worry about nothing 'cause worryin is a waste of ...time.

items.name: Dual Axes
items.description: Only a well trained individual would even dare to attempt to dual wield these weapons.

items.name: Dual Hammers
items.description: Only a well trained individual, ideally with some experience in carpentry, would even dare to attempt to dual wield these weapons.

items.name: Dual Scimitars
items.description: Only a well trained individual would even dare to attempt to dual wield these weapons, and even then only after several puffs on a hookah.

items.name: Dual Samurai Swords
items.description: Only a well trained individual, wearing a classy kimono, would even dare to attempt to dual wield these weapons.

items.name: Japanese/English Dictionary
items.description: This Dictionary can aid you in translating words and symbols from Japanese to English or vice-versa.

items.name: Bottle of Sake
items.description: Sake, an alcoholic beverage of Japanese origin, is created through the fermentation and brewing of rice. In its homeland, the consumption of sake involves a ritual process where the drink is warmed in a small bottle before being served in an even smaller porcelain cup. Such customs are rarely practiced in Torn, where sake is most commonly served from a tramp's shoe and drunk in a bathroom stall prior to a crime spree.
items.effect: Increases nerve by 1 and booster cooldown by 1 hour.

items.name: Oriental Log
items.description: This piece of Japanese oak looks ancient. It has Japanese symbols carved all over it. Strangely, written in English on the bottom of the log there is the name 'Master Keneshi'.

items.name: Oriental Log Translation
items.description: On a piece of paper is written: He who chooses to undertake the mastery of dual weaponry need only speak my name.

items.name: YouYou Yo Yo
items.description: You can walk the dog, rock the cradle but be careful, this YouYou YoYo could turn you into meme!

items.name: Monkey Cuffs
items.description: These shiny steel manacles are used by MoNKeY to capture and restrain the bad guys of Torn City. Some lucky ladies hint they have a more naughty purpose!

items.name: Jester's Cap
items.description: A constant reminder that you should never take things too seriously. Wearing this cap will allow you to act a fool and be praised for it.

items.name: Gibal's Dragonfly
items.description: Gibal rides around Torn City on her dragonfly looking for wrong-doers. Once caught they are locked up for good!

items.name: Green Ornament
items.description: This ornament was given to Officers of Torn City for Xmas in recognition of a job well done for their time served as staff.

items.name: Purple Ornament
items.description: This ornament was given to Helpers of Torn City for Xmas in recognition of a job well done for their time served as staff.

items.name: Blue Ornament
items.description: This ornament was given to Mods of Torn City for Xmas in recognition of a job well done for their time served as staff.

items.name: Purple Bell
items.description: This ornament was given to Admins of Torn City for Xmas in recognition of a job well done for their time served as staff.

items.name: Mistletoe
items.description: A kiss under the mistletoe is said to bring good luck for the year ahead. Why not share this tradition with someone special this year?

items.name: Mini Sleigh
items.description: A miniature replica of the very same one Santa uses when delivering presents to the good boys and girls of Torn City.

items.name: Snowman
items.description: Comes complete with silk top hat, carrot nose, and two eyes made out of coal. Perfect winter decoration for any home.

items.name: Christmas Gnome
items.description: A small misshapen mischievous sprite who makes Christmas wishes of 2006 come true.

items.name: Gingerbread House
items.description: Snowdrifts of icing, walls of gingerbread: this house is a replica of the first home decorated for Xmas in Torn City.

items.name: Lollipop
items.description: Tasty fruity candy lolly for lovers, friends, whiny noobs and spoilt brats alike to enjoy! Available in strawberry, blueberry, banana and chocolate flavours. Provides a small happiness increase when consumed.
items.effect: Increases happiness by 25 and booster cooldown by 30 minutes.

items.name: Mardi Gras Beads
items.description: These beads are from the Mardi Gras and thrown by Body. Do you have what it takes to get a set of them?

items.name: Devil Toy
items.description: Tasmanian devil that is. This little fella has been known to create havoc wherever he goes including staff channels, faction forums and anywhere newbies lurk. Rumour has it only Tazzy can control this little whirlwind.

items.name: Cookie Launcher
items.description: A non-working replica of Mix's Cookie launcher, used to launch cookies at his IRC buddies.

items.name: Cursed Moon Pendant
items.description: Be wary of this sacred item. The bearer of this pendant will be put under a spell and become a slave to the evillest of all staff members, Luna. The maker of this pendant cannot be held responsible for any actions you may perform while under its spell. You have been warned.

items.name: Apartment Blueprint
items.description: Designs of an Apartment for construction purposes.

items.name: Semi-Detached House Blueprint
items.description: Designs of a Semi-Detached house for construction purposes.

items.name: Detached House Blueprint
items.description: Designs of a Detached house for construction purposes.

items.name: Beach House Blueprint
items.description: Designs of a Beach house for construction purposes.

items.name: Chalet Blueprint
items.description: Designs of a Chalet for construction purposes.

items.name: Villa Blueprint
items.description: Designs of a Villa for construction purposes.

items.name: Penthouse Blueprint
items.description: Designs of a Penthouse for construction purposes.

items.description: Designs of a Mansion for construction purposes.

items.name: Ranch Blueprint

items.name: Palace Blueprint

items.name: Castle Blueprint
items.description: Designs of a Castle for construction purposes.

items.name: Printing Paper
items.description: Paper, very similar to the type money is printed on.
items.effect: Required for counterfeiting money in Crimes 1.0.

items.name: Blank Casino Chips
items.description: These blank casino chips are made from moulded clay-composite resin, bulked out with a sneaky little metal insert so they clack like the real thing. Right now they carry no markings or branding, which means they can be customized to suit the owner’s wishes. At a glance, these blanks might dupe an old fella with cataracts into thinking they’re legit. But only a fool would try to fatten their stack at Lucky Shots with fakes, as if the bouncers catch you they'll make sure you cash in your chips for the last time, out back by the dumpsters... with hammers.
items.effect:
Used by the Hustler role during the Plucking the Lotus Petal scenario.
Required for counterfeiting casino tokens in Crimes 1.0.

items.name: PVC Cards
items.description: A stack of high-quality Polyvinyl Chloride (PVC) cards, each with a printable surface ready to be customized to your needs. Whether you're looking to forge a driver's license or create a membership card for The Torn City Society of Fieldmice, this durable and flexible material will ensure that your design looks authentic even if you've just printed it off at home!
items.effect: Used during the production of forgery projects.

items.name: Skateboard
items.description: Device used for transportation and entertainment.
items.effect: Permanently increases Speed by 1%. Increases booster cooldown by 6 hours.

items.name: Boxing Gloves
items.description: Worn to protect hands during a boxing event.
items.effect: Permanently increases Defense by 1%. Increases booster cooldown by 6 hours.

items.name: Dumbbells
items.description: Device used to increase muscle mass.
items.effect: Permanently increases Strength by 1%. Increases booster cooldown by 6 hours.

items.name: Combat Vest
items.description: This prototype armor improves on the build of the Outer Tactical Vest to bring its wearer even more protection, making it the lightest, most technologically advanced piece of protective armor ever issued to the Armed Forces of the United States.

items.name: Liquid Body Armor
items.description: Liquid polyethylene glycol and hard nano-particles of silica combined and soaked into all layers of kevlar to make a uniquely flexible and lightweight body armor with amazing stopping power. Top Secret development model!

items.name: Flexible Body Armor
items.description: Classified! Top Secret!

items.name: Stick of Dynamite
items.description: A small stick of dynamite. This thing could cause a lot of damage if used in the right place...
items.effect: Required for Bombing crime.

items.name: Cesium-137
items.description: A man made radioactive element produced by breaking up uranium atoms. It remains dangerous for hundreds of years until losing its radiation.
items.effect: Component used in the construction of a Dirty Bomb.

items.name: Dirty Bomb
items.description: A weapon which combines radioactive material with explosives. A dirty bomb would be unlikely to cause many deaths; its main purpose would be to cause a mass panic.
items.effect: Damages a faction's respect and cripples its members with radiation poisoning and hospital time.

items.name: Sh0rty's Surfboard
items.description: Feel the force of Sh0rty's surfboard as he rides past you working his way around Torn City!

items.name: Puzzle Piece
items.description: This oddly shaped item was left over from the last time its owner, Chris, attempted to do a puzzle. Holds some importance....

items.name: Hunny Pot
items.description: This Hunny pot is gold plated and is filled with all the yummy sweetness of honey from contented bees. It is believed to contain the source of Acid's sweetness.

items.name: Seductive Stethoscope
items.description: The enigmatic Drmark uses this cold instrument to pick up the heated flutter of a lovestruck lady or the palpitations of a troubled wrongdoer, keeping the population of Torn City healthy.

items.name: Dollar Bill
items.description: This item is so rare that only a few bills were printed. It can only be obtained on the item market during Dollar Day Sales. It costs one dollar to purchase, but due to limited printing it is worth a small fortune.

items.name: Backstage Pass
items.description: This backstage pass gave special benefits to its holder by allowing them to have met performers after concerts held by Torn City Radio.

items.name: Chemi's Magic Potion
items.description: This homemade pink brew is powerful, one sip will leave you feeling like you can beat anyone.

items.name: Pack of Trojans
items.description: Magnum rubbers for the gangster who really knows how to use his gun.

items.name: Pair of High Heels
items.description: High Heels - essential weaponry in the control of the male species. Ho or Foe, still can be used to smack an average Joe.

items.name: Thong
items.description: Thongs...Not a wise choice if you have too much junk in your trunk.

items.name: Hazmat Suit
items.description: A fully encapsulating garment worn as protection from hazardous materials or substances.
items.effect: Immunity to Radiation, Nerve Gas, Tear Gas, and Pepper Spray.

items.name: Flea Collar
items.description: Keep those pesky critters away whilst swinging round the city. A rare must-have before it was discontinued. Reminiscent of golden times. The tag reads "Shadow Still a pup".

items.name: Dunkin's Donut
items.description: The feeling of invincibility gained by eating one of these cream filled masterpieces has been known to make HOF factions tremble with fear.

items.name: Amazon Doll
items.description: Modeled after Wild_Irish_Btch, this doll shows that women can stomp your face into the ground while towering above the men of Torn City. Doll comes equipped with a bag of Cheetos, a Teddy Bear plushie, a replica of Brutus, and an avid love of midgets.

items.name: BBQ Smoker
items.description: You have to be pretty fast to steal the brisket inside this smoker. Which just happened to be stolen right after this collectible was made. Body and a drifter hobo were both seen eating brisket in the vicinity shortly afterwards. st0ne was last seen crying in his backyard.

items.name: Bag of Cheetos
items.description: A jumbo bag of these orange cheese twists for late nights on the job. Favored by midgets of all types.

items.name: Motorbike
items.description: You can often find Numbat tearing it up through the city's darkest streets on this, seeking prey. Beware the spiked tires!

items.name: Citrus Squeezer
items.description: Commonly used by lem0n to put the squeeze on during lengthy interrogations. Also handy to make a refreshing drink on a warm day.

items.name: Superman Shades
items.description: Said to bestow Superman-like powers on the wearer, these ordinary looking shades are rumoured to make all of your stats appear the same.

items.name: Kevlar Helmet
items.description: Standard infantry combat wear in the US military. The shell is made from kevlar, a ballistic aramid fabric treated with a phenolic resin system.

items.name: Raw Ivory
items.description: A raw elephant tusk. A hard, smooth yellowish-white substance.

items.name: Fine Chisel
items.description: A tool with a cutting edge on its end. This particular type of chisel can be used to sculpt ivory.

items.name: Ivory Walking Cane
items.description: A handmade walking cane. Used by some of the oldest citizens in Torn City, helping them to get around while they commit various crimes and attend physiotherapy gym sessions.

items.name: Neumune Tablet
items.description: Neumune, an androstenediol, was introduced as a radiation countermeasure by the US Armed Forces Radiobiology Research Institute and has begun production in Switzerland.  Neumune is in Investigational New Drug (IND) status and Phase I trials have been performed.
items.effect: Reduces radiation hospital time by 3 hours and radiation effect by 12 hours. Increases medical cooldown by 3 hours.
items.requirement: Must be under the effect of radiation poisoning.

items.name: Mr Torn Crown '08
items.description: Awarded to -KC [130919] for winning the Mr Torn City awards 2008!

items.name: Ms Torn Crown '08
items.description: Awarded to AylaTayla [350383] for winning the Miss Torn City awards 2008!

items.name: Box of Grenades
items.description: A box of 100 grenades, courtesy of the Eaglewood mercenary group.
items.effect: Provides 100 Grenades or 100 HEGs when opened.

items.name: Box of Medical Supplies
items.description: A box of medical supplies, courtesy of the Torn City Health Service.
items.effect: Provides 20 Morphine, 20 Empty Blood Bags, 30 First Aid Kits, or 50 Small First Aid Kits when opened.

items.name: Erotic DVD
items.description: An Erotic DVD, courtesy of the Performance Ribaldry Network.
items.effect: Increases happiness by 2,500 and booster cooldown by 6 hours.

items.name: Feathery Hotel Coupon
items.description: A coupon to stay at one of the world's best hotels, courtesy of the Feathery Hotels Group.
items.effect: Refills energy. Increases happiness by 500 and booster cooldown by 6 hours.

items.name: Lawyer's Business Card
items.description: This card has the number of a professional defense lawyer on it, courtesy of the Legal Authorities Group.
items.effect: Removes all jail time and increases booster cooldown by 1 hour.

items.name: Lottery Voucher
items.description: A lottery voucher which can be traded in for 100 lottery tickets for the weekly draw, courtesy of the Lucky Shot Casino.
items.effect: Provides 100 Lucky Shot Lotto tickets when used.

items.name: Drug Pack
items.description: A drug pack from Symbiotic Ltd. Contains either 10x Xanax or 10x Vicodin.
items.effect: Provides 10 Xanax or 10 Vicodin when opened.

items.name: Dark Doll
items.description: Legend has it that this doll was made in the darkest depths of a castle by the typing of a keyboard.

items.name: Empty Box
items.description: An empty box. Items can be placed in to this box turning it into a parcel. It can then be sent to other people.
items.effect: Can be filled with items to create a Parcel.

items.name: Parcel
items.description: A parcel containing one or more items.
items.effect: Can be opened to receive the items inside.

items.name: Birthday Present
items.description: A birthday present, containing one or more items.
items.effect: Can be opened to receive the items inside.

items.name: Present
items.description: A present neatly wrapped with generic wrapping paper, containing one or more items.
items.effect: Can be opened to receive the items inside.

items.name: Christmas Present
items.description: A Christmas present, containing one or more items.
items.effect: Can be opened to receive the items inside.

items.name: Birthday Wrapping Paper
items.description: A roll of expensive birthday wrapping paper. Can be used on a parcel to turn it into a birthday present.
items.effect: Wraps parcels turning them into Birthday Presents.

items.name: Generic Wrapping Paper
items.description: A roll of standard wrapping paper. Can be used on a parcel to turn it into a present.
items.effect: Wraps parcels turning them into Presents.

items.name: Christmas Wrapping Paper
items.description: A roll of expensive Christmas wrapping paper. Can be used on a parcel to turn it into a Christmas present.
items.effect: Wraps parcels turning them into Christmas Presents.

items.name: Small Explosive Device
items.description: A very small explosive device. Generally used in parcels to give the opener a nasty surprise.
items.effect: Can be hidden inside a parcel to hospitalize someone for 5 hours upon opening.

items.name: Gold Laptop
items.description: Stun others with this exclusive limited edition solid gold laptop. Crafted from one single block of 99.9% pure gold. Use it while travelling, if your arms can bear the weight.
items.effect: Can be used to access additional services while traveling and program viruses.

items.name: Gold Plated AK-47
items.description: One of the best rifles in the world, made even better. This highly tuned, gold plated AK-47 Kalashnikov will send fear coursing through the blood of your enemies. Configured to fire an extended magazine of ammunition, it's not the cheapest, but it'll certainly leave a mark.

items.name: Digital Organizer
items.description: This digital organizer has a large storage area for contacts.

items.name: Camel Plushie
items.description: This rare camel plushie will instantly remind you of Arabian nights within the U.A.E.

items.name: Tribulus Omanense
items.description: Originating in the desert, and soon to become Dubai's official flower, the Tribulus Omanense is a hermaphroditic flower that can survive very harsh conditions.

items.name: Sports Sneakers
items.description: This pair of limited edition sneakers will prove their value in the gym. Rumoured to increase speed gains by up to 5%, these lightweight and durable shoes will leave your enemies in the dust.
items.effect: Increases speed gains in the gym by 5%.

items.name: Handbag
items.description: A platinum plated handbag to keep thieves at bay. Its diamond studs will deliver a nasty blow to any opponent.

items.name: Pink Mac-10
