items.description: Pangolins are famous for curling into a tight ball when threatened, a trait which marks them as “pathetically easy” on the “how easy stuff is to hunt” scale. Pangolin scales are made of keratin, the same stuff as fingernails, which makes their use in traditional medicine about as scientific as chewing your own toenails. Despite this, millions of pangolin have been illegally slaughtered, roasted, and stripped so their scales could be boiled into potions said to cure everything from acne to impotence. Conservationists call it one of the greatest wildlife crimes of our time, while Tornfolk see it as a lucrative side hustle.

items.name: Ambergris Lump
items.description: Ambergris, not to be confused with hamburgers, is a waxy greyish substance created inside the intestines of sperm whales. Formed from a fatty secretion, it’s expelled either orally or anally before drifting ashore on beaches worldwide. Thanks to its use in perfume making, a single lump of this fat shitty whale barf can fetch hundreds of thousands of dollars. Because it comes from sperm whales, an endangered species, the ambergris trade is banned in many countries under whaling protection laws. The only ways around this are to buy it on the black market or obtain ambergris naturally, by finding it on a beach or sticking your fingers down a whale’s throat.

items.name: Natural Pearls
items.description: Natural pearls form inside molluscs when an irritant, such as a parasite or a grain of sand, gets trapped inside the shell. Conversely, when a rock becomes lodged in a human’s shoe, no precious objects are formed, an injustice that technology ought one day rectify. The process sees the mollusc coat the foreign body in layers of nacre, slowly armouring it over until the lump becomes smooth, shiny, and fit for auction. Trading these items is often forbidden without a license, as pearl-producing species are typically protected or hail from endangered habitats. These restrictions are easily sidestepped by shoving the pearls in your hand luggage and not giving a shit.

items.name: Uncut Diamonds
items.description: In their uncut form, diamonds can be mistaken for cloudy little rocks, the kind you’d find in a pouch and pay $500 to smoke. Formed deep in the Earth under pressures that would turn you into a jam stain, these rough crystals are mined and only gain their sparkle once someone with a steady hand cuts and buffs them to perfection. Synthetic diamonds are now easy to make, but many haughty-ass brides still baulk at the prospect, preferring instead the blood-soaked authenticity of carbon pried from the Earth by a starving child’s hands.

items.name: Tiger Bone Powder
items.description: In 2011, Charlie Sheen famously declared that he had tiger blood, with nobody quite sure if this claim was metaphorical or if he’d been phlebotomising large predators in his time off. As it turns out, “tiger blood” might’ve been a euphemism for full-blown AIDS, which he later revealed he had. AIDS is but one of the many conditions that tiger bone powder will not cure, along with literally every other disease known to man. A placebo ingredient taken by intelligence-averse individuals, tiger bone powder is prohibited and highly prized, yet is often substituted with cow or pig bones by unscrupulous sellers. Nonetheless, harbingers of this macabre tradition insist that swallowing calcium dust scraped from a dead predator makes them strong. In reality it works about as well as snorting the leftovers of a KFC bargain bucket.

items.name: Obsidian Point
items.description: Obsidian forms when silica-rich lava cools so quickly that crystals never get a chance to grow, leaving behind a smooth, glassy rock. Jet-black and reflective, an obsidian arrowhead looks like a tiny shard of polished night-time, and was used for hunting and warfare by the Aztecs and Maya people. However, much like its namesake game studio, obsidian is a one-hit wonder, its brittle nature causing it to shatter on impact. Weak as they may be, obsidian points are razor sharp, flintknapped to an edge as fine as surgical steel. The obsidian trade was enormous in pre-Columbian Mexico, but later gave way to cocaine and avocados, which is also the title of Shia LaBeouf’s autobiography.

items.name: Quartzite Point
items.description: Quartzite is a hard metamorphic rock formed when sandstone is compressed and heated deep underground by Jamiroquai or tectonic forces. Typically pale and speckled with tightly fused quartz grains, a quartzite arrowhead has a gritty, crystalline sheen that catches the light. Early Homo sapiens in what is now South Africa fashioned it into hand axes, scrapers, and projectile points, but today quartzite is used for more peaceful purposes like making kitchen countertops. South Africa’s Table Mountain contains an abundance of quartzite, enough that you could theoretically clad the entire summit in a single massive countertop at an estimated cost of around $1.1 billion USD—$1 billion flat if you're willing to pay cash in hand.

items.name: Chert Point
items.description: Chert weapons were common across Mesolithic and Neolithic Britain, with arrowheads like these fashioned when sources of flint were scarce. Chert, which sounds like something an American mom would name her third son, is a fine-grained sedimentary rock made mostly of microscopic quartz crystals. Usually dull grey or brown with a waxy, matte surface, a chert arrowhead is as dense and brittle as Ricky Gervais, fracturing into sharp, curved flakes like a bowl of lethal Frosties. This arrowhead, like all arrowheads, can be sold to the Torn City museum, which makes a change, since it’s usually the British digging up someone else’s treasure to ship back home.

items.name: Basalt Point
items.description: Basalt is the most common volcanic rock on the planet and forms when lava cools quickly upon reaching the Earth's surface. Ancient Polynesian cultures used this material to make all manner of implements, including adzes, a hand tool with a curved blade used for slicing pizza-bound pineapple chunks. This basalt arrowhead is tougher and heavier than one made of flint or obsidian, and would have required its maker to grind the point rather than use knapping. Famous Hawaiians include Barack Obama, Bette Midler, and Bruno Mars, none of whom are known to have been pierced by a basalt arrowhead.

items.name: Chalcedony Point
items.description: Chalcedony is a microcrystalline form of quartz formed when silica-rich fluids seep into rock cavities and solidify. The Patagonian region of Argentina is rich in chalcedony, with native prehistoric cultures using it to make knives, scrapers, and arrowheads. This material, which ranges in colour from white and blue to pinky reds, is easy to knap and its edges stay sharp longer than rival materials like obsidian. On the 22nd of June 1986, Diego Maradona scored a goal with his hand in the World Cup quarter-final against England. The cheating little shit would never have managed that if someone had fired a chalcedony point through his head in the 50th minute.

items.name: Quartz Point
items.description: Quartz arrowheads were carved from quartz, surprisingly, with this one hailing from Canada, where large quartz deposits can be found. Indigenous cultures like the Cree and Athabaskan peoples used quartz points for hunting long before anyone discovered you could smother fries in cheese curds and gravy and call it dinner. Knapping a quartz arrowhead is a skilled practice, since it flakes unpredictably, much like humans do once they’ve got married and had kids. This quartz point can be placed in your mouth for luck, and if you’re lucky, it won’t slice your mouth clean open.

items.name: Evil Christmas Gonk
items.description: A festive gonk with a HATEFUL soul and a sack full of bad intentions. It WATCHES from the shelf and WAITS for joy to turn to agony. He SEES your sins and COVETS your tears. Nobody remembers buying this THING. And yet... IT persists.

items.name: Copium Inhaler
items.description: Copium is a mood stabilizing gas which allows the user to gain large quantities of self-belief when inhaled. Known on the street as Hot Air, C?P?U? is self-administered during the closing stages of a directionless rant directed at an unpaid volunteer who is almost certainly correct. Each pressurized canister has been recovered from the inventory of a detained player who did nothing wrong, besides harass those women, use “that” word, and share the family computer with their fifteen brothers. Prolonged use may result in wilful blindness, tone deafness, and selective memory loss.
items.effect:
Increases hubris by 10% over 180 minutes.
Includes side effects (delusion).

items.name: Snowman Mask '25
items.description: Have you ever wanted to look like a snowman without suffering the consequences of severe hypothermia and frostbite? Why? What would doing this actually achieve? Would briefly looking like a snowman make you feel good about yourself? Would it right all those wrongs in that pathetic existence you call a life? Would it actually, though? Seriously? Then strap on this somewhat realistic-looking snowman mask! Made from lightweight polystyrene and charmingly adorned with white asbestos, this mask is all you need for the holiday season. Beside a loving family and friends, of course.

items.name: Priceless Painting
items.description: This piece of Romanticist-inspired artwork is undeniably priceless. Some may try to put a price on it, and others may even be willing to pay that price, yet it remains priceless nonetheless. A dramatic, patriotic piece believed to have been painted in the 19th century, this picture has drawn plenty of comments for its shotgun-wielding, horseback-riding subject, who bears a suspicious resemblance to a well-known mafioso. Whether the protagonist is related to Don Calabrese, we cannot say. What we do know is this spectacular painting is definitely worth risking your life for. Mostly because it’s got a really nice frame.

items.name: Angle Grinder
items.description: The angle grinder is a power tool beloved by DIY professionals and weekend amateurs who aren't too attached to their fingers, or at least soon won't be. This compact handheld cutter relies on an abrasive, resin-bonded disc which spins at high speed to cut through metal, glass, bone, and flesh. This particular model was purchased in bulk off Temu, which means the safety guard is decorative, the off switch is more of a suggestion, and the ten-year warranty is valid only if used between the hours of 8:30 and 8:35 in a small conurbation on the outskirts of Dongguan.
items.effect: Required by the Looter role during the Window of Opportunity scenario.

items.name: Mini Me Armchair
items.description: Grab that toy remote control and get comfy! This kid-size armchair is cozy as a hug for your little man-in-training. Comfort: 2

items.name: Best Bear Friend
items.description: The friendliest of bear chairs is here to be your child’s best friend. We won’t tell if you want one too. Comfort: 3

items.name: Lap of Luxury Modern Chair
items.description: Firm. Stable. Singular. Unless you want more than one. Comfort: 3

items.name: The Lil’ Jony
items.description: Lil’ Jony often let her pigs sit in a chair exactly like this one. Now, like Lil’ Jony, you too can sit where Jony’s pig sat. Comfort: 3

items.name: Simplicit-Ease Chair
items.description: Every living room needs a chair like this--simple, straightforward construction for television watching and after-work relaxing. Comfort: 3

items.name: Cloud Chair
items.description: Don’t think that we haven’t tried building chairs out of actual clouds. Such is our commitment to fine comfort that we will never give up on that dream! Until then, sink deep into the embrace of a chair that just feels like you’re sitting on a cloud. Comfort: 3

items.name: Mega Living Chair
items.description: Aren’t you sick of having to treat antiques like they’re made of glass? What’s the value in furniture if it’s irreplaceable? Get rid of all that stress and invest in an antique Mega Living Chair from MegaMission Furniture Warehouse. All our antiques are mass produced, so you can do whatever you want to them! Comfort: 4

items.name: Outdoor Seat
items.description: Upon each seat I sat, I am inspector three,

items.name: The Solidarity
items.description: We are all united. We work, we play, we dance, and we rest. When you sit down to rest you are participating in part of the grand experiment we call life. Savor these moments in Reclamation Homeware’s Solidarity living chair, made from our proprietary blend of premium, pressed garbage. Comfort: 4

items.name: Reupholstered Mahogany Chair
items.description: Ease into this chair and be transported to paradise! Smell the salty sea breeze, hear the shuffle of banana leaves overhead, and the sun’s warmth on your skin. It’s not a hallucination! Though, it kind of sounds like a hallucination…

items.name: The Sleepthrone
items.description: Say farewell to the angular captain chairs of years gone by! Instead, recline in the comfort of your very own Laxseat. (Armrest console not included.) Comfort: 5

items.name: Arrrmed Living Chair
items.description: Princess Cordelia’s 2nd pirate boyfriend, Captain Chaz MacFreeling, had perpetually tired arms. Due to his vanity, he was always taking out his gold mirror, holding it up to his face and blowing kisses. He commissioned Princess Cordelia to make him this armed living chair so he could rest during social visits. When she dumped him, she kept the chair. Comfort: 6

items.name: Mission Undecided Armchair
items.description: Classic Mission-style craftsmanship almost meets comfort in this partially padded living room chair. Comfort: 6

items.name: Crate Expectations Leather Chair
items.description: This comfortable chair combines the luxury of a deep leather seat with a rugged frame built from old crates. PostRustic keeps you guessing. Comfort: 6

items.name: Deep Delight Living Chair
items.description: Whether you’re being tossed around in a submersible or simply lounging on land, the deep embrace of this velvet chaise is like no other. Sit back, snuggle in, and hope you never have to stand again. Comfort: 7

items.name: Executive Guest Chair
items.description: Executives have important guests… but they’re not as important as you are! That’s why the Executive Guest Chair is specifically calibrated to be 20% less comfortable than the Executron Executive Desk Throne. Because you should always be more comfortable than your guests! Comfort: 7 Environment: 4 Unlocked at level 9 of the Business career (Management branch)

items.name: The Thinker
items.description: Sink into profound thought in the leather depths of this armchair. Tall arms and shielded sides block out any distraction, while sending the message to all who come near that genius is in the making. Comfort: 7 Unlocked at level 4 of the Writer career

items.name: Pretty Sitter
items.description: Sometimes you just want to let go. You want to relax all of your muscles and allow something soft to cradle your body, yet provide you with support in all the right places. Heave a satisfied sigh and give yourself to the Pretty Sitter. Comfort: 7

items.name: Evil Am Eye Swiveler
items.description: Just in case someone mistakes you for a good guy, the nefarious glowing eye on this imposing chair will ensure they stand corrected. Comfort: 10 Unlocked at level 8 of the Secret Agent career (Villain branch)

items.name: Kindermade Chair
items.description: The Kindermade Chair is the perfect complement to our Knowledge Console desk, but it’s also a superb stand-alone piece. It really ties a room together! Of course kids don’t care about that kind of thing, but you can tell the other parents.

items.name: Mallorca Teak Picnic Chair
items.description: This teak folding chair may not be the most comfortable outdoor seating option but it’s certainly one of the most handsome.

items.name: Canary Outdoor Dining Chair
items.description: The perfect outdoor seating for casual elegance in gorgeous teak.

items.name: Sooner or Ladder Contemporary Dining Chair
items.description: Why have three rungs when two will do fine? The epitome of minimalist practicality, this simple sitter gets the job done.

items.name: Kindermade Classic High Chair
items.description: A high chair made for any home. This essential piece of toddler furniture has been made in a number of colors to match whatever collection of Kindermade items that you may already have.

items.name: Hercynian Dining Chair
items.description: Like the sinister park bench from a gloom-ridden forest, only indoors and at your dining room table.

items.name: The Commissioner
items.description: We are all of us united by our primal need to consume. We are driven by the desire to interact with our fellows. Mealtimes present us with the unique opportunity to do both. Satisfy your primal instincts with such class and elegance you’ll forget you’re sitting on trash. The Commissioner dining chair, by Reclamation Homeware. Comfort: 1

items.name: Brock Metal Dining Chair
items.description: Calm, cool, and collected, this metal dining chair softens its industrial profile with an extra-soft cushion to cradle your fleshy underside. Comfort: 1

items.name: La Silla De La Mesa De Familia - Dining Chair
items.description: At first glance it is maybe not the most comfortable looking chair, but this chair is the best chair to spend family days, and everything in between. This chair will be part of every celebration, every conversation, and probably be the subject of discord every time your mom yells across the home saying “Pero why don’t you bring back the chair after you use it!?” – Ahem… yeah those times too.

items.name: Mega Dining Chair
items.description: Did you know that antique furniture can be hundreds of years old? Who’s got time to wait around for that?! For the freshest antiques on the market, you have to visit the MegaMission Furniture Warehouse. Buy one of our gorgeous antique dining chairs today, and we’ll guarantee it was an oak tree two days ago! Comfort: 1

items.name: Supersonic Dining Chair
items.description: No matter how simple your meal, your time spent sitting around the dinner table will be out of this world with this sleek seat. Comfort: 1

items.name: Moon-Gazing Chair
items.description: This chair was granted for the New Lunar Year of the Pig, starting in February 2019.

items.name: I Ran So Far Away Chair
items.description: No matter where you go, no matter how far you run… the I Ran So Far Away chair is ready to caress your cares away. So sit, don’t run, and just relax. Comfort: 1

items.name: Caress Chair
items.description: At what point do chairs do beyond relaxing the body and begin to relax the mind? At Countryside Caress, we call that point the Caress Chair. For the full experience, sit all the way back and stuff yourself with your favorite comfort food. Comfort: 1

items.name: Barely Cushy Tushy Chair
items.description: For the minimalist who aspires to a life of comfort, this modern dining chair adds just a smidge of padding where it’s appreciated most. Comfort: 1

items.name: Termagant Dining Chair
items.description: Daringly modern dining room furnishing, or replica dunking chair? You decide. Comfort: 1

items.name: Captain Rodrigo de Pablo Dining Chair
items.description: Princess Cordelia’s 3rd pirate boyfriend, Captain Rodrigo De Pablo, was very accident-prone. Once, both of his feet were severely burned as he stepped over a steam vent. After that, he sat a lot and thus wanted very comfortable seating. Being Cordelia’s favorite boyfriend, he was gifted this padded chair from her. Comfort: 1

items.name: The Greatest Gift Chair
items.description: Designed by: heyHarrie If you have a friend with less than ample seating in their home, what better gift to give than that of a chair. It might be a tad passive aggressive, but one might argue that its outright aggressive to host guests in a seating-challenged home, forcing friends to scrounge like pigeons for a place to perch. Don't let your derriere despair: gift a chair!

items.name: Mega High Chair
items.description: MegaMission Furniture Warehouse knows you’ve been searching for that toddler high chair to match your perfectly antiqued furniture set. These chairs are made of easily cleaned wood and a strip of colored leather, so that no matter how messy your toddler eats it will come off.

items.name: Embrace Chair
items.description: The Embrace is similar to our Caress Chair, only with little arms that reach out and hug you! What should be a very simple chair will surprise you with its intricate carvings. But don’t be alarmed – it’s just a little secret between you and the chair. Comfort: 1

items.name: Fine Toddler Eatery
items.description: A higher quality chair made for those particularly hard to please home decorators. No, you don’t have to compromise with your style choices simply because you have a toddler in your house.

items.name: Arrrmless Dining Chair
items.description: In order to seat her remaining courtiers in the tight quarters of her submersible, Princess Cordelia crafted a dining set without any arms. Look closely, however, and you’ll notice the attention she paid to the legs, exquisitely carved to mimic tentacles. Captivating! Comfort: 1

items.name: Cavill Dining Chair
items.description: You will never meet a more handsome chair than this. And the chair knows it. Don’t be surprised if you find this chair admiring its scrollwork in the mirror. Vanity, thy name is chair. Comfort: 7

items.name: Arrrmed Dining Chair
items.description: Princess Cordelia’s 2nd pirate boyfriend, Captain Chaz MacFreeling, had perpetually tired arms. Due to his vanity, he was always taking out his gold mirror, holding it up to his face and blowing kisses. He commissioned Princess Cordelia to make him this armed dining chair so he could rest during meals. When she dumped him, she kept the chair. Comfort: 8

items.name: Saught Drafting Chair
items.description: This stern office chair eschews the mere fripperies of ergonomic comfort. You will suffer and you will like it.

items.name: Joliette Desk Chair
items.description: Molded plastic was never yet so comfortable nor so colorful.

items.name: Intelligence Desk Chair
items.description: Some pieces of furniture can’t simply be aesthetically pleasing. They seem imbued with some special quality. In this case, this desk chair may not actually make you more intelligent, but it’ll make you look it. Comfort: 1

items.name: “The Boss” Executive Desk Chair
items.description: A leathed-lined overstuffed office chair with full back and armrests that cradles your body while maintaining an appropriately imposing silhouette. Comfort: 1

items.name: The Professional
items.description: Working isn’t always glamorous, except when having to work sitting in this chair!

items.name: Salyut Aeronaut Chair
items.description: Astronauts require both comfort and security in their seating. This space-age chair provides both. Comfort: 7 Confident Décor: 4 Unlocked at level 7 of the Astronaut career

items.name: The Swiveler
items.description: The ultimate chair from which to decipher malevolent machinations, the Swiveler is a must-have throne for any covert operative. Comfort: 7 Confident Décor: 2 Unlocked at level 2 of the Secret Agent career

items.name: Executron Executive Desk Throne
items.description: Desk chairs are yesterday’s news… and they’re for peons! Today’s executive demands a more impressive seat. Sit in an Executron Executive Desk Throne and command your business empire! Comfort: 8 Confident Décor: 5 Unlocked at level 7 of the Business career (Management branch)

items.name: Mega Sofa
items.description: Who needs an antique that’s saddled with a bunch of history? Wouldn’t you rather be the first person ever to sit on your antique sofa? For fresh antiques without all the baggage, it has to be MegaMission Furniture Warehouse. Nothing beats that new antique smell!

items.name: Squarely There Modern Sofa
items.description: Sleek clean lines square off with comfy cushioned seating in this contemporary sofa. So neutral, you almost forget it’s there! Comfort: 1

items.name: The Illumination
items.description: The body may rest where it pleases, but what of the mind and the spirit? Fret not. When we at Reclamation Homeware designed The Illumination, our goal was nothing short of Whole Restoration. It will soothe your very soul so thoroughly you won’t even detect the smell of the tightly pressed, rotten cardboard from which it is constructed. Comfort: 1

items.name: The Lil’ Jony Sofa (Fake!)
items.description: We were under quite a lot of pressure by the Lil’ Jony Preservation Society to include a matching sofa to The Lil’ Jony living chair. But Lil’ Jony never sat on a sofa! And her pigs sure as hellfire didn’t like sofas! How can they call themselves the LJPS when they spread fallacies such as this! It’s an outrage!! But fine, the matching Lil’ Jony Sofa… hope you’re happy LJPS, we hope you’re happy… Comfort: 1

items.name: Size-Sensitive Sofa
items.description: Talking lizard? Chess-playing hamster? Whomever you may host, this specially-designed sofa will comfortably seat you and your tiny friends alike! Comfort: 1

items.name: The Hipster Hugger
items.description: The Hipster Hugger is covered with faux-leather upholstery that’s vegan and stuffed with foam that has nothing to do with animals or nature. Comfort: 2 Focusing Décor: 2 Unlocked at level 5 of the Tech Guru career

items.name: Cuttlefish Sofa
items.description: Cuttlefish are interesting little creatures. They have a flow-y, oddly-shaped body with tentacles that hang down. Seeing cuttlefish for the first time, Princess Cordelia knew she had to make a sofa based on their unique form! (She also liked the idea of cuddling on a cuttlefish sofa.) Comfort: 3

items.name: Comfultimate Sofa
items.description: Sinking into the Comfultimate sofa, you’ll swear you’re watching an Autumn sunset over flowing hills of lavender while you lie on a fluffy cloud made of hugs. Seriously. Every single time you sit down. Comfort: 4

items.name: Unabashed Sofa
items.description: Celebrate the unadorned truth with this artisan sofa from the Unabashed Collection. Untreated crate-wood walls, exposed rivets and metal bracing all support a supple leather interior, for stable, unsubdued comfort that simply doesn’t lie. Comfort: 5

items.name: Captain Rodrigo De Pablo Couch
items.description: Princess Cordelia’s 3rd pirate boyfriend, Captain Rodrigo De Pablo, suffered several injuries aboard her submarine. One leg got stuck in a pressurized air hatch, crippling him severely. Princess Cordelia designed this sofa with a matching ottoman for him to rest on. The ottoman, with its own tragic story, is sold separately. Comfort: 8

items.name: Squarely There Modern Loveseat
items.description: Sleek clean lines square off with comfy cushioned seating in this contemporary loveseat. So neutral, you almost forget it’s there! Comfort: 1

items.name: Mega Loveseat
items.description: We had to convince our robots to build a 2-person sofa, as they decided that 3-person sofas were more efficient. They changed their minds once we explained the value of cuddling with someone special and then triggered the override switch on their decision cortex. You can’t teach a robot to love, but you can teach it to build a loveseat! Comfort: 1

items.name: The Epiphany
items.description: Comfort affords a clarity of thought that allows us to weave the people, places, and moments of our memories into a grand tapestry that carpets our path into the future. Visualize your past, present, and future on The Epiphany from Reclamation Homeware. Built for comfort. Built from trash. Comfort: 1

items.name: Size-Sensitive Loveseat
items.description: Talking lizard? Chess-playing hamster? Whomever you may host, this specially-designed loveseat will comfortably seat you and your tiny friend alike! Comfort: 1

items.name: Reupholstered Mahogany Loveseat
items.description: Lazy days await with this reupholstered mahogany loveseat. Note the hand-carved wood detailing, the breathable fabric, and the pillows. Those perfectly puffable pillows.

items.name: Cuttlefish Love Seat
items.description: Cuttlefish are interesting little creatures. They have a flow-y, oddly-shaped body with tentacles that hang down. Seeing cuttlefish for the first time, Princess Cordelia knew she had to make a love seat based on their unique form! (She also liked the idea of cuddling on a cuttlefish love seat.) Comfort: 3

items.name: Cozofa
items.description: Looking to cozy up to that special someone? The Cozofa is on your side. It’s perfectly designed to bring two people closer together, because of its unparalleled comfort, and because three people will not fit on it. Comfort: 4

items.name: Unabashed Loveseat
items.description: We are only as strong as the truth, so this loveseat bares all: raw, crate-wood walls, exposed rivets and metal bracing-all supporting a supple interior of unsubdued comfort. Comfort: 5

items.name: Ocean’s Current Loveseat
items.description: Love can be a fickle thing, sweeping in and out as if with the tides, especially when you are royalty. Princess Cordelia designed the Ocean’s Current Loveseat in tender acknowledgement of this truth. Swirling embellishments embrace its occupants: the Princess and her current love. Comfort: 8

items.name: Anti-Goblin Bed by Kindermade
items.description: This chunky bed frame offers your child great back support, happy dreams, and the comfort of knowing that nothing, really…nothing! Is hiding under the bed. At Kindermade, comfort and safety are always the first things on our minds, at least where our customers are concerned. Energy: 3 Uncomfortable for Adults

items.name: Gordian Cot
items.description: Assembled by robots in our sleep-tech facility, the Gordian Cot marries convenience and style without compromising the discomfort of camping in the wild. Energy: 4 Stress Relief: 3 Uncomfortable

items.name: Mod Pod Sleeper
items.description: The clean, simple lines of this contemporary-style bed are soothingly functional. In modern design, less is more, so we’ll leave it at that. Energy: 4 Uncomfortable

items.name: Teen Dreams Single
items.description: This narrow bed is made for dreaming… of a larger bed. Energy: 4 Discomfort Relief: 1

items.name: Soothing Sleeper Single Bed
items.description: If there’s a cozier bed on the market than our Soothing Sleeper, we have never seen it. Climb into one and lose yourself to soft colors and softer curves. It’s like sleeping in a hug. Energy: 4 Stress Relief: 1 Discomfort Relief: 1

items.name: The Eminence
items.description: It is only when we close our eyes to temporal reality that we can truly unleash the imagination. To craft the perfect bed, we first took a nap. Its design came to us in a dream. Then, we built it—in our sleep. Made from the infinite potential of the subconscious mind. And garbage. The Eminence. by Reclamation Homeware. Energy: 5 Stress Relief: 2 Discomfort Relief: 2

items.name: Double Mission Single Bed
items.description: Hand-crafted to solid perfection, this Mission-style bed is not only great for sleeping, its broad headboard and footboard are great for keeping books, lamps, lava lamps, dirty clothes and even a few knick-knacks… although they do detract slightly from the design. Energy: 5 Stress Relief: 3 Discomfort Relief: 3

items.name: Discretion Single Bedsystem
items.description: Your significant other will totally dig this audrinite-reinforced hyporeactive bed. Unparalleled buoyancy, minimal noise, and zero springboarding! Cozy edition. Energy: 5 Stress Relief: 3 Discomfort Relief: 3

items.name: Princess Cordelia’s Single Bed
items.description: Whenever Princess Cordelia grew tired of pirate breath, she retreated to the luxurious solitude of a bed such as this. The original bed was bolted down, but we’ve made it easier for landlubbers to transport-though it’s also a trifle easier to steal. Energy: 10 Stress Relief: 10 Discomfort Relief: 10

items.name: Mod Pod Twin Sleeper
items.description: Snuggle up in pure simplicity with this contemporary-style bed. In modern design, less is more, so enough said. Energy: 4 Uncomfortable

items.name: The Barnish Bed
items.description: Ever slept in a barn? No? Well, get ready for the Barnish. Constructed of reclaimed barn doors with a gently hay-scented mattress, you’ll be neighing your way to dreamland in no time. Energy: 4 Stress Relief: 1 Discomfort Relief: 1

items.name: Killer Queen Double Bed
items.description: Also available in queen plus, king minus, cal-kind, and king. Energy: 4 Stress Relief: 1 Discomfort Relief: 1

items.name: Soothing Sleeper Double Bed
items.description: Once you climb into our Soothing Sleeper, you may never want to climb out! Its welcoming embrace is a prelude to the sweetest of dreams. The only way it could possibly be cozier… is to share it with someone else. Wink! Energy: 4 Stress Relief: 1 Discomfort Relief: 1

items.name: The Utopiate
items.description: Every living creature from the mighty elephant to the tiniest blade of grass needs sanctuary, and we’re no exception. Our beds should be places of safety and comfort that allow our brain to participate unhindered in the magic of dreams. Like all of our furniture, this bed is made from reclaimed garbage. The Utopiate. Energy: 5 Stress Relief: 2 Discomfort Relief: 2

items.name: Single Mission Double Bed
items.description: This refined Mission-style bed is as solid as they come, so you can sleep in sturdy comfort, no matter how much your partner’s tossing and turning. Energy: 6 Stress Relief: 3 Discomfort Relief: 3

items.name: Discretion Double Bedsystem
items.description: Your significant other will totally dig this audrinite-reinforced hyporeactive bed. Unparalleled buoyancy, minimal noise, and zero springboarding! Energy: 6 Stress Relief: 4 Discomfort Relief: 4

items.name: Rustic Dream Bed
items.description: Constructed of weathered, kilm-dried pine, this classic bed is scarred with breathtaking cracks that enhance its beauty. Trace each scar with a finger, admire its knotty sides. No other bed has quite as much character as the Rustic Dream. Energy: 9 Stress Relief: 8 Inspiring Décor: 6 Unlocked at level 10 of the Painter career (Patron of the Arts branch)

items.name: Princess Cordelia’s Galleon Bed
items.description: Princess Cordelia had a thing for pirates. Throughout her life she dated three of them. Their swashbuckling style carried over into one of her furniture lines, “Subaquatic Farrniture.” This bed is fit for a sea captain and looks like it belongs on a galleon! Energy: 10 Stress Relief: 10 Discomfort Relief: 10

items.name: Mod Pod Top Bunk
items.description: The Mod Pod line has done it again! If you enjoy the clean and simple lines of the contemporary Mod Pod Sleeper Bed, you will definitely like this version. The Mod Pod Top Bunk will make you feel as if you were sleeping in a cloud... quite literally in the sky even! Well... sort of, you know what I mean... I think. Energy: 4 Uncomfortable

items.name: Mod Pod Bunk Bed
items.description: The Mod Pod Collection keeps growing! Who needs a bunk bed with one ladder? As if! Twin Ladders is what you need! Modern living and convenience, there is nothing else that says efficiency that this version of the Mod Pod... just be careful not to bonk your head! Energy: 4 Uncomfortable

items.name: Metal Framed Top Bunk
items.description: Fancy sleeping with a view? Top view that is! The Metal Framed Top Bunk brings you the feeling of being in a bunk bed, without the extra... well... bed and all the extra hardware! Why have two when what you need is only one? And by the way, it is the better one! Energy: 4 Stress Relief: 2 Discomfort Relief: 2

items.name: Metal Framed Bunk Bed
items.description: These days optimizing our personal space is more important than ever. If you are looking to optimize a room for two (just two?) without breaking the bank, the Metal Framed Bunk Bed is right for you!

items.name: Short and Stout Bed by Kindermade
items.description: Kindermade has finally extended their brand to the younger generation with a product made specifically for your toddler. This short (and stout!) bed is designed to provide a good night’s rest and has enough space for parents to sit and read their little one to sleep. Only Toddlers can sleep in this bed Energy: 3

items.name: Classic Toddler Bed
items.description: Wood has been used to craft beds for centuries. If it was good enough for your great great grandparent’s ancestors, then it is good enough for your toddler. Only Toddlers can sleep in this bed Energy: 3

items.name: The Littlest Big Bed
items.description: For young explorers and imaginative dreamers. For little thinkers, keepers of toys and joy. This bed is perfect for all. Only Toddlers can sleep in this bed Energy: 3

items.name: Racer Dreams
items.description: Whether your toddler dreams of cars or chariots, this is a bed just for them. Only Toddlers can sleep in this bed Energy: 3

items.name: Balanjar Teak Two-Seater Bench
items.description: Call it a loveseat for the out of doors. This comely bench comfortably accommodates two people for an intimate picnic date.

items.name: Must Be Loveseat
items.description: It’s so utilitarian, you’d almost rather sit in each other’s laps to avoid contact with it.

items.name: Parking It Patio Bench
items.description: Enjoy a glorious day in the park without even leaving your porch. This wood-and-iron slatted bench offers all the discomfort of a true park bench, without the noise and mess.

items.name: Retrositter Bench
items.description: This is not your grandfather’s bench. Rather, it’s your uncle’s. Two solid planks offer all the support that most people need, with no extra fuss. Comfort: 1

items.name: Love is in the Air Seat
items.description: Enjoy the fresh air with someone you love! This beautiful wrought-iron bench is just the right size for an open-air rendezvous in the intimacy of your patio or garden. Comfort: 1

items.name: Portable Lounge Chair
items.description: Plastic, portable, and perfect for the poolside or patio.

items.name: Outdoor Lounger
items.description: I am inspector seven, and I lounge around all day.

items.name: Demesne Round Teak Patio Table
items.description: Teak isn’t just a status symbol. It’s well-suited for outdoor furniture, such as this patio table, due to both its natural beauty and resistance to the elements. It’s also lighter than other materials, requires little maintenance and will not get hot in the sun.

items.name: Magnus Round Patio Table
items.description: Lightweight aluminium construction plus a wooden surface makes for a lightweight, portable patio table suitable for all you al fresco dining needs.

items.name: Avaris Glass-topped Patio Table
items.description: Iron and glass combine to form an arresting table to anchor your outdoor patio look.

items.name: Eco-Freak Teak Umbrella Table
items.description: Built from sustainable teak hardwood, responsibly farmed and cultivated by well-paid, full-grown workers, this eco-sealed patio table is a great choice for you and the planet. The included umbrella is made from 100% recycled materials, for guilt-free basking and bragging.

items.name: Eco-Freak Teak Table
items.description: Show Mother Nature how much you care with a patio table built from sustainable teak hardwood, responsibly farmed and cultivated by well-paid, full-grown workers. Sanded with recyclable sandpaper and coated with eco-friendly sealant, it’s as green as you get without harmful dyes.

items.name: My Yard or Yours Umbrella Table
items.description: This affordable patio table pairs a natural-wood surface with a lightweight aluminium frame. If you’d like to move it, just leave the umbrella open and see where the wind takes you.

items.name: My Yard or Yours Bistro Table
items.description: Awaken all your senses by taking your coffee in the beautiful outdoors. This feather-light bistro table combines classic wooden slats with an aluminium frame, so you can freshen your outlook just by moving it about.

items.name: Happy Camper Picnic Table
items.description: Make every meal feel like a picnic in the park with this classic wooden table! Exposed bolts and pre-weathered wood provide character and occasional splinters.

items.name: Garden Gander Bistro Table
items.description: Spend more time in your yard or garden with the Garden Gander Bistro Table. The perfect perch for a morning coffee, afternoon snack, or light meal, this classic iron and wood beauty is eager to greet you, rain or shine.

items.name: Backyard Oasis Umbrella Table
items.description: Create a private oasis in your own backyard! With a wipe-clean glass top and a wrought iron base that stands its ground, paradise awaits wherever you place it.

items.name: Backyard Oasis Patio Table
items.description: With an easy-to-clean glass top, room for an umbrella, and an intricate wrought iron base that always stands its ground, this delightful table is no mirage!

items.name: Urbanity Concrete Picnic Table
items.description: Get all the fun of a picnic table in a design that won’t walk away. Graffiti-ready surfaces are yours to decorate, unless some teenagers get to it first.

items.name: My Yard or Yours Patio Table
items.description: Picnic “en plein air” day and night with this affordable backyard dining table. Combining a classic slatted surface with a lightweight aluminium frame, this table is so portable, you can even BYOT to a friend’s.

items.name: Iron Oasis Dining Table
items.description: Equally at home on your patio, in your kitchen, or gracing your dining area, this incredibly versatile table is simply a dream come true. Just be sure you like where you put it. All that iron is challenging to lift.

items.name: Eschen Metal Bar Stool
items.description: Sidle up to the bar on this sturdy metal stool dripping with industrial chic. Comfort: 1

items.name: SPIN Industrial Stool
items.description: Available in a variety of finishes, this barstool provides comfortable and stylish casual seating in your kitchen or dining area.

items.name: Groovy Times Bar Stool
items.description: Designed by: heyHarrie Celebrate! This grooved, natural wood barstool was designed specially for our 21st anniversary. Scooch your booty up to the bar, and raise a glass of juice with us! Eat, drink, and be groovy!

items.name: The Celestial
items.description: As we dream, we give our light to the universe. It reflects endlessly from star to star like the ripples on a pond when kissed by the falling autumn leaves. Even the tiniest ember of inspiration can ignite the world. Here’s a barstool. Comfort: 1

items.name: Velvet Embrace
items.description: We’ve reinvented the barstool to deliver comfort so complete, you’ll never want to stand or walk again! With shapely rounded legs and a plush, voluptuous cushion, the Velvet Embrace snugs your most tender curves for evenings of unparalleled pleasure. Comfort: 2

items.name: Cephalopod Bar Stool
items.description: Inspired by the subaquatic world around them. Princess Cordelia’s Furniture Artisans have brought you the Cephalopod Bar Stool. Because eight legs would be superfluous, they’ve included four beautiful tentacles -- legs, to hold you up while you enjoy a beverage or snack. Comfort: 5

items.name: Domestic Satellite
items.description: Make way, space junk! This futuristic creation has all the charm of past satellites without any political baggage. Comfort: 7

items.name: Caress Barstool
items.description: The serene allure of the Countryside Caress barstool provides a comfort so complete, we had to add a back to it! Seriously, people kept just sliding off with a contented sigh and smacking onto the floor. Comfort: 7

items.name: Cephalopod Bar Stool with Back Support
items.description: Inspired by the subaquatic world around them. Princess Cordelia’s Furniture Artisans have brought you the Cephalopod Bar Stool. Because eight legs would be superfluous, they’ve included four beautiful tentacles -- legs, to hold you up while you enjoy a beverage or snack. Back support is included! Comfort: 8

items.name: Intimate Ottoman
items.description: Rest your feet on our Intimate Ottoman and everything else will follow! Irresistibly downy, with fabric as soft as a thousand butterflies’ wings, this comfy, spacious and remarkably sturdy ottoman is prepared to support all of you, and one of two friends, as well.

items.name: Captain Rodrigo De Pablo Ottoman
items.description: Princess Cordelia’s third pirate boyfriend, Captain Rodrigo De Pablo suffered several injuries aboard the submarine. One leg got stuck in a pressurized air hatch, crippling him severely. Princess Cordelia designed this Ottoman for him to rest his leg and peg leg while enjoying a warm fire together. The peg unfortunately caught fire. At least he never suffered a broken heart. Comfort: 3

items.name: Tabula Rosa Coffee Table
items.description: The ultimate blank slate, this contemporary coffee table features clean lines, a neutral palette, and an empty shelf that simply aches to be filled.

items.name: Mega Coffee Table
items.description: Our coffee table is the epitome of mission-style design, featuring simple lines and a certain “arts and crafts” charm. But what else would you except from MegaMission Furniture Warehouse? Our simple furniture-crafting algorithms and charming hydraulic robot arm assembly make us the mission masters!

items.name: Benner Coffeetable
items.description: This artist’s rendering of a silicon life form will make a great new housemate. It won’t play fetch, but it’s a perfect table!

items.name: Scalloped Edge Coffee Table
items.description: Princess Cordelia tried scallops for the first time while aboard her submarine. Cooked in garlic, they were the most delicious thing she had ever eaten. She was thankful for the experience and in honor of the poor scallop that lost its life, she designed this table. So touching!

items.name: Caress Coffee Table
items.description: This elegant design is a reassuring statement on incongruity. The simple, straight lines tell you that the Caress is here to do its job, but its playful curves and hidden accents suggest a flirty bit of fun lying just beneath the surface.

items.name: Form & Function Industrial Coffee Table
items.description: Constructed of reclaimed, untreated crate-wood with industrial steel bracing, this hard-working coffee table is protected by shatterproof windshield glass to protect against stains and just about anything.

items.name: Indulgence TV Stand
items.description: Envelop your TV in old-fashioned country love. Crafted from poplar, painted and then attacked by feral cats, this handsomely antiqued TV stand will make you feel as if you’ve stepped back through time, until you watch something better.

items.name: The Ascension
items.description: Life is infinite, ever cycling through darkness and renewal, ever turning round like a circle. So spins the Earth, so is designed The Ascension coffee table by Reclamation Homeware. Made from 100% reclaimed garbage, neatly pressed and painted into its compelling shape, this table too takes its place in the Great Circle.

items.name: Fire’s First Love Coffee Table
items.description: Do you know what’s possible with a little bit of fire and love? No, not roasted marshmallows! Okay…maybe fire-roasted marshmallows. But also this table! This artisan coffee table was hand-crafted using ancient fire-etching techniques, carving tools, and the unwavering affection of its maker.

items.name: The Shoehorn
items.description: A television stand that mimics the famous boomerang that knocked a world leader temporarily unconscious, this design brings even outdated electronics back to the future.

items.name: Steamed TV Stand
items.description: Harking back to the days of train travel, this charming television stand is made from old leather trunks and available in a variety of colors. Environment: 2

items.name: Ate & Salvage Drafting Table
items.description: Pairing a concrete base with a reclaimed 18th century pantry door, each table in this collection has its own unique story. Admire each nick, wonder at its secrets, and open the door to lively chats for every meal to come.

items.name: Square Meals Dining Table
items.description: Celebrate family unity with this modern glass-top table. Shaped in a perfect square, for exactly four diners, it discreetly deters unwanted guests from crashing your dinner gathering.

items.name: The Staccato
items.description: Nothing reflects human existence like a small table. Without these simple objects, civilizations would tumble and break apart. Carved from our proprietary blend of reclaimed garbage and topped with diamond-cut windshield glass, The Staccato separate our world from chaos.

items.name: Martian Invader
items.description: Quadrapedal table inspired by Morson Whale’s famous radioplay monster. Experience all the terror in the comfort of your own home!

items.name: Formal Mission Dining Table
items.description: Impress your guests with the elegant craftsmanship of this hardwood table. With a sleek glossy surface, sturdy legs, and decorative corbels at each corner, this table was handcrafted by an old-world father and his only obedient son.

items.name: Perfect Curve
items.description: Nothing celebrates curves like a perfect circle. Our Perfect Curve dining table features a deliciously rounded top supposed by long, elegant legs. Just sitting at one is like being in a passionate embrace. Put the Perfect Curve in your dining room and satisfy your hunger.

items.name: Undersea Traditional Dining Table
items.description: Fleeing the Great Sloth Invasion, Princess Cordelia and her pirate boyfriend escaped on her submarine. He brought his cook along to replace the one Cordelia left on land. Cordelia dumped the pirate before long, but happily kept his chef! In honor of the great dining she kept in her life, she designed and built a series of lovely tables.

items.name: Undersea Round Dining Table
items.description: Fleeing the Great Sloth Invasion, Princess Cordelia and her pirate boyfriend escaped on her submarine. He brought his cook along to replace the one Cordelia left on land. Cordelia dumped the pirate before long, but happily kept his chef! In honor of the great dining she kept in her life, she designed and built a series of lovely tables.

items.name: Simplicity Dining Table
items.description: Inspired by early colonial furniture, this graceful table provides ample room for friends and relations without undue fuss.

items.name: Mesa de Familia - Dining Table
items.description: This may seem just a dinner table to most people, but to some… this table means family, great food and enjoying it together… sometimes crying on this table for a broken heart and someone saying “Ay mi vida… things are going to be just fine.”

items.name: Mega Table
items.description: You’ll never find an antique mission table more authentic than our Mega Table. It will lend a classic, arts and crafts feel to any home. With its sturdy construction, it is the picture of beauty through simplicity. Made entirely from our proprietary wood substitute. Wud!

items.name: Grand Designs Dining Table
items.description: With sleek continental styling and a tempered glass-top, this modern dining table is easy to dress up or down to suit the worthiness of your guests.

items.name: The Fermata
items.description: Our dining tables say a lot about us: who we are, where we’ve been, how we perceive the world around us. Find your place in the world with this exceptional multipurpose surface from Reclamation Homeware. The Fermata: let it define you.

items.name: Taxonomical Creation
items.description: This design was inspired by the calcified remains of an unusually giant sea sponge found deep in Paclantic Ocean.

items.name: The Enduring
items.description: One can admire The Enduring for its quiet strength. With its steady legs and long, smooth surface it is ready not only to serve you, but up to three of your friends as well. Stoic, but reliable: The Enduring.

items.name: Grand Hall Dining Table
items.description: Enjoy the good times with relatives and more on this privacy-proof dinner table! Now guests will know exactly who’s kicking them in the shin.

items.name: Outdoor Table
items.description: Have you seen this table? Those folks over there at FNA Fabrications, those folks. I’ve known them for years, they’ve always been a huge supporter of all my stuff. I put it all on their tables, it stays, solid construction. FNA Fabrications, right there, they’re awesome! They know how to do it. High quality. Believe me. Solid.

items.name: Around the Sun Table
items.description: Designed by: heyHarrie This beautifully crafted wooden dining table went missing for an entire year after it was abducted by aliens and journeyed around the solar system for a while. Eventually the aliens who abducted it decided they wanted to upgrade and gently left this table out in a field where it was discovered by llama farmers. You can't make this stuff up.

items.name: SLAB Farmhouse Table
items.description: Your family will love sitting down to a meal at this large dining table made from distressed slats reclaimed from a demolished toolshed.

items.name: Once More Around the Sun Table
items.description: Designed by: heyHarrie Slightly larger than its companion piece, this wooden dining table was crafted as a replacement for the "Around the Sun" table that was abducted by aliens. Much to everyone's surprise, the aliens returned, announced their desire for a larger dining table and made off with this one instead. Thankfully, they eventually returned it in the same fashion as the other table: dropping it in a field full of llamas.

items.name: Mega Mega Table
items.description: The true value of an antique is in how many people you can tell that you own an antique. With the mega-sized version of our Mega Table, you can gather several people around the very antique you wish to show off! When they all demand to know where you got it, don’t forget to tell them: MegaMission Furniture Warehouse!

items.name: Forbidden Footsies Dining Table
items.description: This stunning contemporary table provides ample room for your entourage. See-through glass ensures no hanky-panky, without the delightful risk of getting caught. Environment: 2

items.name: “Arrr Ye Eating That” Dining Table
items.description: Princess Cordelia had many pirate boyfriends, and her boyfriends always came with a crew. This elegant dining table fit the entire lot, until she banished them for want of manners. Environment: 2

items.name: The Cornucopia
items.description: Feast your eyes on the bountiful beauty of our Cornucopia dining table. While the dark, glossy expanse seems somber at first glance, a peek below the surface divulges finely carved legs, colorful character and a proclivity for revelry. Environment: 2

items.name: Shadow of the Moon Table
items.description: This table was granted for the New Lunar Year of the Pig, starting in February 2019.

items.name: Dreamland Nightstand
items.description: The perfect spot for a bedtime reading lamp, this darling nightstand also adds storage for flashlights and other secret treasures. Two sliding drawers open and close softly, so children won’t awaken their parents when settings traps for the tooth fairy.

items.name: Tabula Rasa Console Table
items.description: Even minimalists collect clutter. Fill it with what you will, then sweep it clean and start again.

items.name: Superior Mission Foyer Table
items.description: Celebrate the quality and beauty of handcrafted hardwood furniture. Ideal for your entryway or any narrow hall, this artisanal table is an embelm of the most discerning taste.

items.name: Alternate AR Table
items.description: The Alternate Augmented Reality table (Alt AR Table) strives to bring augmented reality to your basic reality. You may want the actual AR, but that’s decades away – so until then, try our alternate AR. Alternate AR, it’s like the real thing.

items.name: Bold Statements Console Table
items.description: Declare your modern sensibility from the moment guests enter your home. Bold, beautiful, impossible to miss, nothing screams for attention like the Bold Statements Console Table.

items.name: The Crafty Craftsman Console Table
items.description: With all the beauty and craftsmanship of traditional Mission style furniture, this attractive table features two closing drawers to help conceal the detritus of everyday modern life.

items.name: Timeless Traditions Buffet
items.description: With intriguing nicks in its weathered surface, this antique buffet murmurs of dinners past. How many meals-and secrets-has it witnessed? How many treasures locked in its two discreet drawers? Feed your fancy daily with the Timeless Traditions Buffet.

items.name: Country Charm Trinket Table
items.description: With a supple wooden surface and delicate painted legs, nothing welcomes you home quite like this hall table. Adorn it with cherished trinkets, or keep it astonishingly bare-its enduring beauty will never disappoint.

items.name: Riveting Console Table
items.description: This glass-topped console is the perfect accent to any hallway or room. So riveting that putting objects on this surface is not recommended, in fact – it won’t allow it.

items.name: All of the Things Table
items.description: Designed by: peacemaker_ic Oh, the things you can put on this table! Big things, small things, medium sized things, short things, tall things, or even no things. Gasp!

items.name: Royal Remembrance Hall Table
items.description: While quarters on the submersible were always rather cramped, Princess Cordelia remembered with fondness all the marvelously useless furniture that adorned the castle halls. This elegant console table is a wistful tribute to the flotsam of years past.

items.name: Crateable
items.description: The ultimate in improvisational country style, our Crateable end table is so masterfully relaxed, it can hardly stand up. Really. You might want to prop it with something.

items.name: Tabula Rasa End Table
items.description: Clean, simple, devoid of prior influence, this pristine end table is yours to fill as you like.

items.name: Simplicity Nightstand
items.description: Nightstands have two functions: hold up a lamp, and store stuff. This does both.

items.name: Weathered Wonder Night Table
items.description: A perfect companion to the Weathered Wonder Dresser, this two-drawer nightstand boasts the signature, hand-distressed accents of our most popular collection. But don’t let its stoic exterior fool you. Its discreet, yet cavernous, drawers have a secret faux-floor, designed to conceal the most intimate bedside essentials.

items.name: Laramidian Endtable
items.description: Who needs dinosaur toys with your very own Tyrannosaurus-Desk! (Not anatomically accurate.)

items.name: Mega End Table
items.description: Our furniture-crafting robots did such a wonderful job creating countless mission-style masterpieces that we decided to give them two weeks of vacation, which they promptly spent creating these delightful end tables. You know it’s a quality table if a robot made it in its spare time!

items.name: Embark Nightstand
items.description: Salvaged from the wreckage of the Titanic’s lesser-known sister, Ginormous, hundreds of sea-hardened trunks were transformed into our Embark nightstands collection, with glass protection added against less-historic dents.

items.name: Mission Style End Table
items.description: Return to quality with this beautiful solid wood end table, handcrafted by third-generation Amish artisans. The slatted base makes a wonderful hideout for mischievous children and timid pets.

items.name: A Cute Anglette
items.description: Perfect for a small spaces, whether it is beside a sofa or as a nightstand. Assembly not required, comes already built in its perfectly angled glory.

items.name: Audrinite Occasional Table
items.description: Cutting-edge polymers protect your clothes from moths, government intelligence, and going out of season. “Fun” size.

items.name: The Penultimate
items.description: The most noble of all the simple machines is obviously the humble surface. Simply by the nature of being flat it gives us so much, has allowed us to evolve from brutal cave clans into the magnificent society we enjoy today. Impossible to improve upon (except for The Ultimate). From Reclamation Homeware.

items.name: Riveting End Table
items.description: This glass-topped end table features hand-carved wood for texture set in rough metal framing. This table is serious.

items.name: Cornered Table
items.description: This little table is perfect to fit into the corner of any tight space. It has plenty of space for the stuff that has no where else to go.

items.name: Outdoor End Table
items.description: I’m always blocked by the other inspectors. Try and do my inspections, but it’s impossible sometimes. If I try while there is inspecting chairs, or seven loungers, well, it wasn’t working out, and I had to wait. I know it’s silly, but sometimes you just can’t do more than one thing at a time, even when you have a whole team of people. You just have to stop and wait, just do nothing.

items.name: The Vociferate
items.description: Some furniture collections claim to be “conversation” pieces. How dare they! We are not discussing banal trivia like sports or the weather. We are talking about FURNITURE, the greatest artistic expression of man! It should be celebrated, shouted from the mountaintops! The Vociferate end table is a literal exclamation point in the furniture “conversation.”

items.name: Fingertip’s Delight
items.description: You could place nearly anything on top of this dazzling end table, but why would you? Why not just admire its beauty as you run your fingertips back and forth across its strikingly smooth surface? Wow… That is one smooth table.

items.name: The Ultimate
items.description: The Ultimate is another celebration of the beauty and utility of the flat surface brought to you by Reclamation Homeware. It is superior over The Penultimate nightstand in that it has an additional drawer.

items.name: Refurbished Pirate Chest Table
items.description: As the relationship between Princess Cordelia and Captain Rodrigo De Pablo got serious, the princess tried to incorporate his things into her submarine-home’s décor. Most of his belongings were destroyed in The Battle of Cape Blunderbuss, so she took his only remaining possession, a pirate chest, and refurbished it into this table. That’s love.

items.name: Naught-ical Nightstand
items.description: Keeping secrets isn’t easy at sea, but Princess Cordelia loved a challenge! She fashioned this innocent-looking nightstand to conceal her naughtiest secrets, as well as several beautiful unmentionable trifles. (Despite that quality they were actually mentioned by her pirate boyfriends quite often.)

items.name: Kiddie Shelf
items.description: A deep wall shelf perfect for displaying your little one’s belongings—and keeping them off the floor.

items.name: The Immaculate
items.description: Think of the trillions and trillions of atoms that made up the cells that made up the animals and plants that evolved on our ever-spinning world into newer and greater realizations of themselves over billions and billions of years. And all of it has led to you buying this shelf. The Immaculate.

items.name: The Jokoh Flats
items.description: Sporting a distinctive multifold design for superior weight distribution, the Jokoh range of storage surfaces come in a large range of colors that promise to fit the most esoteric of interior spaces without breaking the bank.

items.name: Capped Wall Plank
items.description: A simple storage shelf with a twist: the end is capped with a built-in semicircular bookend to keep your tchotchkes from accidentally sliding off.

items.name: Reclaimed Plank Shelf
items.description: An unfinished plank makes for a no-frills landing spot for your baubles.

items.name: Mega Shelf
items.description: For extra durability, our antique Mega Shelf is made with Oke, our proprietary oak substitute. It’s twice as strong as oak, and only five times as heavy. Carefully install a Mega Shelf in your home today. Goes great with Mega Globe and Mega Couple Of Books!

items.name: Houndstopper Wallpiece
items.description: Extraterrestrials chasing you through the house? Flatten their wheels with this discreet kneecapper! Keep a glass of our proprietary Alienz-Be-Gone in the compartment for extra punch!

items.name: Athlete’s Trophy Case
items.description: Every athlete gets trophies – that bowling league trophy you got when you were 8 or that second place hopscotch medal. Maybe try to earn something a little more grown up, ok? Unlocked at level 2 of the Athlete career

items.name: Childhood Wonder
items.description: A shelf that can be almost anything is perfect for children that love to change their room often and have large imaginations. Unicorns, Dinosaurs, Clouds, or Cars; it’s up to them to decide what’s best.

items.name: Rustic Wall Shelf
items.description: Use this sturdy wall shelf with scroll detailing to house all your most precious tchotchkes.

items.name: Underrated Underwater Shelf
items.description: Shelves are the most underrated item in any house or submarine. We use them to hold up our most prized possessions! Princess Cordelia, living on her submarine, knew this all too well. She and her furniture artisans crafted this shelf and applied a tacky adhesive that kept items in place during sudden changes in depth.

items.name: Lacquered Up Console
items.description: Sleek, glossy finishes tell the world that you’re modern and sophisticated. But secretly, you can be a sloppy mess—you just clean up well.

items.name: Knowledge Console by Kindermade
items.description: The Knowledge Console by Kindermade is a great place for kids to write, study, and prepare themselves for a future of working at a station very similar to this one for hours and hours every day.

items.name: Mega Desk
items.description: A desk shouldn’t be a glorified shelf covered with junk. It should be a workstation! With its simple lines and sturdy construction, this antique desk truly inspires hard work. Why, you’ll work just as hard on it as our assembly line of robot arms worked building it!

items.name: Anglette Desk
items.description: For all things and things not always in an angle. The Anglette Desk is trendy perfect for writing, crafts, or passing the time. Comes complete with some storage space for your valuables, or any items deemed to be soon be forgotten.

items.name: T1-Fighter Desk
items.description: Who wouldn’t want jet engines for deskdrawers? Rev your day up with this stylish furniture!

items.name: The Recognizer
items.description: Garbage in, garbage out? HA! Maybe in the 80’s. Today, “garbage in” is the first step towards creating masterful works of furniture art that inspire and connect us all. The Recognizer desk is one such achievement from Reclamation Homeware, bringing you the finest contemporary furniture built from pressed trash. Garbage in, vision out! Environment: 2

items.name: Mission Control
items.description: Loaded with bright buttons and twinkling lights, this space program console will display all relevant project data from liftoff to landing. T minus ten seconds and counting… Confident Décor: 4 Unlocked at level 6 of the Astronaut career

items.name: Inspiration Desk
items.description: Lose yourself in Inspiration. With a smooth, expansive surface, firm curves and unflinchingly solid construction, the Inspiration Desk invites you to pour body and soul into its embrace. Get swept away on wild imaginings, pen romantic poems or simply notes to self, and hide countless secrets. Environment: 2

items.name: Reconnaissance Workstation
items.description: Good-guy technology that’s as much fun as bad-guy gadgets, featuring many urgent flashing lights and switches for use in battling the most dedicated supervillains. Environment: 5 Unlocked at level 3 of the Secret Agent career

items.name: Drafting Desk
items.description: Remember what they say: “From a messy desk comes the most creative work.” Yes “they” are manufacturers of messy desks, but doesn’t it just sound true? Environment: 2

items.name: Antique Writer’s Desk
items.description: Once owned by legendary scribe H. Reginald Fairechilde, author of the sminal novel “The Pruning of Memories Future.” Legend holds that this desk was his inspiration… Inspiring Décor: 5 Unlocked at level 7 of the Writer career (Journalist branch)

items.name: All-Purpose Desk
items.description: Whether working on her log books, writing a great sea adventure, designing some new furniture, or writing in her diary about how dreamy her pirate boyfriend was, Princess Cordelia used a desk identical to this one regularly. A great marble slab kept her pen flowing smoothly. And if you don’t use a pen, like most modern day humans, it is a great place to put your computer. Environment: 3

items.name: Executron Executive Desk
items.description: As an executive, you need a weighty desk. A desk that lends you an air of authority. That’s why our Executron Executive Desk is made from a single slab of depleted uranium, carved and painted to look like rare and endangered tropical woods. Confident Décor: 8 Unlocked at level 10 of the Business career (both branches)

items.name: BlandCo Contemporary Counter
items.description: A modern kitchen cabinet constructed from the finest veneered particleboard, topped with the finest laminate money can buy.

items.name: BlandCo Contemporary Counter Island
items.description: Save money and hassle! Handle-free doors can help prevent food theft by dumb robbers and/or hungry teenagers. *Results may vary.

items.name: Corporate Chic Counter Island
items.description: Addicted to your job? Can’t leave work at the office? Furnish your kitchen with stuff that looks like it belongs in the workplace! Environment: 2 Unlocked at level 5 of the Culinary career

items.name: Corporate Chic Countertop
items.description: For those who like to work hard, play hard, and cook hard. This counter is for sharp knives and cutting-edge food for those who deserve it. Environment: 2 Unlocked at level 2 of the Culinary career

items.name: The Harbinger Counter
items.description: Come. Set down your things. Shhh! Put them away. Unburden yourself. Trust that what you’ve been carrying will be held. The Harbinger is not just an extension of a kitchen counter. It’s an extension of the human condition.

items.name: The Harbinger Island
items.description: Nothing exists in isolation, but only in relationship to everything. Is this a shelf? A cabinet? A counter? Can it not be a shelf-net-er? At Reclamation Homeware, we believe in unity and releasing the concept of “the other.” (Keep an eye out for our fall collection’s new fridge-ster-wave.)

items.name: S. Cargeaux Counter
items.description: A counter so elegant, so wildly upscale, it makes even a meal of humble hot dogs and canned soup taste almost inspired.

items.name: S. Cargeaux Counter Island
items.description: Classy folks know that fancy décor is all about patterns. This elegant tile design says, “I only serve my casseroles on fine brand-name paper plates.”

items.name: VAULT Modular Island
items.description: Blessed with the same good looks as its namesake, this island provides extra prep space as well as space for dining in a pinch.

items.name: VAULT Modular Counter
items.description: Brushed metal and grating doll up the framing and drawers of these modular cabinets with a durable butcher block top.

items.name: Tall Order Vintage Counter
items.description: When you prepare meals on this shining, sanitary countertop, your family will know just how hard you work for them. Earn their love and respect. Environment: 2

items.name: Tall Order Vintage Counter Island
items.description: Yessirree, that’s one fine piece of craftsmanship right there. 90-degree angles, flat surfaces, and everything. They just don’t make ‘em like this anymore!

items.name: BlandCo Contemporary Cabinet
items.description: Give your kitchen an edge with this sleek modular cabinet. With just enough room for your basic essentials, this compact unit is ideal for kitchenettes and intimate modern spaces. Low in height, shallow in depth, with no exterior handles whatsoever, the BlandCo Contemporary Cabinet is functional design at its purest. Environment: 1

items.name: VAULT Wall Cabinets
items.description: These modular cabinets deck your walls in industrial good looks, utility with distressed wood finishes, and raw metal trim and framing. Environment: 1

items.name: S. Cargeaux Counter Cabinet
items.description: Keep your clutter on the down low, concealed between stately paneled cabinet doors. Such style, such luxury.

items.name: The Harbinger Cabinet
items.description: Clutter is the albatross around the neck of your soul. Yet, the Harbinger cabinet allows you to walk the clear path, unencumbered. Stylish and sleek, it is the perfect fashionable possession to hold all your other fashionable possessions, making it seem, to the mind of the soul, as if you only have one fashionable possession. Sweet freedom!

items.name: Tall Order Vintage Cabinet
items.description: Modern convenience meets vintage style in this kitchen cabinet set that’s as tall on class as it is in height. Designed to impersonate an all-wood cabinet, this remarkable piece is constructed of rehabilitated recycled particle board and contains three interior shelves for maximum storage.

items.name: Roman Pedestal
items.description: Put your love on a pedestal. Or your dog, or your boss… That’s the nice thing about this pedestal. You decide what goes on it.

items.name: Vidame Hostess Station
items.description: More than a mere sideboard, this lovely hostess station is rendered in luxury hardwood so as to impress and slightly shame your guests. Environment: 2

items.name: Upside Down Gnome Décor
items.description: I think if gnomes were real, and the intention was to create the greatest amount of discomfort for them within their “I hang out in a garden” career path, placing them eternally on their head in service of the tray on their feet definitely falls within the top twenty. But not number one.

items.name: Bob the Butler Fancy Sculpture
items.description: Princess Cordelia once lived in a giant palace. After moving to a submarine of only forty-eight rooms, she no longer needed her full wait staff. She knew her butler wouldn’t be happy with so little to manage so she let him go. With a tear in her eye, she made this sculpture to remember him by. Environment: 8

items.name: The Patrician
items.description: Other sinks may facilitate a splash of water on your tired, morning face. The Patrician is NOT other sinks. Experience a profound awakening, at all hours of the day, even when the taps are not running. Majestic marble-like surface forged from crushed milk cartons and melted gray crayons. Hygiene: 3 Water Consumption Rating: 3 Reliability: 3 Functional Off-the-Grid

items.name: Ovum Bath Sink
items.description: Sacred geometry suggests the oval is the most harmonious of shapes; bring your bathroom into cosmic alignment with this simple but effective counter sink. Needs to be placed on counter Hygiene: 3 Water Consumption Rating: 3 Reliability: 3

items.name: Pure Simplicity Sink
items.description: Set new standards with the Pure Simplicity Sink. Effortlessly elegant to look at, Pure Simplicity’s true secrets emerge when you give the graceful handle a pull. Offering just the right balance of volume and flow, this remarkable faucet will keep even the vilest visitors coming back for more. Needs to be placed on counter Hygiene: 3 Water Consumption Rating: 3 Reliability: 3

items.name: Brut Pedestal Sink
items.description: There is nothing dainty about this striking pedestal sink, which is well-suited for modern and slightly intimidating bathrooms. Hygiene: 3 Water Consumption Rating: 3 Reliability: 3

items.name: The Divine
items.description: The Divine by Reclamation Homeware: a sink for those who know that cleanliness is next to godliness. Needs to be placed on counter Hygiene: 3 Water Consumption Rating: 3 Reliability: 3

items.name: Wunda Kitchen Sink
items.description: Forget the cliches. With this stylish modern sink, your kitchen now has everything. Needs to be placed on counter Hygiene: 4 Water Consumption Rating: 3 Reliability: 3

items.name: Sensa Counter Sink
items.description: An aggressively modern counter sink heavy with plumbing authority. Needs to be placed on counter Hygiene: 4 Water Consumption Rating: 3 Reliability: 5

items.name: The Amaranth
items.description: Rarely do we feel as inspired as when we are creating a conduit for the Earth’s eternal lifegiver, water. Every aspect of this work of art is designed to flow as fluidly as water flows through our very bodies. You will never see a finer sink. Smells slightly of wet garbage. Hygiene: 4 Water Consumption Rating: 4 Reliability: 5

items.name: RAW Industrial Sink
items.description: You may almost enjoy washing dishes in this oversized sink with extended drain. Needs to be placed on counter Hygiene: 4 Water Consumption Rating: 4 Reliability: 5

items.name: RAW Pedestal Sink
items.description: Stay clean with PostRustic’s rough-hewn wood and raw metal pedestal sink. Perfect for smaller bathrooms. Hygiene: 4 Water Consumption Rating: 4 Reliability: 5

items.name: Last Resort Sink
items.description: Princess Cordelia had a dream that if she built a beautiful, state of the art sink like this one, perhaps her stinky pirate boyfriend would use it. Then she tried installing emergency cologne stations throughout her submarine’s hallways. Then she dumped him. Needs to be placed on counter Hygiene: 4 Water Consumption Rating: 4 Reliability: 5

items.name: Bureau Sink
items.description: Installed with anti-coagulant spray and fresh handtowels. For those times when evidence needs scrubbing. Hygiene: 5 Water Consumption Rating: 4 Reliability: 5

items.name: Cru Cabinet Sink
items.description: Warm wooden tones, antiqued metal fixtures and eggshell cracks in the porcelain basin evoke a simpler but still pricey time. Hygiene: 5 Water Consumption Rating: 5 Reliability: 8 Functional Off-the-Grid

items.name: Umber Kitchen Sink
items.description: Can a kitchen sink be warm and welcoming? This model combines homey charm and high performance in one bold package. Needs to be placed on counter Hygiene: 5 Water Consumption Rating: 3 Reliability: 3 Inspiring Décor: 2 Unlocked at level 4 of the Culinary career

items.name: Poulton Footed Sink Vanity
items.description: Sprightly cabriole legs place your elegant basin sink at precisely the right height for maximal hygienic effectiveness. Hygiene: 6 Water Consumption Rating: 9 Reliability: 8

items.name: Practice Potty
items.description: The transition from diapers to toilets need not be a stress-filled affair. The Practice Potty will help your little one improve their potty skills. It’s comfortable and comes in a variety of colors. And, most importantly, it is made of easy to clean antibacterial plastic! +Potty Skill

items.name: Monster Potty Partner
items.description: For those toddlers that need a friendly face when they learn how to go potty… This little monster shouldn’t be too scary, and will hopefully be one of their new best friends. +Potty Skill

items.name: Refined Potty Chair
