items.description: High class toddlers need the finest of potty chairs. They will not settle for anything less than this chair. Only plebeians use other potty chairs. +Potty Skill

items.name: The Ambassador
items.description: Elegant yet egalitarian. The Ambassador is there to support us all in our most vulnerable moments. It is in these moments that we find who we truly are, and return to the world stronger and wiser for our experiences. Consummate support, faultless comfort, zero judgment. The Ambassador. Bladder: 10 Water Consumption Rating: 4 Reliability: 3 Uncomfortable Functional Off-the-Grid

Bladder: 10 Comfort: 4 Water Consumption Rating: 4 Reliability: 8 Functional Off-the-Grid

Bladder: 10 Comfort: 5 Water Consumption Rating: 4 Reliability: 3 Uncomfortable

Claim your own ritual with Reclamation Homeware’s ultimate body, mind, and spirit cleansing station. The Epicure. Hygiene: 6 Stress Relief: 5 Discomfort Relief: 5 Water Consumption Rating: 4 Reliability: 8

items.name: Princess Cordelia’s Bathtub
items.description: The porcelain for this bathtub was heated by a fire-breathing kraken that regularly attacked Princess Cordelia’s submarine! When it attacked, the fire was channeled through a series of ducts before reaching the Eppsilon’s onboard kiln. How many other furniture companies can make this claim? Three or four, tops? Hygiene: 7 Stress Relief: 6 Discomfort Relief: 6 Water Consumption Rating: 5 Unbreakable

items.name: Triteia Luxury Corner Bath with Jets

The fans from all these years. Happy Twenty, Simmers of the land! Hygiene: 3 Fun: 3 Power Consumption Rating: 5 Water Consumption Rating: 4

items.name: Jet Set Luxury Bath
items.description: An extra-deep bathtub fitted with spa-quality water jets to soothe tired muscles and rejuvenate the spirit. Hygiene: 10 Fun: 5 Stress Relief: 10 Discomfort Relief: 10 Water Consumption Rating: 10 Unbreakable

items.name: The Chessmaster
items.description: Nothing shows off your mind for strategy like the Chessmaster indoor/outdoor chess table. Complete with hand-carved, dramatically styled stone pieces, this 27” table shows you’re up for a challenge anytime, from anyone. Store the pieces in the concealed drawer if you’d rather just drink your coffee. Fun: 5 +Logic Skill

items.name: Chess under the Stars Patio Table
items.description: Fresh air is the secret to ferocious focus, so we made it easy to take your chess game outside. Come sit under the stars, play with your kings and knights, and dream of the battles you’ll win time and again. Fun: 5 +Logic Skill

items.name: Grand Plans Chess Table
items.description: This elegant, hand-carved pedestal table features an inset stone playing surface, complete with matching chess pieces. Locate some chairs and a worthy opponent, and enjoy hour after hour of intellectual play. Or, just leave it about and look smarter. Fun: 5 Environment: 3 +Logic Skill

items.name: Backyard Observatory
items.description: Experience the wonder of the universe in your own backyard! This full-size observatory comes complete with your very own high-powered telescope, for optimal stargazing and discreet alien watching. Fun: 2 Power Consumption Rating: 6 Reliability: 3 +Logic Skill

items.name: Life Under a Microscope
items.description: Ever feel like you were a specimen in a lab, with everyone staring and analyzing and dissecting and judging? Well, now you can study the effects of such behavior more comfortably, from the other side of the lens. Fun: 2 Power Consumption Rating: 2 +Logic Skill

items.name: Steampunk Flyamajig
items.description: Artfully weathered bronze panels and whizz-bang gaslights conceal a sleek modern rocketship with the most up-to-date technology on the inside. It’s only what’s on the outside that counts, right? Fun: 9 +Rocket Science Skill

items.name: Apollo Rocketship
items.description: Machine-crafted from carbon-fiber sheathing forged from minerals found in spaces geodes, this space vehicle promises the smoothest, most luxurious ride to interplanetary adventure. Fun: 10 +Rocket Science Skill Unlocked at level 10 of the Astronaut career (Space Ranger branch)

items.name: Retro Rocketship
items.description: During the war, rockets were made by hand, and kids rocketed to school both ways uphill! In snow! Let this museum-quality relic be a reminder of just how easy you astronauts have it today. Fun: 10 +Rocket Science Skill Unlocked at level 10 of the Astronaut career (Interstellar Smuggler branch)

items.name: Barely Better Digital Camera
items.description: Due to its cheap price, this camera is often purchased as a gift for fledgling photographers; however, with picture quality only a smidge better than what a standard smartphone is equipped with, this camera generally ends up as a paperweight. Mostly bought by out of touch family members who are too cheap to go for even middle of the line stuff. Functional Off-the-Grid

items.name: Bonsai Tree
items.description: A small perennial shrub, grown in decorative pots, that produces a thick foliage to be pruned into intricate designs and shapes. Fun: 2 +Gardening Skill

items.name: The Royal We Microphone
items.description: Conquer the comedy circuit behind the Queen’s special microphone. Let’s play the crowd and get some laughs! Fun: 4 +Comedy Skill

items.name: E.A.S.L. Easel

items.name: Stringvarius Violin

items.name: Pied Piper Acoustic Guitar
items.description: Up your cool factor by learning to play guitar! A truly social instrument, guitars such as these have been known to attract small crowds of admirers, wherever they’re played. Fun: 3 +Guitar Skill

items.name: Appreciably Average Digital Camera
items.description: Does your baby or dog pose so adorably that you simply must capture every single moment? Is your phone so overloaded with baby and dog pics that you don’t have space for apps? Pick up the Appreciably Average Digital Camera and free yourself to take as many pictures of your baby riding your dog like a cowboy as you could possibly want! Functional Off-the-Grid

items.name: Woodworking Table
items.description: Whether you actually fix things or just like to think you do, no Sim should go without a respectable workbench. Carpentry Quality: 4 +Handiness Skill

items.name: Digitalistic Sketchpad
items.description: The latest in hand-held electronic Easel technology allows you to take your creativity anywhere, printing hi-rez imagery without the having to stand for messy canvas creation on rickety wooden antiquities. Painting Quality: 4 +Painting Skill Functional Off-the-Grid

items.name: Easy-Breezy Easel
items.description: This feather-light easel is a cinch to carry. On breezy days, simply stand back and let the wind do the lifting for you. Painting Quality: 5 +Painting Skill Unlocked at level 4 of the Painter career

items.name: Freezer Bunny Blues Guitar

items.name: Pre-Owned Painter’s Easel

Capturing over a gajillion pixels per photo, viewers will be able to see every tiny detail of every photo taken. Just don’t expect to take many photos. That kind of quality comes with a price, and the price is that this camera can only hold 10 pictures at a time. Functional Off-the-Grid

items.name: Deluxe All-Season Easel
items.description: This deluxe painter’s easel not only has a telescoping height and ample support for one’s art, it goes with you when you want to paint your favorite field, over and over all year. Painting Quality: 8 +Painting Skill Unlocked at level 8 of the Painter career (Master of the Real branch)

items.name: Rock Legend Signed Guitar
items.description: Autographed by rock legend, Dusty Starlight, this resonant beauty looks awesome, sounds awesome, and makes you even more awesome! Fun: 3 Inspiring Décor: 6 +Guitar Skill Unlocked at level 10 of the Entertainer career (Music branch)

items.name: Classical Genius Antique Piano
items.description: Go down in musical history with a piano as exquisite as you are. This elegant antique has been fully refurbished and re-gilt, so if your talent doesn’t sparkle, at least your piano can. Fun: 3 Inspiring Décor: 6 +Piano Skill Unlocked at level 7 of the Entertainer career (Music branch)

items.name: The Virtuoso Violin
items.description: This antique violin was meticulously crafted by a ghost from a legendary artisan family. Its tone could make a stone wall cry. Fun: 3 Environment: 8 +Violin Skill

items.name: VAULT Pro-Level Bar
items.description: There’s no better place to indulge your whim to create a bleeding-edge mixed drink for guests than behind the VAULT. Drink Quality: 4 +Mixology Skill

items.name: The Sloop
items.description: Sure, this bar is only average looking, but the drinks you’ll mix here are way beyond average. In fact, the Sloop was crafted by pro surfer and master mixologist Don B. Dumm, for minimum strain and maximum inspiration. Drink Quality: 4 +Mixology Skill

items.name: The Money Maker
items.description: Now everyone can shake their money maker! This white solid-surface bar offers just enough room for you to shake up drinks… while your guests strut their stuff on its high, shiny surface. Black-soled shoes not recommended. Drink Quality: 4 +Mixology Skill

By the time you’ve fully taken in the fine craftsmanship and unparalleled beauty of the Indulgence, you’re practically dazed with admiration. Drink Quality: 4 +Mixology Skill

items.name: The Long Island

items.name: Bless Me Barrrnacles Bar
items.description: Princess Cordelia’s pirate boyfriends all had a weakness for root beer, until the princess introduced them to something better. Soon enough, they all had a weakness for lemonade instead-four kinds of it-which was much better for their scurvy. They often kept upright by bracing their legs (or pegs) on the handy brass foot rail below. Drink Quality: 6 +Mixology Skill

items.name: Flaming Tiki Bar
items.description: What better place to serve fancy flaming drinks than your very own Flaming Tiki Bar? Someone call the fire department… This party’s going to be HOT! Drink Quality: 7 +Mixology Skill

Drink Quality: 9 Inspiring Décor: 5 +Mixology Skill Unlocked at level 10 of the Culinary career (Mixologist branch)

items.name: Punching Bag
items.description: A heavy, sand-filled bag, on a floor-mounted pedestal, designed to withstand repeated and forceful abuse from punches. +Fitness Skill

items.description: Bring your gym routine home with this affordable if rackety exercise machine. Environment: 2 +Fitness Skill

items.name: Fisticuffs Punching Bag
items.description: Keep your punches and roundhouse kicks in fighting shape with this old-school leather punching bag. Filled with gravel and broken glass for extra knuckle callusation. Playful Décor: 4 +Fitness Skill Unlocked at level 10 of the Criminal career (Boss branch)

items.name: BodyCrunch Pro Home Gym System
items.description: Tone your abs, glutes, quads, pecs and lats too with this complete home gym system featuring sweat-resistant surfaces, reinforced bars and cables and adjustable everything. Environment: 2 +Fitness Skill

items.name: The Rack
items.description: Meet the ultimate workout machine for your lats, quads, glutes, and abs. Invented by Dr. Loomen Paine after his career in interrogation, the Rack is effective for both toning muscles and eliciting false confessions. Environment: 4 +Fitness Skill

items.name: ZenXercise Treadmill
items.description: When is less more? Most of the time! But especially on a treadmill, when the equipment around you only gets in the way of visualizing a perfect jog. Get less, and get more with ZenXercise! Power Consumption Rating: 7 Environment: 3 +Fitness Skill Unlocked at level 9 of the Athlete career (Professional Athlete branch)

items.name: Zero-G Training Bag
items.description: Work out aggression and stress! Condition biceps! Keep fit for interstellar smuggling by delivering a few well-placed thumps into the side of this bag, which never fights back. Confident Décor: 6 +Fitness Skill Unlocked at level 9 of the Astronaut career (Interstellar Smuggler branch)

items.name: Growfruit Challenge Garden Pot
items.description: A celebratory soil container acquired by completing the Growfruit Challenge. Plants will thrive in this green growfruit paradise. Unlocked by completing the Growfruit Challenge

items.description: A basic packet of garden flowers.

items.name: Starter Fruits
items.description: A basic packet of garden fruit.

items.name: Starter Herbs
items.description: A basic packet of garden herbs.

items.name: Starter Vegetables
items.description: A basic packet of garden vegetables.

items.name: Farmer Veggies and Herbs
items.description: A deluxe package of vegetables and herbs. Unlocked at level 7 of the Gardening Skill

items.name: Garden Planter Box
items.description: An elevated container of enriched soil that improves the outdoor growth of up to four small garden plants, or one tree. +Gardening Skill

items.description: Bored of Common plants, well now you can purchase Uncommon Seeds at the push of a button. Unlocked at level 7 of the Gardening Skill

items.name: Perfect Growfruit Challenge Garden Pot
items.description: A celebratory soil container acquired by completing the Perfect Growfruit Challenge. Plants will flourish in this shiny growfruit house. Unlocked by completing the Perfect Growfruit Challenge

items.description: Now that you are a top gardener, you can get rare plant seed from purchasing this seed packet. Unlocked at level 10 of the Gardening Skill

items.name: Blushing Beauty Wedding Arch
items.description: Add extra cheer to your special day with this rustic wooden wedding arch. Entwined in fragrant, blushing lilies, its delicate beauty celebrates yours.

items.name: Daddy’s Girl Formal Wedding Arch
items.description: You can’t put a pricetag on love like yours, so why pinch pennies celebrating it? This exquisite latticework arch comes wrapped with ribbons and white gardenias, announcing not only your groom’s true love but the size of Daddy’s paycheck. Environment: 2

items.name: Look at Me Monkey Bars
items.description: How do Sim children stay so strong and healthy? Why, on Look at Me Monkey Bars, the leading brand in Sim playground equipment! This set is impossible to resist, transforming your little couch potato into a fit little monkey. Fun: 7 +Motor Skill

items.name: Redbeard’s Revenge Pirate Ship Jungle Gym
items.description: Set sail for fun! With the Redbeard’s Revenge, you’ll watch your kids float away on the endless oceans of their imagination, maybe even to the exotic, far away land where Kindermade furniture is built! This pirate ship jungle gym makes any backyarrrrrrrd a high seas adventure. Fun: 8

items.name: Starcruiser X Jungle Gym
items.description: Explore the far, unknown reaches of the galaxy on the Kindermade Starcruiser X Jungle Gym! Discover new worlds, encounter new alien life forms, and when communication efforts break down you can blast them with your laser cannon! Pew pew! Fun: 10

items.name: The Gumber Fesh Bow
items.description: Gelatinous Treats Ltd., was provided a thousand fresh water Gummie Guppys, and asked to created a special home for these newly discovered fish. They made several requests for additional fish samples… until finally delivering this finished product. While many agree that it is a masterful creation, they can’t help but question the name.

items.name: The Boneyard
items.description: The Boneyard is not for the faint of fin. Swim your Rainbow Trout up another stream. Don’t sting your Clownfish in here. And take that Sunfish to warmer waters. Don’t mess with the Boneyard, or you’ll find yourself boneless.

items.name: Fit4Fish Crystal Fish Bowl
items.description: Classic round glass fishbowl allows your piscine friends a 360-degree view of their surroundings.

items.name: Got Game Table
items.description: Whether your favorite mental sport is poker, Old Maid, or chess, get your game on anytime with this table at the ready. Fun: 5

items.name: Future Cube by Paltry Predictions, Inc.
items.description: Don’t make an important decision until you’ve consulted the Future Cube. This handy fortune teller will keep you on the right track with helpful answers. Please read fine print before use.

items.name: Trending Style-board
items.description: A unique tool of trade for Style-Influencers that captures gathered Impressions from a Sim in that career, tracking the evolution of their aesthetic tastes to unlock a variety of custom looks. Unlocked at level 1 of the Style Influencer career

items.name: Sugar Skull Display Case
items.description: When each spot in this case contains a unique sugar skull, the ability to “Honor the Dead” will unlock. This interaction causes colorful smoke to spill forth, and your Sim will commune with their inner Catrina to allow for enhanced interactions with the Grim Reaper.

items.name: Box of Kindness
items.description: A box filled with rewards! As you complete milestones in the Positivity Challenge aspiration, you can collect rewards from this box. Or search within, and see what hidden gems you may discover. Given for starting the Positivity Challenge

items.name: The MotionMonitor Gaming Mat
items.description: The ultimate full-body gaming experience is at your fingertips. And toetips. And kneecaps. And elbows. And hips. And don’t forget to put your shoulders into it! Fun: 10 Power Consumption Rating: 2 Reliability: 8

items.name: PrioPerfection Motion Sensor Game Mat
items.description: Step into the arena and get your moves on; this is the motion-capture gaming experience you’ve been waiting for. Fun: 10 Power Consumption Rating: 9 Unbreakable Unlocked at level 10 of the Tech Guru career (eSport Gamer branch)

items.name: Mega Houseplant Pot
items.description: The value of antiques resides in their history. Who loved this pot? What great storm created its rusty patina? That’s why, after exposing the Mega Houseplant Pot to a chemical wash and ultra-violet ray flash, our robots print an official Mega Houseplant history, randomly generated so each legend is unique. Yet each pot is exactly the same!

items.name: Mega Flower Pot
items.description: Why shop for antiques at estate sales or the main streets of upper class vacation towns? Simply walk through our hermetically sealed front doors, into our dust-free warehouse, filled with hard-working robots – and there’s that aged-looking flowerpot you always wanted, under the florescent lights. Isn’t it quaint?

items.name: The Manifest
items.description: When we set out to create the Manifest, we knew it was about so much more than just designing a potted plant set. It was about shifting hearts and exploding patterns. It was about healing world hunger and ending war in this lifetime. We think you’ll agree the results surpassed our wildest dreams.

items.name: The Authority
items.description: New, from Reclamation Homeware, it’s a cute little potted plant. What? Sometimes you just need a nice plant in your house. Not everything has to be a journey into man’s existence you know.

items.name: Carefree Succulent
items.description: Needs no fertilizer, no light, no special care. Water once per month, and this sturdy, juicy succulent will provide years of deceptively low-maintenance greenery.

items.name: Tabletop Potted Plant
items.description: A compact houseplant for enlivening small spaces with a touch of green.

items.name: Lucky Citrus Tree of the Moon
items.description: This plant was granted for the New Lunar Year of the Pig, starting in February 2019.

items.name: Plant Potted Floor
items.description: Potted plants, penned animals, planet bound terrestrials… it’s all just one big cage. I feel for you little potted plant, it’s you and me to the end.

items.name: Feng Shui Planter
items.description: Energize an office or living area with a fresh, jazzy spray of greenery. Place in a southwesterly corner of the room for ultimate energy flow.

items.name: Mega Fern
items.description: Our Mega Fern is constructed out of a space-age polymer that is so life-like, you literally cannot tell it from the real thing. Neglected, it will even break down and die at the exact same rate as living organic material! Now that’s progress!

items.name: Terra Cotta Potted Plant
items.description: Add foliage without fuss. This wonderfully tall houseplant comes in a simple, low clay pot, so you can focus on the greenery and not the greenery holder.

items.name: Cities In Dust Potted Faux Plant
items.description: Devastating volcanic activity, giant meteorites pounding our planet, exploding suns… however the end comes, keep it happy with a pot of flowers! Flowers make people happy!

items.name: Potted Youch
items.description: Not recommended for houses with small children, cats, or people with bad balance.

items.name: Windowbox of Superiority
items.description: A stately, traditional home deserves windows festooned with stately, traditional strands of climbing ivy.

items.name: Snake Plant
items.description: Slick tendrils slither toward the ceiling, entwined in a mesmerizing tangle. Guaranteed to add a dose of sinister weirdness to any room.

items.name: Retired Mangrove Palms
items.description: These palms were born and raised in a sheltered mangrove off the sea. Their days were spent among the fishes and animals, an active participant in the complex ecosystem of their home. From time to time, the palms dabbled in their favorite hobby; warding off hurricanes from the island’s shores. It was a good life, but as time passed, the palms grew tired and yearned for a quiet retirement. After selecting a trendy pot, they packed up and resettled in a new home—less densely-populated and complete

items.name: Flowers from Your Not-So-Secret Admirer
items.description: Designed by: heyHarrie Have you ever gotten flowers you thought were from a secret admirer only to find out they were from your parents, Great Aunt, barista, or maybe a sentinent neighborhood squirrel? Womp womp. Sorry to say these flowers are not from a secret admirer...they're from us: your not-so-secret admirer! We think you're pretty great. (We are also not a sentient squirrel. Promise...)

items.name: Leafy Greens
items.description: For the ultimate locavore. Grow a replica of your favorite salad right on your countertop. Warning: Toxic if ingested.

items.name: High Hopes Potted Plant
items.description: Too big for an ant, maybe, but just right for your home, don’t you think?

items.name: Grande Vase
items.description: This stately ceramic vase takes command of any indoor or outdoor space, as well as anyone in it. Don’t be concerned by its haughty nature. It secretly covets attention, and the occasional furtive embrace.

items.name: Frank the Friendly Ficus
items.description: Welcome visitors to your home with an unassuming houseplant that says, “Howdy folks, I am capable of keeping living things alive!”

items.name: Mega Table Vase
items.description: If robots could cry, ours would have been moved to tears in the design process of this charming, vintage-esque flower vase. Instead, they just overheated slightly, and then returned to optimum working conditions.

items.name: Little Buddy Bud Vase
items.description: This vase is great for a baby’s room. Delicate tulips not included.

items.name: Fine Feathered Fern
items.description: This verdant fern adds a splash of life and color to any room. Also great for hide n’ seek with children and petite adults.

items.name: Teeny Planter
items.description: Be reminded that plant life can sprout from even the most improbable nooks and crannies with this festive, fertile terracotta urn.

items.name: Neighborly Windowbox
items.description: An unassuming array of flowers perfect for conducting neighborly conversations about the weather, the new garbageman, and whose toolshed is not up to HOA code.

items.name: Regal Planter
items.description: Line your walk with living sculptures! This solid stone planter and hedge is a truly tasteful addition, an artful collaboration between Nature and shears.

items.name: Orchid You Not Pot
items.description: Designed for the delicate, leggy beauty of such fleurs as orchids, forget-me-nots and the rare hybrid orchid-you-nots, this hand-painted planter is the perfect complement to any indoor or outdoor space. With petite handles, sturdy curves and a full upper, its demi-glazed allure is undeniable.

items.name: Bucket o’ Sunshine
items.description: This cheery pail of Perma-blossom sunflowers will hearten any space, any time of year. Handcrafted from antique tin and rusted to perfection, this pretty pail and flower set evokes the charm and romance of a forgotten farm, reclaimed by nature and preserved just for you.

items.name: Mega Vase
items.description: We’ve instructed the robots at the MegaMission Furniture Warehouse to construct hundreds of different objects, but this is one they actually came up with on their own! Made with our proprietary synth-plant polymer.

items.name: A Single Rose
items.description: A single rose nestled snugly in a slender bug vase to beautify the room. Environment: 2 Unlocked by completing Date Event at Silver Level

items.name: Statement Planter
items.description: This hefty cement planter makes a statement-hence, its name. Perfect for lining a patio or defining a porch.

items.name: Lovely Lily Pot
items.description: Tickle all five senses with our Lovely Lily Pot. Breathe the flowers’ sweet aroma, ogle their long and delicate stamen, run a finger along soft, smooth petals and touch the pollen to your tongue. Listen closely, and you may hear secrets whispering through its branches. Or is that just the pitter-patter of your poor heart?

items.name: Vase of Sunflowers
items.description: A rustic vase of sunflowers adds a painterly touch to any room. Environment: 2 Unlocked at level 6 of the Painter career

items.name: Florist’s Dream Potted Lily
items.description: Embrace the romance of a garden gone wild. This weathered tin watering can is overflowing with lilies, as if they couldn’t resist taking root! Environment: 1

items.name: Caress Wheel Barrench
items.description: Your life should be filled with flowers—fields and meadows of them, towering golden sunflowers and vibrant, lovely lavender. But when you simply can’t get away, you can roll the beauty of the countryside right up onto your porch with the Caress Wheel Barrench. Friendly, earthy and functional, this handcart-turned-plant bench is the perfect resting spot for captive flowers and runaway souls. Environment: 2

items.name: Potted Palm
items.description: Go coconuts for this potted palm, and bring the feel of the tropics right into your home. Environment: 2

items.name: Princess Cordelia Corset Vase
items.description: Like most royalty, Princess Cordelia enjoyed structured clothing and often sported a bustle and a corset. This delighted her first pirate boyfriend, perhaps a little too much. This vase is actually based on the parting gift she gave upon dumping him, lest he forget her curves or thorns. Environment: 2

items.name: Florist’s Dream Watering Can
items.description: Your garden is so robust, those naughty flowers grow everywhere! Look-even your watering can is bursting with gorgeous blooms. Environment: 2

items.name: Starblossoms
items.description: Some hypothesize that more than fifty percent of the world’s lifeforms originated in outerspace—like this twiggy plant!

items.name: Crabtree Planter Pot
items.description: Princess Cordelia used to love lounging by tide pools, watching the crabs scuttle over rocks. She took special delight in the way they seemed to hop up onto tiptoe and bolt as if life depended on it, which it usually did. Crabs are yummy. Environment: 2

items.name: Minimalist Unplant
items.description: Foliage artisans scoured arboreal forests for years in search of the perfect twig. It imparts an air of forgotten grandeur and reminds you of life’s impermanence. Environment: 4 Unlocked at level 8 of the Tech Guru career (Start-up branch)

items.name: Reclaimed Corbel Vase
items.description: A beautiful repurposing of the finest antique architecture, this modern vase is embraced by two hand-carved oak corbels, recovered tacitly from the mantel of some old guy’s fireplace. Environment: 2

items.name: Sumptuous Floral Fantasy Arrangement
items.description: A vessel fit for the queen of flowers: a brushed-nickel chalice housing only roses hand-picked from fragrant spring gardens, trimmed with sparkling gold leaf. Environment: 3

items.name: Domec Floral Floor Vase
items.description: A tall floor vase perfect for postmodern floral arrangements.

items.name: My Own Private Eden Patio Shrub
items.description: Transform your patio into a private sanctuary. Each solid stone planter holds a dense, full, fast-growing shrub, so you can look out onto greenery and have no one looking back.

items.name: Symbols of the Watery Moon
items.description: This decal was granted for the New Lunar Year of the Pig, starting in February 2019.

items.name: La Vida En Color – Mural
items.description: Murals are not only considered street art but Murals can also mean a visual record of history through time, and a statement of identity and tradition. These colourful and vibrant murals depict how colourful life is and can inspire you.

items.name: The Downer Arrow Decal
items.description: The Downer Arrow is something Mr. Obvious would be jealous of. It’s not just a clever name. It points down to whatever you want. Accentuate with pointing it out!

items.name: To The Left Decal
items.description: With this handy dandy decal, you will always know which way to go, especially if it’s going to the left. It even comes in Cautionary Yellow to catch the eye of that special someone.

items.name: Directional Up Arrow
items.description: This directional arrow can be placed at any height. They do make a nice pattern when you place more than one. Make a statement with the Directional Up Arrow.

items.name: Only One Directional Arrow
items.description: For all your right arrow needs. The Only One Directional Arrow will point you in the right direction! [Wink]

items.name: Winsome Growth Chart
items.description: Post this growth chart featuring a tottering stack of blocks on the wall of your little one’s bedroom and keep track of her vertical progression from baby to teen. Environment: 1

items.name: Every Man Decal
items.description: This abstract rendition of man comes in a variety of colors. He’s ageless, never to get old or die. He will always be there for you and never judge you.

items.name: Every Woman Decal
items.description: This universal symbol for women can be yours. With her sleek modern design, she will be the perfect addition! She’s quiet and is a great listener!

items.name: “Working for Peanuts” Wall Painting
items.description: A portrait of a cheerful elephant to enliven your nursery or playroom. Environment: 1

items.name: Heavenly Wall Decal
items.description: Children will gaze up and ponder the enormity of the heavens—the universe, celestial bodies, all that lies within the glorious firmament of Creation.

items.name: Baby Dino Nursery Art
items.description: Give your baby a window into prehistoric times with this charming little dinosaur painting. Reduced to 0.3% of its actual size, this pleasing herbivore is as harmless as they come, but we locked it behind glass just to be safe. Environment: 1

items.name: Fluffy Clouds Stencil
items.description: Kids can go to their happy place with these peaceful cumulus clouds. Or are they stormy nimbus clouds? Encourage the kids to look it up.

items.name: Baby Bunny Nursery Art
items.description: This adorable little rabbit is so lifelike, you can almost see its nose twitching. What, what’s that? What does it smell? Oh, of course. Diapers! Environment: 1

items.name: Floating Away
items.description: “Balloons drift upward into the clouds like dreams during the night.” It’s so…Poetic.

items.name: Bunny Totem
items.description: Curious bunnies hop on top of each others heads to look and see what new and exciting things are happening around them.

items.name: Dream Eater
items.description: This monster is fed by the dreams of children. Good or bad it will be there to chomp down on those dreams. How else do you explain how dreams are always forgotten by the morning?

items.name: Open Hearted Princess
items.description: The princess of heart always shares the love with Sims who have her on their wall. She has an open heart and open ears for anyone who needs a friend.

items.name: Oonicorn the Unicorn
items.description: Oonicorn has always been there for children, no matter how old they get. Just because they get older doesn’t mean they have to grow up.

items.name: Baby Bug Nursery Art
items.description: Did you know that the average ladybug can eat 5,000 other bugs in its lifetime? We think that’s why her eyes are bulging. The artist captured this happy little critter on bug 4,999. Darling! Environment: 1

items.name: Better Than Bunny Decal
items.description: Real pets are a hassle… kids hate that. No more fights about early-morning walks or puddles on the carpet! You’ll never need to clean this decal’s cage!

items.name: Lemon Branch Contemporary Watercolor
items.description: Artist Kun Li’s work takes recognizable objects from nature and divorces them from their natural environments, in order to force the viewer to see them in a new light. Environment: 1

items.name: Rorschach Bunnies
items.description: Are the adorable bunnies frolicking in the heather with glee, or are they frantically trying to outrun a predator? It’s exciting to wonder.

items.name: Raising a Reader Kids’ Poster
items.description: Inspire a love for reading with this cheery kids’ poster. A true breath of fresh air, this artsy poster depicts a garden of books growing strong-just like your child’s IQ will! Environment: 1

items.name: Delightful Dino Stencil
items.description: Anytime your child needs to be cheered up, they can imagine this T-Rex trying to juggle handfuls of pudding with its teeny, tiny arms. Hilarious.

items.name: Teen Idol Poster
items.description: An absolute must for any girl with big dreams. Talented, airbrushed, and sooo stylish, she’s everything a girl aspires to be, and more! Environment: 1

items.name: Henry Puffer Poster
items.description: Everyone’s favorite kid wizard has graduated from books to movies and now to your wall! Cast a spell and bewitch your friends with the mystifying power of Henry Puffer. Environment: 1

items.name: “Just Justin” Fan Poster
items.description: No teenage bedroom is complete without a poster of the latest bad-boy music sensation taped haphazardly to the wall. Rock on. Environment: 1

items.name: Kick It, Sally Soccer Poster
items.description: Show off your passion for soccer with this poster of women’s soccer legend Sally Upstart. As big a name as a female athlete has ever been, she’s kicking doors open for girls like you. Score! Environment: 1

items.name: Unidentified Creature Stencil
items.description: A rhinoceros wizard? A turtle in a dunce cap? A dinosaur with an underbite? Your kids will have fun trying to figure this one out!

items.name: Read-asaurus Rex Kids’ Poster
items.description: Don’t let your child’s love for books die out! Just think, if dinosaurs actually read books, they might not be extinct today. Environment: 1

items.name: Dramatic Cooking Poster
items.description: The chef’s domain: sweltering, clouded in smoke, heavy with the moans of wait staff. The perfect poster for an aspiring epicurean! Environment: 1

items.name: The Illustrated Sports Poster
items.description: Virtually smell the aroma of overturned dirt and sweaty teenagers with this poster! Environment: 1

items.name: Slightly Damp Poster
items.description: Working out takes motivation--and this poster provides it in spades! Environment: 1

items.name: Chic Shoe Fashion Poster
items.description: This high heel in silhouette makes it clear that you know what’s hot and what’s not. Environment: 1

items.name: #1 Mom Wall Decal
items.description: The only thing kids love more than trees is cotton candy! Your child will be the envy of all when you decorate his room with cotton candy trees!

items.name: The Primrose Path
items.description: Colorful primrose rendered in oil pastels brighten any room. Bonus: no need to water, trim or replace the blossoms as they fade. Environment: 1

items.name: Curiosity is Electrifying Poster
items.description: What happens if you take a yellow bulb, put a lightning bolt inside of it, surround it with a red circle, and place it on a poster? We don’t know, but our curiosity is buzzing! Environment: 1

items.name: Tragic Clown
items.description: Tragic Clown, Tragic Clown…What have they done to you?

items.name: Plumbosion!
items.description: One of these Plumbobs is not like the others One of these Plumbobs is kind of the same Can you guess which one of these is not like the others? So many Plumbobs, So little space! Environment: 1

items.name: Let there be Plumbobs!
items.description: Have you ever wondered how many Plumbobs can fit in a painting? Where the giant Plumbob is king, how many do you really see?

items.name: Fruit on Fruit Watercolor Set
items.description: These brilliant watercolors capture the very essence of what makes an apple an apple, and a pear a pear. Environment: 1

items.name: Gravity & Light Contemporary Watercolor
items.description: Discontent with a mere still life, artist Kun Li set these pears in motion, combining a study of form with a study of basic physics. Environment: 1

items.name: Rock My Universe Pinup Girl
items.description: Blast off to your happy place with every glance at this devilish pinup. 3…2…1. See? You’re smiling. Environment: 1

items.name: Birds of a Feather Print Set
items.description: Express your love for nature with this charming collection of bird prints. Each fanciful feathered friend is a treasure, but flocked together, they are the epitome of contemporary chick-chic. Environment: 2

items.name: My House Kid’s Painting
items.description: Look what your little artist can do! Or maybe someone else’s. But it may as well be yours, right? Environment: 2

items.name: Spuds in Space Potato Print
items.description: Countdown to blast-off with this ready-to-hang print! Made by an artist no older than your little one, this rocket shape was carved out of potato, dipped in paint, and then stamped onto construction paper. But you get to enjoy it without all that mess. Environment: 2

items.name: On Phantom Wing Wall Art
items.description: Tickle your fancy with this nature-inspired print. Soft, illusory and delightfully mysterious, it leaves you with a fluttering in your stomach-and on your wall. Environment: 2

items.name: Ode to Jazz 1: “Golden”
items.description: One thing Princess Cordelia simply couldn’t fit on her submersible was her beloved jazz band. She so missed the music of her former life that she painted a series of pictures to commemorate it. This lively number was inspired by the sax legend Jacob Goldentips, who was left tragically adrift during The Great Sloth invasion. Environment: 2

items.name: Floral Revelation
items.description: Picture yourself lying in a field of sunflowers, gazing up at the brilliant blue of the sky. A migraine is coming on, but you are too relaxed to mind. Instead, you admire how the sparkling pre-headache aura dances across the merry yellow petals of the flowers, which arch delightedly toward the warmth of the summer sun. Now keep the picture. Environment: 2

items.name: Eyes for Nature Painting
items.description: This eye-popping painting celebrates nature in all its glory. Gaze admiringly at its vibrant hues, and it will gaze right back at you. Environment: 2

items.name: Superasymmetry
items.description: Not all scientists advocate string theory to explain our universe. But all interior designers think this artful depiction of quantum mechanics would go awesome with your wallpaper. Environment: 2

items.name: It’s Amber!
items.description: Her name is Amber, she’s the girl next door. It’s Amber! She’s a painter, yeah! She’s an artist. She leaves others confused. She’s a neat freak. She scrubs toilets right after they’re… used? A gamer. A lover. She hacks like no other! She dances to cure the blues. Her name is Amber. Amber. Her name is Amber. That girl next door. Who? Amber! Environment: 2

items.name: Stay Weirder
items.description: He never drinks more than two cups of coffee a day. One New Years Eve, he stayed up until midnight. When the going gets tough, he watches daytime TV. If at first he doesn’t succeed, he doesn’t try again. He is the most least interesting Sim in the world. He doesn’t always eat breakfast, but when he does, he makes pancakes. Environment: 2

items.name: Cow Plant Love
items.description: Say “Moooo” you sweet cowplant… “Moooooooo!” Environment: 2

items.name: Cop and Llama
items.description: A mascot without a team… but a llama with a partner! With these two on the case, the bad guys don’t stand a chance. Cop and Llama! Environment: 2

items.name: Malpractice
items.description: This flu season, the doctors are IN! Environment: 2

items.name: Epic Wood
items.description: A hero will rise with one mission… To decorate her home with nothing but wood. Epic wood! Environment: 2

items.name: Sul Sul
items.description: We are not alone. Environment: 2

items.name: Still Life
items.description: A love so strong it stops time. Environment: 2

items.name: Treebra Series 4, Print 337
items.description: Suggestive to some of a crimson zebra and others a sunlit forest, this print adds a dash of color to any modern home. Also doubles as a Rorschach test for friends and visitors. Environment: 2

items.name: Mochi Booger Parade
items.description: Stickiness is harsh white lines on a glutinous peach and blueberry dessert. Texture is a sharp and fleeting sensorial dance. What is edible becomes re-edible. Mochi Booger Parade. A new painting by new age artist/chef/writer StickiMo. Environment: 2

items.name: Ceci N’est Pas Une Poire
items.description: So much more than a still life, this elegant painting piques the appetite with the softly lit curves of its tantalizing fruit. Smooth, firm golden pears bump up against the flirtatious pink petals of a carefully arranged bouquet, which nestles contentedly on a bed of white linen. Environment: 2

items.name: Roman Temple Architectural Study
items.description: Show off your affinity for architecture with this hand-drawn elevation of a Roman temple. Drawn to scale long after the fall of the noble empire, it has little other use than to glorify your wall. Environment: 2

items.name: Roman Temple Architectural Study (2)
items.description: Show off your affinity for architecture with this hand-drawn elevation of a Roman temple. Drawn to scale long after the fall of the noble empire, it has little other use than to glorify your wall. Environment: 2

items.name: Coq au Peinture
items.description: Nothing cheers up a home like a gallant coq. Jolly, proud and bursting with character, this friendly fellow brings a smile to everyone he greets. Admire him from across the room or step in close to absorb his finer details. Environment: 2

items.name: Still Life with Apple and Pitcher and Books and Bottles and Flowers
items.description: Painting the most ordinary things can take extraordinary talent. In this masterpiece, the artist has depicted an astonishingly vast array of objects. It is said he began with two apples, but took so long to finish, he devoured one halfway through. Inspiring Décor: 4 Unlocked at level 3 of the Writer career

items.name: The Intrepid
items.description: Too often we force ourselves to label what we see, what we hear, taste and touch. Here is a painting. Is it a good painting? Before you apply that label, consider that definition destroys exploration, allows us to sit back and dust off our hands and say “all done.” Art is never done being art! Environment: 2

items.name: Alpine Peace
items.description: This anonymous photograph of conifers on an alpine slope is ideal for giving your home a well-travelled look. And since it’s anonymous, you can always take credit. Environment: 2

items.name: The Recondite
items.description: Proof is a prison from which curiosity languishes and dies, its limp arm dangling between the bars of its cell where it once stretched toward the light of freedom. Art is the key that unlocks the cell door and liberates our captive minds, daring them to run as fast as they can. Environment: 2

items.name: Cloud Space Thing
items.description: A meditation of creation and balance set against a backdrop of cosmic wonder. Princess Cordelia’s astronomers were forced to scour the skies until they found a nebula in the shape of her favorite horse. Nearby, a fire raged on. Environment: 2

items.name: Snow Falling on Cinders Abstract Art
items.description: This mesmerizing masterpiece was inspired by the world-famous forest fire that destroyed thousands of acres in the 1920s. A study of dark and light, sobriety and celebration, this piece is profound. Environment: 2

items.name: Bembe Maraj’s Hand-Woven Tapestry
items.description: The intricate tapestries hand-woven by Bembe Maraj are world-renowned for their use of color, design, and story. Each is carefully inlaid with a vision of his past—though, to most sims, these stories remain hidden behind geometric motif and vibrant colors. Environment: 1

items.name: Mega Art
items.description: Whoever said you can’t teach robots to make art didn’t spend enough time tuning his robots. Our robots can paint a pleasing landscape with brush strokes so precise, you will be able to appreciate their work within a margin of error of plus or minus .007 art appreciation units. Environment: 2

items.name: The Pianist
items.description: Not all of Princess Cordelia’s entertainers perished in the Great Sloth Invasion. This pianist knew that if his body was to perish, his name must live on for him. So, he rolled his piano out atop the submersible and played until it went under. Environment: 2

items.name: Saxophone in Silhouette
items.description: Great jazz is hard to come by, especially in the depths of the sea, so Princess Cordelia commissioned a mute reproduction of glorious jazz music. Environment: 2

items.name: Study of the Human Form
items.description: Before painting his most famous opus, artist Jean-Jacques PePe did sketch after sketch of his maitresse Jeanne. She grew so old in the process, he had to start over with her daughter Deanne. These sketches are from the 27th year of sitting, and include a rare male form. Inspiring Décor: 4 Unlocked at level 3 of the Painter career

items.name: Ode to Jazz 3: “Sea Bass”
items.description: Even a submersible as grand as the Eppsilon has its limitations. Princess Cordelia had to cast out many employees, including her beloved jazz band. She longed for their music so deeply that she painted a series of pictures as a tribute. This silhouette portrays bass player Martin Maxwell still playing in the depths of the sea. So poignant! Environment: 3

items.name: Sole Star Athletic Poster
items.description: Even though our shoes don’t feature prominently in this poster, our marketing team tells us that pictures of famous athletes are the best way to sell products. Prove those marketing geniuses right, and buy some Sole Star Shoes today! Confident Décor: 4 Unlocked at level 5 of the Athletic career (Professional Athlete branch)

items.name: Sole Star Athletic Poster (2)
items.description: Even though our shoes don’t feature prominently in this poster, our marketing team tells us that pictures of famous athletes are the best way to sell products. Prove those marketing geniuses right, and buy some Sole Star Shoes today! Energizing Décor: 4 Unlocked at level 5 of the Athletic career (Professional Athlete branch)

items.name: Ode to Jazz 4: “Feeling Blue”
items.description: When The Great Sloth Invasion forced Princess Cordelia to flee, she simply couldn’t fit everyone on her submersible. But firing her beloved jazz band remained a regret so sharp, she painted a series of pictures to honor them. This wistful silhouette portrays one of her musicians still playing blues in the deep blue (purplish) sea. Environment: 3

items.name: Mystery Poser Antique Portrait
items.description: No one’s quite sure who this is, but does it matter? It’s fine art, and it’s old, and that’s cool, right? Environment: 3

items.name: Ode to Jazz 2: “Goldentips”
items.description: When Princess Cordelia was forced to flee her kingdom, she had to leave her beloved jazz band behind. This wistful silhouette portrays the sax legend Jacob Goldentips still playing in the depths of the sea, which was how the Princess liked to imagine him. Environment: 3

items.name: Ode to Jazz 5: “Ivory”
items.description: Princess Cordelia loved piano most of all. Though she had cut her jazz band adrift during her escape from her kingdom, she continued to ache for their music, and so found herself painting instruments. The piano keys in this tribute seem to arch up toward the light, almost as if lifted by the current. Apt, isn’t it? Environment: 3

items.name: Etude in Blue
items.description: Just like music, art can be a celebration of things we love, of experiences we adore, of people left behind. This abstract painting is a beautiful reverie, a nostalgic tribute to the ne’er-to-be-forgotten performances of years past. Environment: 4

items.name: The Amour-propre
items.description: Reclamation Homeware truly understands art. Art is simply defined as man’s last hope to crawl out from the shadows of fact and expose himself to the piercing light of infinity. It challenges us to climb mental ladders and dive into unknown expanses of self. Plus, ours is made of garbage! Environment: 4

items.name: Hot & Cold Tech Spec Poster
items.description: Celebrate technical achievement with this tech spec wall poster, featuring the hot and cold buttons on the world’s first pet hair dryer. The oversized hot button reflects a genius adjustment made by guru Fuzzy James, after the pets all got colds in the first round of testing. Focusing Décor: 5 Unlocked at level 7 of the Criminal career (Oracle branch)

items.name: Ode to Jazz 6: “Ghost Quartet”
items.description: Some days, the thought of her long-lost jazz musicians was simply too much for Princess Cordelia to bear. She even went so far as to have new instruments made, but with no one to play them, all she could do was paint pictures of them. Environment: 4

items.name: Inspirational Mouse Poster
items.description: Is there anything more inspiring than a scenic image of an animal captioned with a noun and cheesy slogan? No, really, we want to know! Energizing Décor: 6 Unlocked at level 8 of the Athlete career (Body Builder branch)

items.name: Grin and Bear It!
items.description: Little bears know, when the going gets tough, grab your mama bear for a great big bear hug! Energizing Décor: 6 Unlocked by completing Tier 1 of the Positivity Challenge Aspiration

items.name: It Happened
items.description: They always said, when it happens, magical things will occur. Well, it happened! Are you feeling majestic? Energizing Décor: 6 Unlocked by completing Tier 2 of the Positivity Challenge Aspiration

items.name: The Sealinicorn, in repose
items.description: Is she looking back to the sea, or forward to the horizon? What do you see?

items.name: Paradise Falls
items.description: If you’re ever feeling down… think about taking a trip to Paradise Falls. Aside from a really depressing introduction, it’s a pretty up place. Energizing Décor: 6 Unlocked by completing Tier 4 of the Positivity Challenge Aspiration

items.name: Blue for the Blues Wall Painting
items.description: When Princess Cordelia was forced to flee her kingdom, she simply couldn’t fit her beloved musicians on the submersible. This colorful portrait is a tribute to her bass player Martin Maxwell, and somehow made her feel less blue. Environment: 4

items.name: Martian Memories Landscape #1
items.description: Take a trip back to Mars with every glance at this lovely landscape. Red rock canyons, blue sky… Hmm. Maybe it’s not Mars, but it IS reminiscent, isn’t it? Environment: 4

items.name: Martian Memories Landscape #2
items.description: Recall the glaciers and snowcapped mountains from that memorable trip to Mars. Or, maybe not Mars. But somewhere that’s memorable. Environment: 4

items.name: Martian Memories Landscape #3
items.description: What a great vacation on Mars that was, whether climbing to the top of an active volcano or lazing on a pristine beach. That was Mars, wasn’t it? Environment: 4

items.name: No. 46 Landscape
items.description: This painting is one of 364 painted over the course of a single year as a study of changing light through the seasons. Unfortunately, a bad case of indigestion cost the artist a day in March. Environment: 4

items.name: I Otter Be a Star Pop Art
items.description: Pop art is for everyone, and this famous Amy Warthog print is especially for you! Featuring the unmistakable face of everyone’s favorite furry friend, the piece is as iconic and unforgettable as the artist herself. Playful Décor: 7 Unlocked at level 5 of the Entertainer career (Comedy branch)

items.name: Art in a Box
items.description: Featuring portraits and a few compelling landscapes from around the world, this array of paintings was carefully curated to suggest art that has been inherited over generations, and not just purchased in a clever box set. Environment: 4

items.name: Ode to Jazz Triptych Trio
items.description: One thing Princess Cordelia simply couldn’t fit on her submersible was her beloved jazz band. She so missed their music that she painted a series of pictures to commemorate it. Framed in celebratory gold frames, this collection reunites three of her favorite musicians-may they play together in peace on your wall. Environment: 4

items.name: Tenor Mood
items.description: The silhouette of a saxophonist stands tall in this jazzy piece of art. Environment: 1

items.name: Color Serenade
items.description: Rendered in temperate painterly hues, a cool jazz trumpeter plays a sophisticated tune. Environment: 1

items.name: Jazz Cats: Whiskers of a Forgotten Past
items.description: One thing the Princess was thrilled to leave back in her former kingdom was cats. They shed everywhere and made her sneeze! But nostalgia is a funny thing, and so the princess found herself painting them. As you can tell from this design, her portrayals were a touch romantic. Environment: 5

items.name: Antiqued Patent Posters
items.description: This collection features faithful reproductions of patents for the greatest scientific inventions of all time, including the telescope, wheel, and naval lint remover. Environment: 5

items.name: Chronos Magazine (Framed Collector’s Edition Issue)
items.description: Yeah, putting a framed issue of a magazine touting your company’s exploits is pretty egotistical… but if your company is making news, you’re worth it! Confident Décor: 8 Unlocked at level 9 of the Business career (Investor branch)

items.name: Ode to Jazz Wall Painting 2: “Goldentips” in Gold
items.description: When Princess Cordelia was forced to flee her kingdom, she had to leave her beloved jazz band behind. This wistful silhouette portrays the sax legend Jacob Goldentips still playing in the depths of the sea, which was how the Princess liked to imagine him. [Must be placed on at least a two-story wall.] Environment: 5

items.name: Viva La Landscape
items.description: Transport yourself to the beautiful countryside! Just one glance at this landscape, and you will feel as if your entire home has been whisked off on a romantic getaway. Lounge in the spacious square, savor the mist of the fountain on your skin, revel in the majestic chimes of the clock, and feel your heart skip into the hills beyond. Environment: 7

items.name: “Revanne” Poster
items.description: Emerging from the shadows with no history, no past, and no name. The Mysterious Gamer! A poster commemorating this icon of gaming lore. Focusing Décor: 9 Unlocked at level 8 of the Tech Guru career (eSport Gamer branch)

items.name: History of the World, Print 3
items.description: Hang your intellect on the wall for all your friends to see. This reproduction of an Old World map was hand-painted on aged parchment in an ancient language few can remember-and you’re one of them! Environment: 7

items.name: Light of My Life Painting
items.description: At the end of every dark tunnel is a ray of light. This radiant painting ensures you don’t forget it. Environment: 8 Unlocked at level 9 of the Tech Guru career (Start-up branch)

items.name: Light of My Life Painting (2)
items.description: At the end of every dark tunnel is a ray of light. This radiant painting ensures you don’t forget it. Environment: 8 Unlocked at level 9 of the Tech Guru career (Start-up branch)

items.name: Light of My Life Painting (3)
items.description: At the end of every dark tunnel is a ray of light. This radiant painting ensures you don’t forget it. Environment: 8 Unlocked at level 9 of the Tech Guru career (Start-up branch)

items.name: “Blooming Beauty” Wall Painting
items.description: Of course, there were no flowers in Princess Cordelia’s subaquatic life, but she had an acute memory of the vases and vases of them that once adorned the Royal House. Oh, the fragrance! Princess Cordelia couldn’t replicate the scent of course, but her painting was quite lifelike. Environment: 8

items.name: Portrait of a Marriage
items.description: This handsome couple was painted in their first year of marriage, long before the dame let her delectable figure go and the monsieur began his affair with the maid. But in the painting at least, their love is preserved forever. Beautiful, n’est ce pas? Environment: 9

items.name: Land-Coral Garden
items.description: Princess Cordelia painted this before gradually fleeing from the giant sloths. Photographs were not commonplace yet, so this painting was all she had to remind her of her old palace’s painting studio. While sitting comfortably on her escape submarine, she changed the name from “Flower Still Life,” to “Land-Coral Garden.” Environment: 10

items.name: Viva More of La Landscape
items.description: Transport yourself completely to a historic country village with this large, sweeping, lifelike landscape. Offering a broader view than Viva La Landscape, Viva More of La Landscape reveals the full fountain in all its thundering grandeur, and a convenient, charming hotel beyond. Environment: 10

items.name: Magical Me Kids’ Mirror
items.description: Pamper your little princess with her very own full-length mirror. From the tip of her tiara to her tiny glass slipper, she’ll be dazzled by her own reflection, giving you a moment’s rest. +Charisma Skill

items.name: Floored by Symmetry Standing Mirror
items.description: There it is again. The pure, clean lines of an adulterated rectangle. And shining forth from the heart of its simplicity? You. Stunning! +Charisma Skill

items.name: The Obverse
items.description: Who knows what our reflections do in the shadow universe they inhabit behind the looking glass. All we know is they are always there for us when we stare into that magic pane. Give the other you an elegant view into our world with The Obverse from Reclamation Homeware. +Charisma Skill

items.name: Between the Lines Full-length Mirror
items.description: The solid construction and elegant lines of this full-length mirror make it perfect for a craftsman home. +Charisma Skill

items.name: Vision Of You Mirror
items.description: Sometimes a little part of you is not enough. The full body version of our mirror wants all of you, from head to toe. Stand close to it and let it drink in your entire being. It will take everything you have and give back just as good, because it’s a mirror. Environment: 2 +Charisma Skill

items.name: Captain Chaz MacFreeling Mirror
items.description: Princess Cordelia’s second pirate boyfriend was handsome and, relative to other pirates, had good hygiene! Things started off great, but the princess noticed him looking in the mirror all the time; so vain. She promptly sent him on his way, giving him a handful of citrus for any future scurvy outbreaks, and naming all her mirrors after him. Environment: 2 +Charisma Skill

items.name: Sunny Days Wall Mirror
items.description: Greet the rising sun with a grin every morning. This cheery kids’ mirror will put your little rooster in the brightest of moods, whether it’s light out yet or not. Must be hung on the wall +Charisma Skill

items.name: Great Wall Mirror
items.description: Frame yourself in pure innocence with the Great Wall Mirror. Clean, simple lines never overpower your beauty. Less mirror, more you. Must be hung on the wall +Charisma Skill

items.name: Who’s That Baby? Baby Mirror
items.description: Nothing is more delightful than watching babies discover their reflection. Such surprise-to see themselves alone in a jungle, surrounded by dinosaurs, bunnies and unpredictable elephants with long, reaching trunks… Must be hung on the wall +Charisma Skill

items.name: Morning Glory Bathroom Mirror
items.description: This is a straightforward bathroom mirror that will make you look your best while brushing your teeth. Must be hung on the wall +Charisma Skill

items.name: The Source
items.description: Who are we, but reflections of our own divine purpose? If you don’t understand, simply close your eyes—and see without seeing. Now, open them. There is a mirror wall cabinet. It is you. You are perfect. Must be hung on the wall +Charisma Skill

items.name: The Sincerity
items.description: Stark. Honest. True. You can stare into Sincerity but it will only stare back. It can give nothing that you did not bring to it. If you dislike the answer The Sincerity gives you, ask yourself: do you really know the question? Made from reclaimed trash and highly reflective tin foil. Must be hung on the wall +Charisma Skill

items.name: Garlic-Scented Mirror
items.description: Why buy expensive lie detectors when you can check for vampirism with this one weird trick! A mirror for every occasion. Must be hung on the wall +Charisma Skill

items.name: Wondrous Me Wall Mirror
items.description: A charming companion to the Weathered Wonder dresser, this antiqued wall mirror is so quaintly battered, it makes you look as fresh and innocent as a flower. Gaze into its depths and admire the tenderness of your reflection. See it. Believe it. Cherish it forever. Must be hung on the wall +Charisma Skill

items.name: Cloud Cutie Mirror Mirror
items.description: Designed by: peacemaker_ic This shiny little cloud mirror has all the feels. Just like you. So whether you're feeling like everything's coming up rainbows or want to storm off to rain on someone's parade, this little cutie gets it. Must be hung on the wall +Charisma Skill

items.name: The Covert
items.description: Salvaged from the hull of a downed government aircraft, this mirror shines like no other. Must be hung on the wall +Charisma Skill

items.name: Vacuum-Safe Mirror
items.description: Astronauts used this for the first selfie in space! Must be hung on the wall +Charisma Skill

items.name: Sweet Dreams Are Made Of You
items.description: Reflective surface? Yes. Wall hangable? Yes. Everything is there… the only thing missing is you. Must be hung on the wall +Charisma Skill

items.name: Pain to Pane Mirrored Medicine Cabinet
items.description: The only thing exposed on this medicine cabinet is the hardware. And maybe your face, you know, when you look in the mirror. But anything else you keep behind the glass, stays behind the glass. Novel! Must be hung on the wall +Charisma Skill

items.name: Mission Not Accomplished Wall Mirror
items.description: The perfect complement to the Forgot My Mission Full-length Mirror, this elegant, Mission-style wall mirror is more decorative than practical. Gaze into its depths and find yourself sliced up. Not a problem for lunchmeat. Sims? You decide. Must be hung on the wall +Charisma Skill

items.name: OTP Split Mirror
items.description: Function falls madly in love with Fashion in the OTP Split Mirror. Its upper-half perfectly reflects the fashion icon standing before it, while the lower half can be angled to properly inspect shoes and calves. Do we ship this mirror? Yaaaas. Must be hung on the wall +Charisma Skill

items.name: Vision Of You
items.description: You’ll love the way your reflection looks when it’s framed by beautiful, hand-carved walnut. One gaze and you’ll find that person staring back at you irresistible. Let yourself see you the way we see you seeing yourself, with the Vision Of You mirror. Must be hung on the wall +Charisma Skill

items.name: Morning Glory Full-length Mirror
items.description: The same simple style you loved in our Morning Glory Bathroom Mirror is now longer to reflect your best self from the top of your head to the tip of your toes. Must be hung on the wall +Charisma Skill

items.name: Captain Chaz MacFreeling Elegant Mirror
items.description: Princess Cordelia’s second pirate boyfriend was handsome and, relative to other pirates, had good hygiene! Things started off great, but the princess noticed him looking in the mirror all the time; so vain. She promptly sent him on his way, giving him a handful of citrus for any future scurvy outbreaks, and naming all her mirrors after him. Must be hung on the wall +Charisma Skill

items.name: Imprisoned Vanity Mirror
items.description: No matter how long the Princess called the Eppsilon home, it was nonetheless a submersible, and like all submersibles, it was made of cold, unforgiving metal. In her sadder moments-most often after dumping a pirate boyfriend-Princess Cordelia favored this hostile glass, which reminded her of her tragic fate. Sigh. Must be hung on the wall +Charisma Skill

items.name: Straight-up Wall Mirror
items.description: You don’t need some fancy frame to pretty up your look. You want the raw, honest truth. And this mirror will give it to you. Must be hung on the wall +Charisma Skill

items.name: Riveting Standing Mirror
items.description: Meticulously crafted from reclaimed recycled particle board, the aged metal framing features exposed rivets for the ultimate urban effect. Must be hung on the wall +Charisma Skill

items.name: What a Star You Are Wall Mirror
items.description: Let your star qualities shine. This star-shaped wall mirror is hand-decorated with fuzzy dots to be one-of-a-kind, just like you! Must be hung on the wall Energizing Décor: 5 +Charisma Skill Unlocked at level 8 of the Entertainer career (Comedy branch)

items.name: I Only Have Eyes for Me Wall Mirror
items.description: You can’t get enough of gazing at yourself, so you absolutely need more mirrors! Follow every careless movement, peer shyly into your own sweet eyes, and be sure to toss yourself a backwards glance if you’re ever forced to leave your mirror. Must be hung on the wall Environment: 2 +Charisma Skill

items.name: Captain Chaz MacFreeling Porthole Mirror
items.description: Princess Cordelia’s second pirate boyfriend was handsome and, relative to other pirates, had good hygiene! Things started off great, but the princess noticed him looking in the mirror all the time; so vain. She promptly sent him on his way, giving him a handful of citrus for any future scurvy outbreaks, and naming all her mirrors after him. Must be hung on the wall Environment: 2 +Charisma Skill

items.name: Bamboozle Blinds
items.description: These striking blinds are made from an environmentally-friendly relative of the bamboo plant that manages to be far more obscure.

items.name: Blinds de Nuit
items.description: The cheque you’ll write is but a small price to pay for the lustre of privacy you’ll enjoy, without the prying eyes of neighbors.

items.name: Flaunting Flounces Panels
items.description: Some say that curtains are made for keeping away Peeping Toms, but we think these beauties invite adoration! Don’t hide your home—show it off!

items.name: Simplicity Shade
items.description: Why clutter your mind and your life with color, texture, or pattern? Sometimes good design is in the lack of details.

items.name: Minimalist Drapes
items.description: They don’t block sun or ensure privacy, in fact, you’ll barely notice they’re there!

items.name: Illusion Shades
items.description: One moment they’re there, the next they’re gone… or are they? These shades are so ultra-slender, they’re practically almost virtually semi-nonexistent! But very attractive, too.

items.name: Dorm Life Panel
items.description: You have the rest of your life to buy fancy curtains. For now, it’s okay to economize. As long as no one can see you in your underpants, you’re good!

items.name: Nouveau Riche Blinds
items.description: Perfectly identical slats impart an air of upper-class optimism. You make enough money to afford nice things from catalogs—decorate like it!

items.name: Veil of Mystery
items.description: Who are those people? What treasures lie within? Such are the questions people will ask when they see your windows swathed in this cortina obscura.

items.name: Eco-Friendly Panel
items.description: Hand-woven from thread spun by local grass-fed silkworms, this panel emits no greenhouse gases or harmful fumes!

items.name: Chartres Valance
items.description: Adorn the walls with only the finest in colour and comfort—this gossamer sheath will be the center of conversation for years on end.

items.name: Puppet Theater Curtain
items.description: With windows framed in festive silk, every day of your life feels like a merry puppet show! Just don’t think about who’s pulling the strings.

items.name: Cabin Slats
items.description: When regular blinds won’t do, delight in the Cabin Collection’s rustic window slats, for cantilevered multi-functional light directionality.

items.name: Royal Wedding Swag
items.description: Cut from the wedding gown of Queen Gwendolen the Profligate, circa 1673. This swag sets a new standard in haphazard extravagance.

items.name: Cabin Blinds
items.description: From our Cabin Collection, these rustic-chic blinds lend any room an air of outdoorsiness.

items.name: Caress Curtains (Slender)
items.description: In the mood for a soft touch? The Caress Curtains will add a soft touch of color to any room. The Slender model focuses on long, lovely lines that look dazzling by sun or starlight. A nice fit for those tight spots in your home.

items.name: Garbo Hanging
items.description: From a rail of fine bronze hangs a silken tapestry perfect for shutting out the world, when you really need some quality alone time.

items.name: Indecision Valances
items.description: What every boring, dull room needs is a set of ziggy, zaggy valances to make things more interesting. Contrasting colors really shake it up.

items.name: Grand Window Hangings
items.description: Picture windows demand a wildly theatrical framing. These swags will make peeping neighbors think your every move is just terribly fascinating.

items.name: H.S. Trionic Draperies
items.description: Just so terribly dramatic. Place them above your fainting couch for those moments when you’re positively overcome with emotion.

items.name: Slimline Curtains
items.description: Long, lean, and featuring the latest advances in verticality, these column curtains make everyone in the room look taller and thinner, guaranteed!

items.name: Understated Elegance Curtains
items.description: For those who don’t need fussy, ostentatious window treatments, these panels prove that you’ve got nothing to prove.

items.name: Caress Curtains (Bountiful)
items.description: When you want to give your house the ultimate caress, treat your room to these big, beautiful Caress Curtains. The Bountiful model explodes with soft, satiny folds, its ample layers filling a room with a beauty that can’t be ignored.

items.name: Caress Curtains (Full)
items.description: When you want to add a special touch, the Caress Curtains will fill your window in a most satisfying way. The Full model has just the right amount of material to provide a comfortable, well-rounded atmosphere to any room in the house.

items.name: Patrician Curtains
items.description: No fuss, no frills, no funny business. Just curtains. Nice, attractive curtains. Simplify your life.

items.name: Indecision Swags
items.description: Short, boring windows? Too many right angles? Take décor to new heights of interest with these unexpected tapestries that just can’t make up their minds.

items.name: Droopy Drapes
items.description: Effect a carefully disheveled look with these hanging window treatments that say, “Frankly my dear, draperies are not my highest priority.” Environment: 2

items.name: Popped Color Curtains – Left
items.description: Stars, Stripes, or Animals. Make your choice or even mix and match…they don’t mix all that well, but we won’t judge you as long as they’re never seen by the public.

items.name: Sunny Shades – Left
items.description: They may not do much about keeping the sun out, but these curtains are perfect for any room. With a variety of color and patterns for any child’s room.

items.name: Popped Color Curtains – Right
items.description: Stars, Stripes, or Animals. Make your choice or even mix and match…they don’t mix all that well, but we won’t judge you as long as they’re never seen by the public.

items.name: Sunny Shades – Right
items.description: They may not do much about keeping the sun out, but these curtains are perfect for any room. With a variety of color and patterns for any child’s room.

items.name: Peekaboo Curtains
items.description: Let the kids play hide-and-seek! Twist, turn, and pull away! Reinforced fixtures ensure that the games end in happy memories, not yelling and costly repairs.

items.name: Just-So Curtains
items.description: These fine velvet hangings are the height of civility and decorum. Just the right amount of style, just the right amount of coverage. Environment: 2

items.name: Victorian Indulgence Curtains
items.description: Can’t decide how to adorn your windows? These stately Victorian masterpieces encompass every type and piece of window treatment imaginable! More is more! Environment: 2

items.name: Victorian Over-Indulgence Curtains
items.description: Go old-school and get a little rococo with these wide swags of rich velvet. Enough to make a Victorian blush. Environment: 2

items.name: UV Catcher Wooden Awning
items.description: Worried about UV exposure? This practically, wooden awning effectively shades your outdoor space, so you can bask in the shade in total safety.

items.name: Dandy Striper Awning
items.description: Make life a parade of color with this two-tone striped awning set. Designed to block glare without dimming your outlook, the Dandy Striper is a cheerful addition to any home.

items.name: Centurion Helmet Replica Awning
items.description: This is the Centurion Helmet Replica awning, as originally sketched by our 2nd grade class winning entry from Sophia Robertson. We knew you could do it Sophia. Go Wildcats.

items.name: Made in the Shade Tile Awning
items.description: Add a dash of style and shade with this built-to-last tile awning. Designed to blend beautifully with any Mediterranean-inspired home, this elegant addition protects you from the real or imagined sun.

items.name: Happy Gnomiversary!
items.description: Cake? Check. Noise maker? Check. Party hat? Check. Llama’s not waking, bunnies freezing, roses budding, and splines reticulating? Check. Doesn’t take much more than that to get the party started! Happy fifteen! Environment: 1

items.name: The “Lots of Love” Bear
items.description: Give your loved one a super soft stuffed bear to show them how much you care! He’s a perfect gift for that special person on Valentine’s Day, birthdays, anniversaries or any love-filled day of the year. Environment: 1

items.name: El Gran Jarrón
items.description: Growing up there was always something in the house that was pretty much untouchable. This usually was a sculpture of some kind, or some giant object placed in a very strategic corner of the home.

items.name: Guardian of the Gnomelaxy
items.description: Not to be mistaken for an inhabitant of R’lyeh. This gnome has travelled far and wide to live in peace amongst the other gnomes in your garden. He will try to fit in, to make friends, guard your lot from evil…or rise up and rule over all Sims ensuing chaos and cast aside all concepts of normalcy. Environment: 1

items.name: Catrina Doll
items.description: “My mother never allowed herself to be photographed. Though I recall, she looked quite a lot like, the Catrina doll.” -Bonehilda Environment: 1

items.name: Garden Friend
items.description: Welcome nature into your garden with this hand-detailed ceramic bunny, a darling little visitor to nestle in your fragrant fields. Perky and playful, with a slightly porous finish, this eager companion can weather the most fervent storm. Environment: 1

items.name: Wommanequin
items.description: The female form has long been the subject of fine art, but this simple silhouette is a more modern (and dare we say fun?) take on the classic. Environment: 1

items.name: Porcu-Pro Business Card Holder
items.description: Keep your most important contacts at your fingertips, and show ‘em off a bit while you’re at it. Environment: 2 Unlocked at level 2 of the Business career

items.name: Embelms of Espionage
items.description: Every self-respecting spy needs gadgets and inside knowledge into a mysterious master plan. Of course, you can’t exactly leave the tools of this particular trade lying about, but it can help to impress persons of well, personal interest. Playful Décor: 2 Unlocked at level 2 of the Criminal career

items.name: Bearly Gnome
items.description: The Bearly Gnome’s natural environment is outdoors, so he’ll enjoy being placed on the front lawn to greet (or annoy) the neighbors. Environment: 1

items.name: Hungry Like The Duck
items.description: Did you shoot this duck? Of course not, but he doesn’t care. This duck is angry. This duck is hunting you. So get yours today! Great for kids bedrooms, and birthday parties! Environment: 1

items.name: Fitness Outdoor Sign
items.description: A body in motion tends to stay in motion. This sign shows folks where to get their motion on.

items.name: Hand Reference Model
items.description: For artists and aspiring artists. This perfect hand reference model can help you sketch the perfect hand!

items.name: Astro Model Rocket
items.description: Have a blast with this super-stellar miniature, featuring working lights and realistic rocket sounds! The perfect choice for aspiring astronauts everywhere. Focusing Décor: 3 Unlocked at level 3 of the Astronaut career

items.name: Porkelain Pal
items.description: This pudgy little porker is a cheery and impish addition to any home. One glimpse into his mischievous eyes and you know he’s thinking naughty thoughts. Whatever could be passing through that piggish little brain? Let’s play a guessing game! Environment: 1

items.name: S.A.L.E.S. Award
items.description: No one’s quite sure what you have to do to earn this company award. Pretty sure it has something to do with some kind of acronym… Environment: 3 Unlocked at level 3 of the Business career

items.name: Duffel o’ Cash
items.description: Your knack for no-good deeds hasn’t gone unnoticed. Take this as a quiet acknowledgement, while everyone looks the other way. Playful Décor: 3 Unlocked at level 3 of the Criminal career

items.name: Porc du Jour
items.description: Enlist the services of a charming personal chef. Jolly, pink and generously proportioned, this friendly companion has an appetite for finer morsels.
