Indulge him by writing on his ready little slab. Then wipe it clean and start afresh, for another day full of delights. Environment: 1

items.name: Pink Flamingo Lawn Decoration
items.description: The plastic pink flamingo has a storied history as the premiere artifact of 20th century lawn kitsch. Display it ironically or earnestly; no one will know the difference. Environment: 1

items.name: Star Seeker Original Blueprints
items.description: Wow! The original blueprints for the Star Seeker 1001. Time to get busy. Focusing Décor: 2 Unlocked at level 4 of the Astronaut career

items.name: Computer Hard Drive
items.description: You’ve got your hands on a computer hard drive-and not just any computer hard drive. Do with it what you will, no questions asked. Focusing Décor: 3 Unlocked at level 3 of the Tech Guru career

items.name: Classic Pedestal-Style Bird Bath
items.description: A cool, calm basin of water attracts not only local wildlife, but encourages quiet meditation. Your garden is the serenest. Environment: 1

items.name: There’s No Place like Gnome
items.description: Add a little whimsy-and protection-to your garden with this charming fellow. A veritable sentinel for birds and squirrels, he takes his duties seriously. Environment: 1

items.name: Happy Gnome Garden Pal
items.description: This spritely fellow is sure to make you smile. And with special all-season paint, you can spread cheer all year! Environment: 1

items.name: Gnome Matter What, I’m Still Your Baby
items.description: He may have the classic gnome beard, but this cute little guy will always be your darling. Look at him reaching for your indulgent face, as if to say, “Up! Carry me!” But you know he’s better off right in your garden, where he can warm your heart forever. Environment: 1

items.name: The Corporation Outdoor Sign
items.description: A sign that conveys an air of authority without attracting too much attention. Suitable for office parks, doctor’s offices, and corporate campuses.

items.name: Don’t Fear the Reagnomper
items.description: Once known as Steve, the Reagnomper, has taken it upon himself to wander the land, searching for the unwanted, the broken, and the discarded gnomes of the lawn’verse. Those he finds he takes back to his home, where he grinds them up, allowing them to find a new recycled existence as a toilet, shower, or potting soil. Environment: 1

items.name: Mr. Floppy the Gnome
items.description: Hailing originally from the Cave of Caerbannog, there is more to this gnome than meets the eye. Succumb to its cuteness, stare into its childlike innocent eyes that can look into your soul… and potentially own it! Environment: 1

items.name: High-Rider Gnome
items.description: It’s probably best not to ponder too much how the fellow got up there. Let’s just say that gnomes move in mysterious ways. Environment: 1

items.name: Country Cockerel
items.description: Rest your eyes on this vintage Country Cockerel and you’ll be riveted. Captured mid-crow, this hand-painted centerpiece brings the liveliness of farmyard courtship right into your home and plops it on top of your dining room table! Adore it. Coo over it. Then dig right in. Environment: 1

items.name: The Ghastly Ghostly Gnome
items.description: This clever gnome has travelled to the great beyond and back to bring a fright to your lawn. He’s the perfect decoration for a newly haunted home. Environment: 1

items.name: Upright Classic Headstone
items.description: While it may not be the most fashionable of headstones at least you know that you style will last through all of eternity.

items.name: Tilted Classic Headstone
items.description: While it may not be the most fashionable of headstones at least you know that you style will last through all of eternity.

items.name: Mother Hen
items.description: Nothing says farm-fresh décor like this adorable wicker basket! Woven in the exact shape of its créateur’s favorite hen, this lively little biddy looks as if she might hop up and start pecking crumbs right off your bar or table. Fill her with flowers, warm buns or anything else you desire. Environment: 2

items.name: Vintage Baseball Bat Sculpture
items.description: Antique baseball bats are like a work of art. In this case, literally. Has to be leaning against a wall Playful Décor: 4 Unlocked at level 4 of the Criminal career

items.name: Poolside Gnome
items.description: She may not help keep your pool clean, but gnomebody dresses up your poolside like this bathing beauty. Environment: 1

items.name: Antique Canal Boat
items.description: Set your dreams adrift with this antique wooden canal boat, refurbished with lead-free green and red paint! Environment: 2

items.name: Strictly Business Gnome
items.description: While other gnomes laze around your garden or relax poolside, the Strictly Business Gnome has no time for any of that nonsense. He’s got places to go, calls to make, and meetings to attend. Environment: 1

items.name: Bare Essentials Gnome
items.description: Stripped of all modern trappings and shorn of any responsibility, the Bare Essentials Gnome is a titillating effigy of the squat Sim form at its most diminutive state. Encased in a grid of decent propriety and ensconced in one’s shame, this gnome enters your home as one enters the world – naked. Environment: 1

items.name: Jolly Trolley Antique Replica
items.description: This realistically detailed trolley is every hobbyist’s dream! Working doors, turning wheels, and an accurately molded body are always geared up for a ride down memory lane. Environment: 2

items.name: Wedding Pillar with Floral Basket
items.description: Line your wedding aisle with these decorative pillars topped by a bowl of bright blooming flowers. Environment: 3 Unlocked by completing a Wedding Social Event at Silver level or higher

items.name: Vintage Model Pickup Truck
items.description: This scale model works as well as the original truck! Showcase it on your shelf, take it for a spin, or use it to haul off some other kid’s marbles. Environment: 2

items.name: Spitting Fish Fountain
items.description: A playful fountain to add wit and whimsy to your outdoor spaces. Environment: 2

items.name: Darts Outdoor Sign
items.description: A no-frills sign for a no-frills neighborhood joint.

items.name: Banana Bank Heist Model Van
items.description: A precise replica of the van used by the famous Banana Bank Heist criminals. Some believe the van’s easy-to-spot color was the fatal mistake that led to the crew’s capture, but when police discovered the criminals had been using concealed bananas, not guns, to hold up the banks, they peeled decades off their sentences. Environment: 2

items.name: Pre-assembled Model Sports Car
items.description: Turn any space into a showroom for one of the fastest, most fun cars ever made. Built to space from metal and plastic and varnished in classic canary yellow. Environment: 2

items.name: Pre-assembled Model Stunt Plane
items.description: This Super 6000 Propeller Plane model is an exact replica of the original aerobatic two-seater. Set your imagination soaring and try out some stunts of your own. Environment: 2

items.name: Midnight Raven Model Car
items.description: Gun your engines and get revved for the ultimate model muscle car! The Midnight Raven is die-cast for pin-perfect authenticity. Tinted windows make it easy to picture yourself behind the wheel, or steaming up the backseat. Environment: 2

items.name: River Queen Paddlewheel Boat
items.description: Paddle down a river of nostalgia for the grand old days when these boats reigned. The River Queen is decked out in intricate detail with authentic woodwork, gleaming brass and indentured servants. Environment: 2

items.name: Cock’s Crow Table Accent
items.description: Proud, graceful and perfectly proportioned, this exquisite ceramic rooster is sure to satisfy the most discerning taste. Go ahead. Give him a little pat. He’ll have you, and your entire gathering, crowing with delight. Environment: 2

items.name: Antique Metal Milk Jug With Branch
items.description: What could be more rustic than an antique metal milk jug with a tree branch artfully placed inside? Nothing, that’s what. Environment: 2

items.name: On the Hunt Statuette
items.description: Perfect for dog lovers everywhere, this classic statuette pays tribute to the fine breeding, exceptional nose, and extraordinary skill of the Royal Family’s pointers. Environment: 2

items.name: Train Set - Engine Car
items.description: The toy of a child’s dreams! This engine car is part of a larger train set—complete with working wheels and doors! Environment: 2

items.name: Train Set - Cargo Car
items.description: The toy of a child’s dreams! This cargo car is part of a larger train set—complete with working wheels and doors! Environment: 2

items.name: Train Set - Passenger Car
items.description: The toy of a child’s dreams! This passenger car is part of a larger train set—complete with working wheels and doors! Environment: 2

items.name: Train Set - Coal Car
items.description: The toy of a child’s dreams! This coal car is part of a larger train set—complete with working wheels and doors! Environment: 2

items.name: Train Set – Caboose
items.description: The toy of a child’s dreams! This caboose is part of a larger train set—complete with working wheels and doors! Environment: 2

items.name: The Child Statue
items.description: Officially known as “The Child” but affectionately referred to as “Baby Yoda,” this statue is a lovable replica inspired by the Disney+ live action series The Mandalorian. Environment: 2

items.name: Innovator’s Award for Excellence in Science
items.description: Your engineering prowess has been recognized by the entire scientific community! Place this somewhere prominent, in case people haven’t heard about it. Focusing Décor: 4 Unlocked at level 6 of the Tech Guru career

items.name: The Renascent
items.description: Until we challenge our perceptions of “knowing” we will continue to claw at false cages. What happens when the brain refuses to learn the wrong lessons? Travel in strange lands without leaving the comfort of your own brain. The Renascent, by Reclamation Homeware. Environment: 3

items.name: Flying Llama
items.description: Let the regal, rough-hewn profile of the winged llama preside over your daily activities. A must-have for all camelid lovers. Environment: 5 Unlocked by completing a gold or silver tier costume party

items.name: Off the Charts Music Award
items.description: Bravo-your prodigious talent has earned you an Off the Charts Music Award! Get out your fancy garb and start writing that acceptance speech. Energizing Décor: 5 Unlocked at level 6 of the Entertainer career (Music branch)

items.name: You’ve Got Talent Award
items.description: Your potential for stardom has reached new heights! This not-so-humble award is proof at last: you’ve got what it takes. Now run with it. Energizing Décor: 5 Unlocked at level 6 of the Entertainer career (Comedy branch)

items.name: Falling Water Modern Fountain
items.description: Three stacked boxes overflow with water in this excruciatingly modern fountain. Environment: 3

items.name: All-Star Trophy
items.description: This is an incredibly rare trophy. Every year, only a few dozen are made. Well, except for a few extras due to injury replacements, or honorary All-Stars, or really special people. So really, there are only a few thousand in the world. So year, pretty rare. Energizing Décor: 4 Unlocked at level 8 of the Athlete career (Professional Athlete branch)

items.name: Commemorative Freeze Ray
items.description: Commemorate your early villainous inventions, whether they existed or not. Enclosed in indestructible safety glass, to ensure that mysterious enemies can’t use it against you. Playful Décor: 4 Unlocked at level 10 of the Secret Agent career (Villain branch)

items.name: Bars of Gold
items.description: These are the kind of bars you love to get behind-and now they are yours, all yours. Playful Décor: 6 Unlocked at level 7 of the Criminal career (Boss branch)

items.name: Triple-Tiered Fountain
items.description: This classic fountain design consists of a tier of round basins each spilling water into another. Environment: 4

items.name: Build Your Own Rocket Kit
items.description: You’ll be over the moon for this small jet engine kit. Some assembly required. Confident Décor: 6 Unlocked at level 8 of the Astronaut career (Space Ranger branch)

items.name: Bust of Baron von Dithering
items.description: Is this finely chiseled bust an artistic tribute to a great man or a hat rack? The world may never know. Environment: 4

items.name: Stolen Necklace of the Late Duchess Pinky
items.description: The sparkling fruits of your criminal labor, in a fancy display case for all to admire. Playful Décor: 7 Unlocked at level 8 of the Criminal career (Boss branch)

items.name: Jr. Solar System Trophy
items.description: This trophy is made of solid gold – but don’t worry! It features a ton of theft-protection features. Mainly, it’s just too heavy for anyone who isn’t a bodybuilder to walk away with it. Energizing Décor: 4 Unlocked at level 7 of the Athlete career (Body Builder branch)

items.name: Diner Outdoor Sign
items.description: A retro outdoor sign marks the spot for a classic diner experience.

items.name: Captain Chaz MacFreeling’s Galleon
items.description: Princess Cordelia’s 2nd pirate boyfriend Captain Chaz MacFreeling, was as vain about his galleon as he was about his looks. He commissioned Princess Cordelia’s staff to carve him a replica, but he spent so much time gazing at it, she had it smashed to bits. This is a replica of the replica, rebuilt in astonishing detail by contemporary artisans. Environment: 5

items.name: Antique Typewriter
items.description: Some of the most brilliant works of all time were tapped out on a typewriter just like this one. Commemorate the Greats, and join their ranks, with this prodigious award. Inspiring Décor: 4 Unlocked at level 9 of the Writer career (Journalist branch)

items.name: Princess Cordelia Royal Bust
items.description: Before the Great Sloth Invasion, Princess Cordelia was said to have brilliant prospects. Princes came from miles around just to have tea with her. Of course, we know today that the Princess had a thing for pirates, but we still created this stunning bust to remind us how she would have looked to prince and pirate alike. Environment: 5

items.name: Solar System Trophy
items.description: Mr. or Ms. Solar System is not just the fittest man or woman in the world. He or she is the fittest man or woman in the galaxy, nay: the multiverse! Energizing Décor: 5 Unlocked at level 10 of the Athlete career (Body Builder branch)

items.name: Astro-Bunny Beyond Infinity
items.description: Realistic sculpture of an astronaut and fuzzy companion, boldly pointing toward future horizons. Confident Décor: 8 Unlocked at level 9 of the Astronaut career (Space Ranger branch)

items.name: The Monolith
items.description: A faceless slab, pierced once with a perfect circle. Stark, ominous, arty as heck. Confident Décor: 8 Unlocked at level 8 of the Astronaut career (Smuggler branch)

items.name: Artiste Supply Taboret
items.description: A taboret is a small cabinet with multiple drawers designed to hold pigments, brushes and other art supplies. You could call it a cabinet, but you know artistes. Inspiring Décor: 8 Unlocked at level 7 of the Painter career (both branches)

items.name: MVP Trophy
items.description: You may not be the best player in the game or even at your particular position and maybe you’re not even on the best team, but at least an arbitrary group of people have by some consensus agreed that you are the most “valuable.” Whatever that means. Energizing Décor: 7 Unlocked at level 10 of the Athlete career (Professional Athlete branch)

items.name: Our Founder Statue
items.description: The ultimate villain, rendered larger than life in as a statue of a grumpy old man disapproving of all he surveys. Playful Décor: 9 Unlocked at level 10 of the Secret Agent career (Villain branch)

items.name: Premium Prima Ballerina
items.description: A dainty ballerina practices on pointe. Reminiscent of Impressionist paintings, only this time in 3D. Inspiring Décor: 9 Unlocked at level 9 of the Painter career (Master of the Real branch)

items.name: Knight of the Octagon Table Suit of Armor
items.description: Originally worn by Sir Lottalance, this suit of armor will add flair to your foyer or library. It’s good for haunted houses, too. Environment: 10

items.name: Baby Genius Mobile
items.description: Delight your child’s eyes and brain with this colorful array of shapes. Every time it rotates, a neuron grows! Environment: 1

items.name: Medium Country-Style Pot Rack
items.description: Our classic pottery storage solution, customized with supports hand-carved against the cross-grain from ancient petrified oaken forests. Environment: 1

items.name: Long Country-Style Pot Rack
items.description: If your vaulted cathedral ceilings feel a little too airy and light, cut through the emptiness with the girders supporting this bucolic pot rack. Environment: 1

items.name: Heavy Dutiest Pot Rack
items.description: Show off your professional-quality pans with this professional-quality rack, sturdy enough to hang even a medium-sized animal carcass for smoking or curing. Inspiring Décor: 2 Unlocked at level 7 of the Culinary career (Chef branch)

items.name: Dizzy Palms Ceiling Fan
items.description: How about you give this contraption a spin and see how cool it is! Environment: 1

items.name: Country-Style Pot Rack
items.description: Hewn from timber reclaimed from condemned log cabins, this elegant fixture lends a rustic and rugged look to any hearth. Environment: 2

items.name: Master Chef Pot Rack
items.description: A pinch of this, a dash of that, a small sprig of elbow grease to mount this pot rack to the ceiling, and you’ve got yourself a kitchen! BAM! Environment: 2

items.name: Professional Ceiling-Mounted Pot Rack
items.description: A professional-grade hanging pot rack for your professional-grade pots. Inspiring Décor: 2 Unlocked at level 7 of the Culinary career (Chef branch)

items.name: Mid-Height Master Chef Pot Rack
items.description: BAM! Our classic gets a little down and but not terribly dirty in this version. Perfect for homes with higher ceilings or shorter chefs. Environment: 2

items.name: Ceiling Pot Rack, Oval
items.description: This oval pot rack can hold hundreds of pounds of high-quality cookware suspended above your head. Inspiring Décor: 4 Unlocked at level 7 of the Culinary career (Chef branch)

items.name: Low-Hanging Master Chef Pot Rack
items.description: Our elegant epicurean pot rack on long, elegant extender cables. Perfect for the very short, aspiring junior chefs, and floor-level cooking surfaces. Environment: 2

items.name: Colored Theory
items.description: Everywhere the light intersects is a new color. Now comes the fun of talking about the differences between additive and subtractive color mixing. Does the rug count as Pink, Purple, or Magenta? And don’t get us started on what is considered Mint…

items.name: Bath Essentials Happy Toes Mat
items.description: Beauty is toe deep with this super-soft bathmat-and oh, how great it feels!

items.name: Textural Textiles Rug (Small)
items.description: These hand-tufted silk rugs put color center stage. Subtle, uneven texturing adds superficial interest.

items.name: Super Sisal Eco Rugs (Small)
items.description: Woven from eco-friendly natural fibers and available in an assortment of colors, these durable sisal rugs repel stains while attracting unfettered admiration.

items.name: Lattice In Indoor-Outdoor Rug (Small)
items.description: A friendly accent for indoors or out, this classic handmade collection adds depth and delight to any space.

items.name: Half-Hearted Hospitality Mat
items.description: Welcome! Your shoes are filthy! The sturdy mud-gripping tracks in this rug tell your guests that you don’t trust them to wipe their feet.

items.name: Kindermade Kushy Floor Art
items.description: Children spend a lot of time on the floor. They crawl around, play with action figures, you name it! They need cushioning for their knees now because it won’t do them much good once they’re old and their knees are shot. Several fun designs!!

items.name: Kindermade Kushy Floor Art (2)
items.description: Children spend a lot of time on the floor. They crawl around, play with action figures, you name it! They need cushioning for their knees now because it won’t do them much good once they’re old and their knees are shot. Several fun designs!!

items.name: Happy Family Rug
items.description: Set a positive example for your infant with a beautiful tableau of happy animal families, and then walk all over it. That’s what family’s really about.

items.name: Animal Squares Kid’s Rug
items.description: This plush rug from Kindermade is sure to keep your child entertained with colorful animal shapes.

items.name: Safety Area Rug
items.description: Never again will you or your family sustain injury on sharp, prickly rug corners! This decorative area rug features only smooth, rounded curves.

items.name: Caress Carpet
items.description: Close your eyes and imagine yourself sitting in a green field covered with beautiful, blooming flowers. Now open your eyes. Surprise! You’re still sitting on a field of beautiful flowers, only this one is better because when you run your hand over its fabric it feels like you’re petting a majestic stallion.

items.name: On the Spot
items.description: A circle is round. It has no end. That’s how long this rug will be your friend.

items.name: The Elysium
items.description: The rings of a tree, the rings around a planet, the ring that symbolizes a lifelong connection around your finger. These things are all connected. Rings are the fingerprint of the universe, its loops and swirls revealing to us the truth of all things: that all things are true. The Elysium rug, from Reclamation Homeware.

items.name: Blooming Hospitality Runner
items.description: Guests entering your home will feel as if they’re being whisked onto a path of fragrant flowers, blowing in the wind and welcoming them.

items.name: Fleur-de-Lis Area Rug
items.description: Herald every arrival and departure with the classy curlicues and regal petals of the fleur-de-lis.

items.name: Welcome? Mat
items.description: An ancient fertility symbol? The insignia of a secret society? Only you will know what it means, and whether visitors are welcome.

items.name: Run to Me Runner
items.description: Invite romance into your home with the Run to Me Runner. This elegant, hand-tufted silk rug is so luxuriant underfoot, it practically dares you to cast off your shoes and socks and trip lightly across its soft, thick surface.

items.name: Nom de Plume Antiqued Rug
items.description: Adorned with faded filigree yet redolent with color, this striking rug encircles you in vivid memories of a not-so-distant past.

items.name: Hopscotch Runner
items.description: Increase your gross motor coordination with this lengthy swath of circles, perfect for hopscotch, agility drills, or just starin’ at, man.

items.name: The Indispensable
items.description: Nothing celebrates the limitless potential of human ingenuity like a small area rug. It’s not hard to imagine a world where every space is tastefully accentuated by one of our stylish rugs, and there is no war. Buy The Indispensable, and achieve the impossible. Unlocked at level 8 of the Criminal career (Oracle branch)

items.name: Nature Silhouettes
items.description: Celebrate Mother Nature at her finest with soft, soothing colors and leafy silhouettes.

items.name: Super Sisal Eco Rugs (Medium)
items.description: Woven from eco-friendly natural fibers and available in an assortment of colors, these durable sisal rugs repel stains while attracting unfettered admiration.

items.name: Lattice In Indoor-Outdoor Rug (Runner)
items.description: A friendly accent for indoors or out, this classic handmade collection adds depth and delight to any space.

items.name: Princess Cordelia Royal Rug
items.description: One advantage a submersible has over nearly any other sea vessel is that the floor stays completely dry. But that’s not to say it’s warm-not in the least. Princess Cordelia designed this beautiful and luxurious rug to keep her royal toes as toasty as can be when she rose from bed on the Eppsilon.

items.name: Sim Idol
items.description: Make your dreams come true—the easy way! Don’t bother working hard and paying dues. Just put this rug in your hallway and demand attention! Environment: 2 Unlocked at level 3 of the Entertainer career

items.name: Into the Rose
items.description: An up-close look at a tea rose, from the perspective of a dazed bee.

items.name: Show Your Stripes
items.description: Make a bold statement with bright, happy stripes across invitingly soft wool.

items.name: Snug Rug
items.description: A true knockout for both casual and formal spaces, this lavish rug is exquisite to behold and even more exquisite to caress. Just one touch of a naked toe and you’ll find your heart is powerless, your knees weak. Go ahead. Faint. Its ample, silken depths will catch you in their unforgettable embrace. Environment: 2

items.name: No Sweat, No Fuss Rug
items.description: Perfect for a workout but stylish enough for any part of your home. This rug will let you enjoy your floor activities in casual comfort. Comes in multiple colors! Environment: 2 Unlocked at level 5 of the Athlete career (Body Builder branch)

items.name: Super Sisal Eco Rugs (Square)
items.description: Woven from eco-friendly natural fibers and available in an assortment of colors, these durable sisal rugs repel stains while attracting unfettered admiration. Environment: 2

items.name: Native Ways Handmade Rug
items.description: This handmade rug in dyed wool is the perfect accessory for a more rustic, earthy look.

items.name: Lattice In Indoor-Outdoor Rug (Large)
items.description: A friendly accent for indoors or out, this classic handmade collection adds depth and delight to any space. Environment: 2

items.name: A Stroke of Genius
items.description: A magnificent tribute to abstract paintings, this rug brings a modern touch of whimsy to your décor. Environment: 2 Unlocked at level 7 of the Tech Guru career (Start-up branch)

items.name: Magic Carpet
items.description: Feel the rhythms and exotic pleasures of foreign lands with a fringed floor piece woven with the colorful silks and charming yarns of lands beyond. Environment: 2

items.name: Textural Textiles Rug (Medium)
items.description: These hand-tufted silk rugs put color center stage. Subtle, uneven texturing adds superficial interest. Environment: 2

items.name: The Meridian
items.description: Who among us doesn’t remember the first time a rug made us cry? Like the greatest symphony, a good rug can make us laugh, cry, and fall in love all at once. Place The Meridian in your home, and feel the fullest extent of every possible human emotion simultaneously. Environment: 2

items.name: Brilliant Brocade
items.description: Add shimmer, sparkle, and a touch of opulence to your living space with a dramatic rug fit for royalty. Environment: 2

items.name: Square Rug
items.description: This is a rug. It has four right angles. It has lines. It is a pretty rug. It will make your home pretty. Environment: 3

items.name: Super Sisal Eco Rugs (Large)
items.description: Woven from eco-friendly natural fibers and available in an assortment of colors, these durable sisal rugs repel stains while attracting unfettered admiration. Environment: 3

items.name: Textural Textiles Rug (Large)
items.description: These hand-tufted silk rugs put color center stage. Subtle, uneven texturing adds superficial interest. Environment: 4

items.name: Outside the Box Modern Rug
items.description: An exciting play of colors and angles makes this rug anything but square. Environment: 4

items.name: Living Color Rug
items.description: Broad brush strokes and a pleasing palette of colors add brightness and energy to any living space. Environment: 4

items.name: Heat Seeker
items.description: This low-profile fireplace will be the focal point of your living room with its sleek lines and designer colors. Environment: 3 Functional Off-the-Grid Eco Footprint Industrial: 5

items.name: Manoir Stone Fireplace
items.description: Manoir believes a fireplace should anchor the room it occupies, with precious treasures arranged on the mantel and only the most tasteful furniture arranged nearby. Environment: 5 Functional Off-the-Grid Eco Footprint Industrial: 5

items.name: Viva Victoriana Fireplace
items.description: In the days when the hearth was the primary heat source and there was no television to stare at, fireplaces served more than one purpose. Relive those days with this gorgeous stone and metal piece. Environment: 7 Functional Off-the-Grid Eco Footprint Industrial: 5

items.name: Mega Wall Hunk
items.description: This octagonal wooden hunk truly gives your home an old fashioned feel. In fact, we programmed our robots to calculate, to within .0001 percent, the most antiquated wall art they could produce. And they came up with this stump! More “caveman” than “arts and crafts,” but hey-our robots always go above and beyond. Environment: 1

items.name: Mega Wall Hanging
items.description: When tasked with creating the Mega Wall Hanging, our robots arrived at this masterful employment of both three straight lines and one curved line, evoking all the complex emotions wrought by the greatest church windows, surf boards and ironing boards of our time. Simple. Yet indescribably profound. Environment: 1

items.name: Pictures, Pictures on the Wall
items.description: A smattering of photos, motivational posters, and other mementos haphazardly tacked up on the wall. Environment: 1

items.name: Pride Flag
items.description: Fly your colors high, and display your pride! Environment: 1

items.name: Neon Parrot Sign
items.description: Every tiki hut needs a colorful neon parrot outside to proclaim that Polly wants to party!

items.name: Circular Neon Tiki Sign
items.description: Turn on this neon wall sign and break out the pupu platters, it’s island paradise time. Watch out for spontaneous conga lines!

items.name: Neon Circle Wall Sign
items.description: Circles represent wholeness, unity, completion. The cycles of life and of the passage of time. The infinite nature of the universe, without beginning and without end. Geometry is cool.

items.name: Row of Coat Hooks
items.description: Mount this elegantly understated coat rack to keep jackets off the floor. Environment: 1

items.name: Wall-Mounted Coat Rack With Shelf
items.description: A tidy little space-saver with a shelf up top and a coat rack underneath. Environment: 1

items.name: Yet Another Wall-Mounted Coat Rack With Shelf
items.description: Still another tidy little space-saver with a shelf up top and a coat rack underneath. Environment: 1

items.name: RAW Oversized Fork and Spoon
items.description: Nothing says “Eat up!” like an oversized fork and spoon. Environment: 1

items.name: Aging Up
items.description: It’s hard to keep up with all the changes when children are learning and growing each day. But never fear, they’ll be moody teenagers before you know it. Environment: 1

items.name: Another Wall-Mounted Coat Rack With Shelf
items.description: Another tidy little space-saver with a shelf up top and a coat rack underneath. Environment: 1

items.name: Shelf Storage Unit with Hangers
items.description: Hang your dress clothes on the handy mounted bar and stash your accessories on the accommodating shelf above. Environment: 1

items.name: Jazzy Saxophone Wall Sign
items.description: The hepcats will be hoppin’ wherever this vintage-style wall sign is displayed.

items.name: Large Award Ribbon
items.description: You won first prize and all you got was this oversized ribbon to hang on your wall. Environment: 2

items.name: Wall-Mounted Garden Hose Reel
items.description: Now your hose will never be mistaken for a garden snake again. Environment: 1

items.name: Pinbacker Wall Art
items.description: Ever wish you could bathe in the sun’s light mere miles from its firey surface? Now you can, with this reflective wall installation! Environment: 1

items.name: Flower of the Dead
items.description: “I think the deceased like flowers, because their noses have nothing better to do… now that they don’t need to drink coffee.” – Olive Specter Environment: 1

items.name: Tetraptych Wall Hanging
items.description: Lay upon the wall in four, Skulls, butterfly, birds to adore. Hanging for the dead I knew, Until my turn to visit you. Environment: 1

items.name: Pink Pig Copper Mold
items.description: There’s nothing like a gelatin casserole in the shape of one of our porcine friends. In the meantime, this makes your kitchen look homey. Environment: 1

items.name: In Session Novelty Chalkboard
items.description: This chalkboard is great for leaving notes and jotting down recipes, but mostly just adding a homey element to a kitchen in which you usually eat pizza you had delivered. Environment: 1

items.name: Three Framed Skeleton Keys
items.description: What arcane doors might these keys unlock? Perhaps it is safer never to know. Environment: 1

items.name: Get Your Jazz On Wall Sign
items.description: Add a little pizazz to your new joint with this neon light sign. It’ll definitely turn heads.

items.name: Copper Cow Mold
items.description: Immortalize Bessie the next time you whip up an ambrosia salad with this lovely classic kitchen decoration. Environment: 2

items.name: Chalkboard Menu
items.description: Head all “What’s for dinner?” queries off at the pass with this large illustrated chalkboard menu. Environment: 2

items.name: Large Cork Board
items.description: A large bulletin board suitable for pinning coupons, flyers, and report cards for easy display. Environment: 2

items.name: Tactical Map
items.description: A rugged metal frame encases this wartime tactical map. Hang it in your house to track your kids, pets, or even those pesky sims you are trying to avoid. Environment: 2 Unlocked at level 6 of the Secret Agent career

items.name: Cactus Cantina Sign
items.description: Every day is taco day at the Cactus Cantina, proclaims this outdoor wall sign.

items.name: Balloons and a Banner
items.description: No party is complete without balloons! The colorful banner is just icing on the cake. You didn’t forget the cake, did you? Environment: 3 Unlocked by completing a birthday part at Silver level or higher

items.name: Apple of Your Eye
items.description: Kindle appetites all around with the scarlet appeal of autumn apples. Hand-painted on actual reclaimed crate wood, this cheery vintage art is as tasty as it is tasteful. With round, rosy fruit kissed by summer’s dew, you’ll have everyone cooing come fall, “How about them apples?” Environment: 2

items.name: Neon Palm Tree Sign
items.description: Transform your rec room into a beachside bar with this colorful neon palm tree sign. Tropical shirts strongly encouraged. Environment: 2

items.name: Orange Squeeze
items.description: What better way to juice up your walls than with this vintage crate art? Feel the sunshine pouring over you like melted butter, imagine the sweet scent of the fragile blossoms and savor the tender fruit dissolving in your mouth. One look and your guests will be instantly transported! Environment: 2

items.name: RAW Cookware Collection
items.description: New from PostRustic, this cookware set comes with its only display rack to ensure your guests know you’re cooking in style. Environment: 2

items.name: Wish in a Dish
items.description: You’ll love dressing up your home with this dainty delight. Each flirty, floral, and fabulously feminine dish is gently nestled in wicked hooks of metal. Intricately designed, with wistful peaks and many naughty embellishments, nothing caters better to true domestic fantasy. Environment: 2

items.name: Curated Cork Board
items.description: This isn’t just any cork board. It’s a well-considered art installment. With flyers and sticky notes and things. Environment: 4

items.name: Postmodern Signature Sign
items.description: An oversized artist’s signature, illuminated and ready to hang on your wall.

items.name: Supreme Freelancer Award
items.description: Celebrate your accomplishments! Display it proudly!

items.name: Sunny Days Wall Décor
items.description: This wall hanging is guaranteed to bring a little sunshine to your wall—and your day. Environment: 2

items.name: Positronic Pro Magnetic Knife Rack
items.description: They say that opposites attract, but this wall-mounted knife rack is right up your alley. It frees up valuable counter real estate while our Positronic technology keeps your blades sharp. Inspiring Décor: 4 Unlocked at level 6 of the Culinary career (Chef branch)

items.name: Better As A Pair Of Paintings
items.description: Why have one trendy pattern and style when you can have two?! Choose from different designs and patterns that wonderfully complement each other.

items.name: An Open Book, Framed
items.description: Book lovers everywhere will adore this literary tome surrounded by an ornate wood frame. The perfect gift for the librarian in your life. Inspiring Décor: 5 Unlocked at level 5 of the Writer career

items.name: Goldora Dove Décor
items.description: When you can’t see the sky, you start to miss everything in it: the sun, moon, stars and birds, of course. Longing for the gentle doves that used to alight outside her window, Princess Cordelia sketched these doves to be crafted from bars of gold. The modern version has been cost-reduced and is made of Goldora instead. Environment: 4

items.name: Vinoteca Bottle Rack
items.description: This wall-mounted vertical bottle rack is so sleek, so stylish, you risk leaving your hard-selected vintages in place lest you disturb the visual order of their arrangement. Inspiring Décor: 5 Unlocked at level 8 of the Culinary career (Mixologist branch)

items.name: Spy Satellite
items.description: A durable and fully functional satellite dish ready to capture radio and television signals from any sim in the world, and maybe even further. Environment: 6 Unlocked at level 6 of the Criminal career (Oracle branch) Unlocked at level 8 of the Secret Agent career (Diamond Agent branch)

items.name: Coat of Arms With Shield and Swords
items.description: One’s home is one’s castle, and no castle is complete without a coat of arms hanging on the wall. Environment: 4

items.name: Executron Personal Stock Ticker
items.description: Sure, any idiot can look at the latest stock prices on a computer. But not just any idiot has the office space to show the world his or her interest in the minute-to-minute fluctuations in stock prices. Focusing Décor: 4 Unlocked at level 7 of the Business career (Investor branch)

items.name: Ordinary Things Shadowbox Display
items.description: You may not be much of a collector, but PostRustic believes you should be able to fake that particular funk with a display that turns regular junk into a work of art. Environment: 5

items.name: The Affirmation
items.description: Look below the surface of things, and there, you will discover their essence. This body? It’s molded from infinite oneness. The mind? It’s birthed from higher consciousness. That shelf? It’s shaped from rusted car parts and old diapers. The Affirmation. Set your bar stuff on the surface of essential trash. Environment: 6

items.name: Polly Wants a Plate Tree
items.description: Princess Cordelia’s pirate boyfriends were all quite fond of their parrots. Every time she acquired a new boyfriend, he commissioned a plate in his parrot’s honor. After her final romance withered, the Princess was stuck with a pile of plates, so she put them in a golden tree and hung it on the galley wall. Environment: 7

items.name: Softy Brand Tissues
items.description: You never know what life has in store. With just one box of Softy tissues, you can be prepared for everything from allergy season to sappy movies to absolute heartbreak. Softy tissues-we’re here for you. Environment: 1

items.name: Pear Essentials Framed Watercolor
items.description: The simply organic beauty of a pear, trapped within the exquisite austerity of a modern chrome frame. Simple, sparkling, stunning! Environment: 1

items.name: Happy Teeth Toothbrush Set
items.description: Keep smiles shiny and bright with Happy Teeth brushes and toothpaste. Comes with a tidy holder for accentuated hygiene. Environment: 1

items.name: Apple of Your Eye Framed Watercolor
items.description: This pure white modern frame fades gracefully into the painting’s white background, making the red of the apple deliciously vibrant and bold. Environment: 1

items.name: Just for Me Bath Basket
items.description: Keep everything you need at your fingertips-and away from everyone else’s. An elegant way to say “MINE” without saying anything. Environment: 1

items.name: A Gathering of Garden Stones
items.description: Not enough for an entire rock garden, this scattering of stones adds visual interest to your outdoor spaces and makes barefoot walking that much more interesting as well. Environment: 1

items.name: Cluttered Mind Box Set
items.description: You’ve got your mind on more important matters than putting your house in order. See? Environment: 1

items.name: Body Care Essentials
items.description: You want your skin to feel and smell marvelous. Achieve your most intimate desires with fragrant hand soaps, rich lotions, and scented talc on hand. Environment: 1

items.name: Pile of Laundry
items.description: Who needs a hamper? Free-form laundry pile can occupy odd-shaped floor plans, spare furniture, and can even be shoved perfunctorily into dresser drawers. Environment: 1

items.name: Men’s Body Care Essentials
items.description: Created exclusively for men, this premium line of body care essentials leaves your skin as soft and sweet as a baby’s, while the robust, hard-edged packaging reassures you you’re still a man. Environment: 1

items.name: Florist’s Dream Starter Kit
items.description: A practical collection of basic tools, to show you really do get your hands dirty. Or at least, your gloves. Environment: 1

items.name: Ceramic Soap Dispenser
items.description: Why clutter the planet with plastic? Store your soap in this elegant dispenser that’s as smart as it is stylish. Environment: 1

items.name: Pencil Holder
items.description: Sharpen your study skills with a cup o’ pencils always at the ready. Environment: 1

items.name: On Phantom Wing Framed Art
items.description: Tickle your fancy with this nature-inspired print. Soft, illusory and delightfully mysterious, it leaves you with a fluttering so delightful, you’ll want to frame it and keep it on your dresser. Environment: 1

items.name: Countertop Kitchen Utensils
items.description: Get cooking with this handy set of countertop cooking utensils. Guaranteed not to scratch your pans-though they do make convenient back scratchers. Environment: 1

items.name: Pritchel Coat Rack
items.description: Free-standing coat rack will sit quietly in the corner and hold your outerwear with nary a protest. Environment: 1

items.name: Lucky Man Folded Laundry
items.description: Nothing smacks of domestic bliss like the scent of freshly folded laundry. Leave a few stacks lying around to get credit for all you do. Environment: 1

items.name: Ceramic Cookie Jar
items.description: Who stole the cookie from the cookie jar? This ceramic storage urn holds enough cookies that nobody will ever have to resort to thievery again. Environment: 1

items.name: Caress Pitcher
items.description: Brighten your kitchen with this rustic ceramic pitcher. With a firm, lovely handle and open mouth, this hunk of clay is ever eager to hold more. Bring on the whisk, the baster, a whole battalion of wooden spoons. It welcomes all with the utmost cheer. Environment: 1

items.name: Pretty as a Pitcher
items.description: Give your wooden spoons a beautiful place to rest. Smooth and inviting, with admirable curves, this glossy pitcher is so lovely, you can’t help but caress its shimmering sides. Cradle its roundness, trace your finger around its rim, then listen as your spoons hit home with a truly pleasing smack. Environment: 1

items.name: Men’s Shoe Rack
items.description: Double shoe rack for the man who has everything -- including more than three pairs of shoes. Environment: 1

items.name: Women’s Shoe Rack
items.description: Double shoe rack with enough space for all your boots, flats, pumps, peep toes, sandals, platforms, mules, wedges, and kitten heels. Environment: 1

items.name: Florist’s Dream Gardening Tools
items.description: Show off your green thumb with this handy basket and tool set-painted with bright flowers that are nearly as cheerful as your own. Environment: 1

items.name: Ladies’ Perfume
items.description: Smell as beautiful as you look-or better! Environment: 1

items.name: Always Polished Nail Polish
items.description: Brush up your look every day with this fanciful array of nail color. Or just leave them around to brighten your house. Environment: 1

items.name: Not So Simple Pen Holder
items.description: It may look like a simple pen holder, nothing out of the ordinary! And that may be true, but look at those lines…that style. It can dress any desk effortlessly and still hold any pen you want. Environment: 1

items.name: The Fairest Trade Crate Display
items.description: PostRustic’s crate display is perfect for decorating a commercial venture or making your breakfast nook look like the chain café down the street. Environment: 1

items.name: Men’s Cologne
items.description: Why rely on natural pheromones? Trigger animal attraction every time with an arsenal of killer cologne. Environment: 1

items.name: “Tray” Chic Perfume Set
items.description: Keep your body scented and boudoir tidy with these fancy perfume bottles and matching tray. Ooh la la! Environment: 1

items.name: Florist’s Dream Antiqued Essentials
items.description: There’s nothing you love more than puttering around your garden, so show it! These garden essentials come with rust and soil already caked on, for that I-really-dig-gardening effect. Environment: 2

items.name: Pro-Quality Knife Block Set
items.description: Every self-respecting cook must have one. Environment: 1

items.name: Llamacorns Team Photo
items.description: Ah, who can forget the fabulous Llamacorn team of ’10 or was it ’12? Maybe ’14? Environment: 3 Unlocked at level 7 of the Athlete career (Professional Athlete branch)

items.name: The Note Book
items.description: For bullet journaling, doodling, drawing, writing, plotting, and many other things. The Note Book, is the book for all notes, all the book you would only need. Environment: 2

items.name: Spice of Life Spice Rack
items.description: Culinary inspiration is always within reach with this attractive spice rack. Designed to showcase the rich colors and varied textures of the many fine spices in your life, the Spice of Life Spice Rack is both practical and profound. Environment: 2

items.name: Stack of CDs
items.description: Remember when you used to need these to listen to music? You do? Then you’re definitely old enough to have these lying around. Focusing Décor: 2 Unlocked at level 7 of the Tech Guru career (eSport Gamer branch)

items.name: Antique Tomes
items.description: These antique leather-bound tomes are proof you’re earning your place in Literary History. Breathe in their fabulous musty odor-it’s the scent of true fame. Inspiring Décor: 5 Unlocked at level 6 of the Writer career (Author branch)

items.name: Painting Canvas Storage Rack
items.description: A practical, wooden storage rack for all your painterly works in progress. Inspiring Décor: 5 Unlocked at level 5 of the Painter career

items.name: Nom de Plume Quill Pen
items.description: Any self-respecting writer would be tickled to receive the Nom de Plume-and now you have it! (If you’re not feeling tickled, lean in closer. It works!) Inspiring Décor: 6 Unlocked at level 8 of the Writer career (Author branch)

items.name: Stack of Canvases
items.description: Half a dozen or so canvasses await their eventual arrival in a museum. Inspiring Décor: 9 Unlocked at level 9 of the Painter career (Patron of the Arts branch)

items.name: Desk Nameplate (Stolen)
items.description: (Found on a sticker on the underside of the nameplate) COMPANY PROPERTY. NOT FOR HOME USE. DO NOT REMOVE. Environment: 3 Unlocked at level 2 of the Business career

items.name: Modernist Paper Towel Dispenser
items.description: If you desire a paper towel dispenser with severe yet functional style, look no further. Environment: 1

items.name: Hotel Folded Bath Towels
items.description: Give your home the feel of a five-star hotel with folded bath towels at the ready. The ultimate escape whenever you need it! Environment: 1

items.name: RAW Utensil Holder
items.description: From PostRustic’s Raw line, this utensil holder brings no-nonsense style to your kitchen counter. Environment: 1

items.name: Toilet Paper Roll Holder
items.description: Holds a single toilet paper roll with both efficiency and aplomb. Environment: 1

items.name: Merry Milkmaid
items.description: Add a touch of old world charm with this rustic iron milk pail. One glimpse, and you can’t help but imagine the merry milkmaid, cheeks flushed in the cold, fresh air of a country morning as she leans against the warm, soft flanks of her cow. A beautiful vision…in a deftly tarnished bucket. Environment: 1

items.name: Caress Stacking Crates
items.description: Why should produce have all the fun? These vintage fruit crates offer ingenious storage for toys, books, curios … anything your heart desires! Stack them up or scatter them about for a dash of country inspiration. The effect is so pleasing, your glee will be uncontainable. Environment: 1

items.name: The Zenith
items.description: This towel rack is the pinnacle of everything we have achieved at Reclamation Homeware. We nearly retired from our art when we saw it, convinced as we were that its design could never be surpassed. Yet the heart may not always listen to what the brain claims to know. We forge ahead! Environment: 1

items.name: Bunchapals Postcard Corkboard
items.description: Getting too many penpals? The Bunchapals Postcard Corkboard will help you manage that growing stack of thoughtful, scenic mementos. Now with free thumbtacks!

items.name: Plastic Laundry Basket
items.description: This simple plastic basket holds a single load of laundry with impeccable elan. Environment: 1

items.name: Towel Storage Rack, Empty
items.description: This simple metal towel rack waits humbly to cradle your carefully curated bath linen collection. Environment: 1

items.name: Geometric Towel Rack
items.description: The severe beauty of this hypogeometric towel rack is a must for those still in the sway of modern architecture’s harsh corners and unwavering lines. Environment: 1

items.name: Robe of the Believer Wall Hook
items.description: Shower safe with this acid-proof bathrobe hook! Never worry about the space squid again! Environment: 1

items.name: Starq Towel Rack
items.description: Simple but hardly unassuming, this rack will hold your towels but never coddle them. Environment: 1

items.name: Towel Storage Rack, Full
items.description: This simple metal towel rack comes pre-stocked with unprepossessing white bath towels suitable for all your shower and bath needs. Environment: 1

items.name: Elemental Display Rack
items.description: Proudly display your element collection of this official Geo Council rack. Now with inert magnetic snap-slots.

items.name: Rectangular Wicker Laundry Hamper
items.description: The perfect combination of ease, curability and unobtrusiveness comes together in this handsome laundry hamper. Environment: 1

items.name: BathBuddy Shower Caddy
items.description: A wall-mounted shower caddy generously sized to accommodate all your shampoos, conditioners, body washes, moisturizers, gels, oils, soaks, salts, polishes, creams, and scrubs, you product fiend you. Environment: 1

items.name: Bowl of Fruit
items.description: Keep healthy snacks on hand, or at least, where other people can see them. Environment: 1

items.name: Terminus Reclaimed Pipe Towel Rack
items.description: Sculpted from reclaimed industrial piping, this towel holder brooks no dissent. None. You will permit it to hold your bath linens and you will like it. Environment: 1

items.name: Fiery Moon Gift Centerpiece
items.description: This decoration was granted for the New Lunar Year of the Pig, starting in February 2019.

items.name: Wealth of the Moon Envelopes
items.description: This decoration was granted for the New Lunar Year of the Pig, starting in February 2019.

items.name: Caress Scented Candles
items.description: Create an air of romance with these vanilla-scented candles. Wonderful for an evening with that special someone, or a bubble bath you, yourself, and you. Environment: 1

items.name: Sycee of the Prosperous Moon
items.description: This decoration was granted for the New Lunar Year of the Pig, starting in February 2019.

items.name: Year of the Pig Statuette
items.description: This decoration was granted for the New Lunar Year of the Pig, starting in February 2019. Every new lunar year, the countryside animals celebrate in a grand hall decorated with symbolic sycees and paper lanterns. This year, the new year arrived without the honoured animal.

items.name: Shelly’s Shells Towel Ring
items.description: A shiny reminder of a day at the beach in your very own WC. Environment: 1

items.name: Brash Tacks Towel Rack
items.description: This splashy towel rack just loves to be admired. Cover it demurely with your plushest towels, but leave the dashing brackets bare to the adoring eye. Environment: 1

items.name: Sea Star Hand Towel Ring
items.description: Stellar as an accompaniment to the Sea Star Bath Towel Holder or as a standalone accent for your guest bath, the Sea Star Hand Towel Ring was designed by Princess Cordelia to replicate a sea star’s powerful grip. It can withstand any amount of tugging, even by untamed pirates. Environment: 1

items.name: Sea Star Bath Towel Holder
items.description: Princess Cordelia had mixed feelings about sea stars, but she did admire their stick-to-itiveness. These royal towel holders have unparalleled grip, and make a stellar addition to any head to loo. Environment: 1

items.name: In the Balance Antique Scale
items.description: This fully functional cost iron scale can be used to ensure absolute fairness in distributing everything from coffee in the morning to dessert at night. Also useful to see your teacup poodle’s weight in gold, to compare apples and oranges, or just to remind visitors of your own sense of justice. Environment: 1

items.name: Condiment Basket
items.description: Dining in? Transform your kitchen into a full-service restaurant with this fanciful condiment kit, complete with customizable menu! Environment: 1

items.name: Tiny Globe
items.description: Nothing says “antique” like the least efficient form of map ever devised by man: the globe! We considered showing all of the continents merged together as Pangaea just to give it that extra, old-fashioned edge but it didn’t test as well. Built by nanobots! Environment: 1

items.name: Antique Urn
items.description: This massive stone urn will add architectural drama to any patio or garden space. Hand-chipped and smashed for added interest and texture, the Antique Urn’s beauty is so astonishing, so stoic, you’ll long to curl up beside it and hear its darkest secrets. Environment: 1

items.name: Countryside Caress Medicine Cabinet
items.description: Expose your most intimate belongings in this antiqued medicine cabinet. Three tidy shelves cradle the secrets to your beauty, while glass double doors allow visitors a looky-loo. Environment: 1

items.name: Pie Chart Presentation
items.description: Pie charts would be better if they came with pie, but at least they have pretty pictures and colors to dull the senses. Focusing Décor: 3 Unlocked at level 5 of the Business career

items.name: The Ornate Beauty
items.description: Use this intricately detailed box to hold onto those precious items that you hold dear.

items.name: Buyer Beware
items.description: This treasure chest will gladly devour your precious items to keep them safe from harm.

items.name: Fine Bowl of Fruit
items.description: Artfully arranged to entice the appetite, these luscious fruits are kind of like having a still life in your drawing room, unless, of course, you upset the bowl. Environment: 2

items.name: Tall Bath Cabinet
items.description: A lot of bathroom storage in a small footprint. Helps keep dangerous medications out of the reach of children and short adults. Environment: 2

items.name: CONCEPT Coffee Mug Rack
items.description: This industrial mug rack from PostRustic is a stunning work of art perfect for displaying the vessels that get you through the morning. Environment: 2

items.name: The Endurn
items.description: The elegant simplicity of this urn is deceptive. Peek inside and discover the subtle scars of time, hints of a furtive past that is so utterly heartbreaking, you’ll want to fill its depths with tears. Now wait. Pause a moment and contemplate your life. Doesn’t it seem marvelous? Environment: 2

items.name: Shoji Screen Room Divider
items.description: A room divider deliberately reminiscent of Japanese shoji screens, perfect for providing the illusion of privacy and separation without actually following through. Environment: 2

items.name: Tiny Tranquility Zen Garden
items.description: Is anyone more useless than a middle manager? Too high up to do work, and too low to make important decisions. At least with our Tiny Tranqulity Zen Garden you’ll be the absolute master of one square foot of sand and artificial pebbles. Focusing Décor: 3 Unlocked at level 6 of the Business career

items.name: Grandmother’s Urn
items.description: Place your loved ones to rest in total dignity, or just pretend you did. One of the most delightful qualities of this pretty little urn is the lid. What could be concealed inside? You’ll cherish the mystery. Environment: 2

items.name: Screen of Secrets
items.description: The Screen of Secrets provides a nice, homey feel with pleasing colors and lovely, hand-painted flowers. But what goes on behind this dainty screen? Why, anything your little imagination can think of… Environment: 2

items.name: Mega Hutch
items.description: The real value in a hutch like this one is in the tiny scratches and tool marks that can only be found on handmade antiques. And thanks to the proprietary AI algorithms used by our furniture-assembling robots, they can recreate these imperfections with maximum precision.

items.name: Caress Upon Caress
items.description: Layer on the delights with this charming étagère. Designed to showcase your most enviable treasures, the four quaint, yet solid, shelves expose all to the admiring eye. Select your most cherished heirlooms and dare to bare them. This discreet display won’t let you down. Environment: 2

items.name: Improbable Ottoman
items.description: Babbling fish? Check. Dirty bathtowel? Check. Stylish yet supremely comfortable footrest? Buy it now! Environment: 1

items.name: Wake Me Up Antique Coffee Pot
items.description: Show off your caffeine commitment by adding this antique coffee pot to your décor. Environment: 2

items.name: Carina Dining Hutch
items.description: Clean contemporary lines characterize this simple dining hutch. Glass doors keep the dust off your dinner plates. Geometry never looked so good. Environment: 2

items.name: Screen of Longing
items.description: Hewn from well-seasoned wood and then left out in the elements to age, this once-regal screen delivers the upmost privacy. Toss off your clothes with carefree abandon, dance and twirl to your hearts’ desire. No one can see you but you. Environment: 2

items.name: Magic PlantSim Stump
items.description: This stump will house the magic beans that have been collected from the PlantSims you’ve met. Place six unique magic beans into the stump nodules, add a little water, and see what happens!

items.name: Kept Spice Rack
items.description: Keep your spices in line with PostRustic’s tabletop spice rack. Environment: 2

items.name: Discreet Divider
items.description: Retreat behind this natural-wood screen to dress or undress in tantalizing seclusion. Delicately carved and embellished with a charming floral print, this sweet divider is the picture of propriety – with only a few slim peepholes to taunt the curious eye. Environment: 2

items.name: In Full Bloom Centerpiece
items.description: Accept this sweet-smelling centerpiece as recognition that your talents have blossomed. Environment: 4 Unlocked from completing wedding event at silver level or higher

items.name: Basic Room Divider
items.description: Use this lightweight portable partition as a room divider, dressing room screen, or simply to hide unsightly piles of junk from prying eyes. Environment: 2

items.name: RAW Bathroom Shelf
items.description: The RAW Bathroom Shelf by PostRustic blends raw metal framing with wooden shelf inlays for an industrial feel in your WC. Environment: 2

items.name: Honeycomb Bottle Holder
items.description: Store your favorite vintages in this tabletop rack inspired by the industrious honeybee and its hexagonal home. Environment: 2

items.name: Captain Rodrigo de Pablo Cask
items.description: Princess Cordelia’s 3rd pirate boyfriend, Captain Rodrigo De Pablo, suffered many injuries aboard the Eppsilon. Once, while fleeing a kraken, the hatch slammed shut on his feet, and he couldn’t stand for weeks. The Princess designed this cask while nursing her sweetheart back to health. With it she could quench his bottomless thirst whilst he lay prone beneath it. Playful Décor: 2 Unlocked at level 6 of the Culinary career (Mixologist branch)

items.name: Home is Where the Hutch Is
items.description: This towering monument declares your love for family, while offering a safe refuge for delicate heirlooms. Its powerful presence, looming height, and solid wood walls are designed to protect the most fragile of china, sheltering it and holding it high above the tumult of pets and tots. Never has china felt so secure, and so at home, in your home. Environment: 2

items.name: VIP Bucket
items.description: Nice! You’re getting the red carpet treatment now Romantic Décor: 5 Unlocked from getting gold level on a date

items.name: Old-Fashioned Camera
items.description: They simply don’t make cameras like they used to. What fine memories were captured by this ten-pound lens--and the person strong enough to lift it. Environment: 3

items.name: Stolen ATM
items.description: Stealing someone’s wallet is peanuts. Stealing an entire ATM is an accomplishment. Give yourself a hand. Playful Décor: 5 Unlocked at level 6 of the Criminal career (Boss branch)

items.name: Royal Crabtree Tea Set
items.description: Princess Cordelia adored crabs almost as much as she adored tea. Nothing was more delightful that seeing them dart about the tide pools in mortal fear of gulls! The Princess designed this tea set to capture the crab’s alacrity. She was working on a version that actually scuttled off, but the plans blew away while she was sipping tea. Environment: 4

items.name: Viney League Encased Scrolls
items.description: Give your degrees gravitas with this fine display. No diplomas necessary-we’ve already included some for you! Environment: 4

items.name: RAW Antique Teapot
items.description: Made from pieces of scrap metal bolted together, this decorative piece might not hold water (or tea), but it looks great on a sideboard. Environment: 4

items.name: Bethan Privacy Partition
items.description: A quaint old-fashioned room divider perfect for preserving your modesty as you slip into something more comfortable. Environment: 4

items.name: Florinda Pergola
items.description: Imagine yourself and your loved ones sitting in cozy chair arrangements, or waiting for the grill to finish up some delicious Parrilla. This colourful pergola will allow for breeze and light sunlight, and will make any space more inviting for all your guests and loved ones. Environment: 4

items.name: Dashing Displays Hutch
items.description: Display your affection for delicate fancies. The Dashing Displays Hutch features deep, welcoming shelves that tenderly cradle your finest china, while permitting your guests a peek at their most admirable assets. A solid double cabinet below shuts away other treasures, creating an air of delicious mystery. Environment: 4

items.name: Executron Desk Pen Set
items.description: Some say that the age of handwriting is over, that those who fail to master today’s newfangled electronic “word processing” devices are fossils. Bah, humbug, we say! Enjoy the deliberate obsolescence of an archaic writing implement today with Executron! Focusing Décor: 4 Unlocked at level 8 of the Business career (Investor branch)

items.name: Dare to Étagère
items.description: Displaying fragile housewares on a submersible can be tricky, as sooner or later you always hit rough water. Inspired by the muscular, sucker-bearing tentacles of undersea cephalopods, this étagère actually clings to the walls and floor wherever it is set, and features discreet suckers on each shelf to secure breakable items. Environment: 5

items.name: Wainscott Gardens Dining Cabinet
items.description: The tastefully weathered wood shelving of this luxury dining cabinet displays your finest heirloom china for all your dinner party guests to properly envy. Environment: 4

items.name: MK-2001 Bookshelf
items.description: A mysterious slab found near a band of chimpanzees has been carved into a unique bookshelf sure to draw attention! Environment: 4

items.name: The Where Should I Go? Ball
items.description: Princess Cordelia was a strong-willed woman. Aboard her submarine, The Eppsilon, she travelled the world, building furniture and stopping at ports to sell her wares. When feeling adventurous, she would spin the globe and say “Where should I go?” Where it stopped, she went. Bring this replica globe into your home. Adventure! Inspiring Décor: 8 Unlocked at level 8 of the Writer career (Journalist branch)

items.name: The Centurion
items.description: With every piece of furniture art designed by Reclamation Homeware, our goal is to remind people of all nations exactly what the human mind is capable of. The Centurion is no exception. It is impossible to gaze upon it and not shed a tear in awe of humanity’s achievements. Environment: 5

items.name: Sea Princess Dining Hutch
items.description: Cups and saucers and chargers, oh my! This fully stocked dining hutch designed by Princess Cordelia is inspired by the very sea itself! The legs are modelled after the shape of an octopus tentacle and the top of the hutch is adorned with a seashell motif. Environment: 6

items.name: Mega Couple Of Books
items.description: People always ask us how to make their MegaMission furniture look well-used without having to interact with it at all. We always recommend that they place the Mega Couple Of Books on their table or desk. It tells people, “Hey, reading is a thing I do, and I often do it around this location!” Environment: 1

items.name: Unicorn Futures Children’s Bank
items.description: A roly-poly unicorn pal who’ll save your little ones’ coins until it’s time for them to smash it to bits to reclaim their cash. Environment: 1

items.name: Pile of Sports Equipment
items.description: An active athlete doesn’t always have time to properly store their sports stuff. A pile by the door will do. Environment: 1

items.name: Muncha-Lunch Box
items.description: Don’t leave home without it. Environment: 1

items.name: Scholarly Stack
items.description: Unlike many unschooled “intellectuals,” you put your books to regular use. Stacks like these are merely the result of one afternoon’s inquiry, a casual attempt to satiate your cavernous curiosity. Environment: 1

items.name: Ladybug Buddy
items.description: Your baby will go buggy for this precious ladybug statuette, even though the statuette is terrified of your baby. Environment: 1

items.name: Bunny Buddy
items.description: Designed to look like fragile porcelain, this little critter is actually built tough from kid-safe synthetics to withstand bumps, bangs, scratches, tornadoes, fire, and packs of savage wolves. Environment: 1

items.name: The Don’t Break Your Back-pack
items.description: Features reinforced seams, a padded base and ergonomic construction so all those books feel light as a feather. Small front zippered pocket has dedicated storage for pens, pencils, gum, and phone. Environment: 1

items.name: Gary Giraffe
items.description: Knock-kneed and duck-footed, Gary teaches children the importance of owning your weirdness, especially if you have a freaky black tongue. Environment: 1

items.name: Denny the Dinosaur
items.description: Drowsy, droopy Denny delights in dancing, drinking, and daydreaming on a dare at dawn. Dauntless Denny dazzles, delivering a divine dash of derring-do. Environment: 1

items.name: Llama Mama
items.description: Originally, designer B.F. Harlow constructed this llama only from wire. However, after some rather disturbing mid-20th century studies on the mother-child bond that used a wire surrogate, he went with this soft plush material instead. Environment: 2

items.name: Robo, The Friendly Circuitry Kit
items.description: Do not be fooled by the friendly or childish appearance of the circuitry kit. This kit means serious business while you work away in your experiment, or repairs. Brush up your skills, or just play around, this kit offers all and does all! Environment: 2

items.name: Classic Wood-Mobile
items.description: While not the classic sports car look, this toy has that toddler favorite style called wood. It’s durable for any crash that might happen while playing. Fun: 6 +Creativity Skill +Social Skill +Imagination Skill

items.name: Pretty Prancing Palomino Pony Toy
items.description: This is a high-quality pony toy for serious aficionados – the kinds of kids who know what “palomino” actually means. Fun: 6 +Creativity Skill +Social Skill +Imagination Skill

items.name: Mrs. Meowness
items.description: Mrs. Meowness is the perfect fat cat for child toys. She may not be lucky, but she is a beautiful kitty. Fun: 6 +Creativity Skill +Social Skill +Imagination Skill

items.name: Speedy Sportscar Toy
items.description: A sporty two-seater ready to zip to the beach, the club, or anywhere the cool dolls go. Fun: 6 +Creativity Skill +Social Skill +Imagination Skill

items.name: Fantasy Carriage Toy
items.description: Whether it’s for the midnight ball, the royal wedding, or simply collecting taxes from the peasants, this stylish carriage is up for the job. Fun: 6 +Creativity Skill +Social Skill +Imagination Skill

items.name: Teresa the Triceratops
items.description: The fiercest herbivore you will ever meet. Don’t cross this dino’s path in a dark alley is all we’re saying. Fun: 6 +Creativity Skill +Social Skill +Imagination Skill

items.name: Blarffy
items.description: Children have the biggest imaginations because they rarely have any notion of what is actually possible. In that spirit, Kindermade brings you Blarffy, the impossibly huge teddy bear! Your child and Blarffy are sure to have a roaring good time. Fun: 5 +Creativity Skill +Social Skill +Communication Skill

items.name: Tiny Teacher Nesting Block
items.description: The Tiny Teacher Nesting Blocks are a perfect way for your toddler to learn about how the world works. Whether they’re practicing to become an architect or just learning colors, these blocks are here for them. +Movement Skill +Thinking Skill

items.name: WaffleKone the Llamacorn Talking Toy
items.description: At Kindermade, we surveyed five hundred children about the perfect name for their toy unicorn. At least 75% of them suggested some kind of dessert-related word. Next time we’ll conduct the survey after their snack time. Introducing, WaffleKone the Llamacorn! Fun: 6 +Creativity Skill +Social Skill +Imagination Skill

items.name: Mr. Blue Bear
items.description: This soft, cuddly bear is perfect for toddlers and kids alike. Teaching your kids to bond with inanimate objects is the first step towards creating a materialistic teenager. Fun: 6 +Creativity Skill +Social Skill +Imagination Skill

items.name: Ducky
items.description: This rubber ducky is always ready to play…just not in the water. Fun: 6 +Creativity Skill +Social Skill +Imagination Skill

items.name: Tentacle Tom
items.description: Scary, yet cuddly! Your child will love playing with their tentacle friend in the sea of imagination. Fun: 6 +Creativity Skill +Social Skill +Imagination Skill

items.name: Moon Panda Toy
items.description: This toy was granted for the New Lunar Year of the Pig, starting in February 2019.

items.name: The Purple Pursuer Action Figure
items.description: This fully-articulated replica of The Purple Pursuer is ready to fight crime, battle villains, and save the world. Fun: 6 +Creativity Skill +Social Skill +Imagination Skill

items.name: The Purple Protector Action Figure
items.description: This fully-articulated replica of The Purple Protector is ready to fight crime, battle villains, and save the world. Fun: 6 +Creativity Skill +Social Skill +Imagination Skill
