items.description: The team at Kindermade simultaneously produced a giant stuffed dragon and a giant stuffed dinosaur. We often got them confused! Here’s one of them. The dinosaur? Looks like a dinosaur. Fun: 5 +Creativity Skill +Social Skill +Communication Skill

items.name: Butterfly McButterflyface
items.description: It doesn’t actually fly, but if it did how majestic would that be? It’s not a problem since the imagination of a child can turn any ordinary object into a mythical creature with a funny name. Fun: 6 +Creativity Skill +Social Skill +Imagination Skill

items.name: Lump of Clay
items.description: A simple lump of clay awaits you. Fun: 4

items.name: Fully Functional Helicopter Toy
items.description: This chunky helicopter toy will help children fulfil all their fantasies of medical rescues, military and police operations, and traffic reporting. Fun: 6 +Creativity Skill +Social Skill +Imagination Skill

items.name: Bun Bun
items.description: What do rabbits have to do with eggs? You’ll have to ask this adorable fellow! Fun: 6 +Creativity Skill +Social Skill +Imagination Skill Unlocked by completing the Decorative Eggs collection

items.name: Chompy the Monsta
items.description: A recent arrival from the Land Past Time, Chompy is a curious but friendly monster who wants to play with your child. Constructed of nontoxic plastic, Chompy will last for generations. Fun: 6 +Creativity Skill +Social Skill +Imagination Skill

items.name: Home for Two Dollhouse
items.description: This small but loveable dollhouse was built perfectly for two dolls. They will never go hungry with such an amazing kitchen, okay maybe it’s because they’re toys, but we can pretend. Fun: 6 +Creativity Skill +Imagination Skill

items.name: Dino
items.description: The team at Kindermade simultaneously produced a giant stuffed dragon and a giant stuffed dinosaur. We often got them confused! Here’s one of them. The dragon? Looks like a dragon. Fun: 5 +Creativity Skill +Social Skill +Communication Skill

items.name: The Pandora
items.description: The Pandora is Kindermade’s premier storage solution for your tot’s toys. Not only will it keep the playthings from taking over your house like a horde of escaped demons, but this model is lead-free up to the specifications of our factory’s home country!

items.name: Modern Life Dollhouse
items.description: The folks at Kindermade have made their fantasy home just for you. This dollhouse features modern amenities like refrigeration, indoor plumbing, electricity, and more! Your doll family will have all the luxuries of a modern middle class life, without all the angst and ennui your parents have. Fun: 5 +Creativity Skill +Imagination Skill

items.name: Bleep the Robot
items.description: It walks, it talks, it calculates digits of pi for fun. Bleep the Robot will be your child’s best – and smartest – friend. Fun: 6 +Creativity Skill +Social Skill +Imagination Skill

items.name: Chomper The Devourer
items.description: Chompy the Monsta’s big cousin who loves to eat toys. Chomper is happy to hold onto toys for any child that needs a space to clean up their messy room.

items.name: Uni
items.description: The first horned animal you can’t wait to snuggle! (Its magic is in its horn!) Fun: 6 Environment: 2 +Creativity Skill +Social Skill +Communication Skill

items.name: Realistic Princess Doll Castle
items.description: Every princess doll deserves a medieval-style castle complete with turrets, arrow slits and, of course, a dank, windowless dungeon (not pictured). Fun: 6 +Creativity Skill +Imagination Skill

items.name: Victorian Dollhouse
items.description: This classic dollhouse will transport your dolls back to the Victorian Age, a wonderful time when women wore corsets, men wore bowlers, and children were industrious and hardworking. Some of these values are still held today on the Kindermade Factory Fun Floor! Fun: 7 +Creativity Skill +Imagination Skill

items.name: Amateur Hour Child’s Violin
items.description: No need to break the bank on your child’s first violin. Let’s just make it look fun and exciting, in nice bright colors, since it probably won’t sound so good for a while. Only for use by children. Fun: 3 +Creativity Skill

items.name: Junior Wizard Starter Set
items.description: Boiling points! Catalysts! Exothermal reactions! A child with an authentic science experiment set has a 624% increased chance of getting into the best colleges. Fun: 6 +Mental Skill

items.name: Creative Art Thou Activity Table
items.description: Child prodigy… or just the lucky owner of a Creative Art Thou Activity Table? Unlock your children’s genius and keep them positively busy with this pre-assembled table and chair set. Materials and talent not included. Fun: 6 +Creativity Skill

items.name: True Prodigy Child’s Violin
items.description: Your child is destined for greatness, and you’ll give anything to ensure their prodigious talents are realized. This violin-this is their ticket. Spare no expense. Only for use by children. Fun: 3 +Creativity Skill

items.name: Rock-a-bye Bassinet
items.description: Hush your little baby to sleep in this sweeter-than-anything bassinet. Extra-high sides keep baby secure while providing extra sound proofing, so Mommy or Daddy can sleep like a baby, too!

items.name: Kid’s Table Light
items.description: Worried about the “tone” in your kids’ room? Lighten up with this lovely table light! Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Happy Panda Table Lamp
items.description: Brighten baby’s day with this adorable panda table lamp! The culturally savvy parasol raises baby’s world awareness, brightening up your baby, too. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Kid’s Soccer Ball Light
items.description: Is better lighting a GOAL in your kids’ room? Give it a real KICK with this sporty table light! (It’s a soccer ball.) Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: 3 Senses Oil Lamp
items.description: Light bulbs are good for a lot of things, but they haven’t come close to replicating the rich, golden ambiance of a true antique oil lamp, until now. Handcrafted in the artisan tradition, this electric-powered lamp casts the same flickering lamplight, warmth and even smell of yesteryear’s kerosene companions. Battery compartment is concealed in the base for a cord-free effect. Functional Off-the-Grid

items.name: Dodecagon Contemporary Lamp
items.description: Did you know that a 12-sided polygon is called a dodecagon? Enlighten yourself with this modern lamp. Sweetly simple, its minimal design is a lovely complement to any contemporary living space. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: The Definitive
items.description: Just like flames, we are born into this world, we grow, we dance, and eventually we disappear in a curl of sharp-smelling smoke. Set fire to The Definitive, by Reclamation Homeware, and add your light to the world. Functional Off-the-Grid

items.name: Bright Idea Robot Lamp
items.description: Imagine, if robots could actually think, what bright ideas they’d have! This playful little bot is a glowing addition to any tot’s desk or nightstand. Simply flip the switch for a brilliant idea that lights up the room. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Return Desklight
items.description: Modeled after the boomerang that incapacitated a president! Some journalist’s harmless joke, or a global conspiracy? You decide! Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Angling for Light Mission-style Lamp
items.description: The remarkable quality of this lamp’s craftmanship shines through every slatted angle and casts your incredible taste onto every wall of the room. Illuminate your brilliance, only with the Angling for Light. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Personal Spotlight Desk Lamp
items.description: Strike a pose and shine! This handy desk lamp can be re-positioned however you like, so you can shine a light on your best work and leave the rest in shadow. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: The Sovereign
items.description: Innocent jellyfish or malicious alien lifeform? You decide, with this great conversation-starter! Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Never Ending World Adventures Award
items.description: In honor of your world travels, your Sims can bask in the glow of this ambient lamp, available only in the most culturally sensitive of colors. Confident Décor: 4 Only available if you own The Sims 3: World Adventures expansion pack

items.name: Shine On Ambitions Award
items.description: You’ve got Ambitions, so you should be proud. But you’ll be even prouder of this shimmering lamp, which would outshine someone less, well, ambitious. Inspiring Décor: 4 Only available if you own The Sims 3: Ambitions expansion pack

items.name: UV Light Late Night Award
items.description: Congratulations! The UV Light Award was designed especially for Sims who love the night life, and so maybe miss seeing this thing called the sun. Casting gentle beams of UV light, this aptly named award ensures your Sims get enough Vitamin D, without daytime waking. Romantic Décor: 4 Only available if you own The Sims 3: Late Night expansion pack

items.name: Beacon of Ages Generations Award
items.description: This lamp of recognition is fitted with a self-charging battery and NeverDie internal bulb, so your name can be illuminated for many Generations to come. Environment: 4 Only available if you own The Sims 3: Generations expansion pack

items.name: Paws Anonymous Pets Award
items.description: Let your love for Mother Nature’s creatures shine for all the world to see! As a proud Pets owner, you deserve nothing less. Playful Décor: 4 Only available if you own The Sims 3: Pets expansion pack

items.name: Your Name in Lights Showtime Award
items.description: All the world’s a stage—and now your Sims have their very own spotlight! Cherish this brightly burning lamp, and take a bow in its beam. Bravo! Confident Décor: 4 Only available if you own The Sims 3: Showtime expansion pack

items.name: Enchanted Aurora Supernatural Award
items.description: Believe in the power of magic, and the gentle glow of this mysterious lamp will cast a spell over all who venture near. Well, not really. But it’s designed to look like it would. Inspiring Décor: 4 Only available if you own The Sims 3: Supernatural expansion pack

items.name: Whatever the Weather Seasons Award
items.description: This rain-repellant, wind-resistant, UV-protected lamp can withstand temperatures as high as 200oF and as low as -30oF, so your Sims can enjoy it in any season. Hooray! Environment: 4 Only available if you own The Sims 3: Seasons expansion pack

items.name: Alma Mater University Life Award
items.description: You created so many college memories. This luminescent Alma Matter Award is a special reminder of all your Sims learned, failed to learn or already forgot from University. May it shine forever! Focusing Décor: 4 Only available if you own The Sims 3: University Life expansion pack

items.name: Tiki Topper Island Paradise Award
items.description: Brighter than a tiki torch, and clearer than crystal tropical waters, this incandescent award is a happy reminder of Paradise. Playful Décor: 4 Only available if you own The Sims 3: Island Paradise expansion pack

items.name: Time Travelers Into the Future Award
items.description: You’ve been to the future and back again—and all you have to show for it is this award-lamp-thingy. And the memories…ah yes, the memories. Focusing Décor: 4 Only available if you own The Sims 3: Into The Future expansion pack

items.name: Nerves of Steel Desk Lamp
items.description: This virtually indestructible lamp casts its unflinching glare wherever you direct it. Let it shine down from a discreet distance, or intensify the effect by lowering it close to your target. Confident Décor: 4 Unlocked at level 5 of the Secret Agent career

items.name: The Soothelight
items.description: Many lamp experts agree that comfort begins with lighting, specifically the lighting that comes from lamps. To give your home a perfectly pleasing aura, try turning on the Soothelight. One flick of your finger and you can feel all your inhibitions melt away. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Royal Embrace Table Lamp
items.description: Imagine yourself in the presence of royalty. Slowly the queen steps toward you, the flounces of her gown quivering as she offers a kiss to each of your cheeks. The Royal Embrace table lamp is evocative of such a moment. Curvaceous, be ribboned and elegant, with regal fleur-de-lis, it casts a royally cold light that is nonetheless enviable. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: In the Raw Industrial Table Lamp
items.description: Pounded into a rugged circle, this lamp’s hammered steel frame retains the marks of every blow and the bulge of every bolt, staying true to the hands that built it. The three stark bulbs cast an unrelenting circle of light, illuminating the world with raw authenticity. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: A Story of Three Candles
items.description: Three candles who stand still, save their flickering lights, sought refuge from the impending night. Said one to three, the tallest was he, excuse me please, but I don’t see why we should fear the night, we shine, we glow, we light up so bright. Said three to one, the smallest of thee, it is true we shine so bright, but my wicks height is low, and soon, out of sight. Functional Off-the-Grid

items.name: The Resplendent
items.description: Can a piece of furniture make you cry? We don’t mean if you hit your knee on it, we mean through its startling beauty and truth. When we first saw The Resplendent we cried for days, loudly and with no consideration for anyone around us. That’s what REAL lamps do. From Reclamation Homeware. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Jellyfish Bell Table Lamp
items.description: While her submarine was docked, Princess Cordelia enjoyed some fresh air on the deck. Looking down she saw the glow of millions of jelly fish. It was breathtaking. Inspired by that moment, she designed this lamp and brought the shape and glow of the jellyfish bell to you. Aren’t you glad she didn’t include tentacles? Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Let There Be Plumbobs Award
items.description: As a thank-you for joining us for our third trip around the sun as well as embarking on this new adventure, let this lamp light up your Sims’ world. Power Consumption Rating: 10 Only available if you own The Sims 3

items.name: Scallop Table Lamp
items.description: Princess Cordelia tried scallops for the first time while aboard her submarine. Cooked in garlic, they were the most delicious thing she had ever eaten. She was thankful for the experience and in honor of the poor scallop that lost its life, she designed this lamp. So touching! Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Mega Table Lamp
items.description: Thanks to the mass-produced antiques from MegaMission Furniture Warehouse, you can own a handsome, mission-style table lamp that’s exactly as unique as everyone else’s! Each scuff mark and rough edge was carefully placed according to our proprietary imperfection algorithm for maximum quaintness. How charming! Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Sea Star Table Lamp
items.description: Sea stars occasionally stuck themselves to the portholes of the submersible, rather annoyingly blocking the light, not to mention the view. Determined not to let her irritation get the better of her, Princess Cordelia created a lamp that is a glorious tribute to the sea star-with squat, pointy legs that can actually regenerate when harmed. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Long John Buttercups Table Lamp
items.description: Whenever Princess Cordelia’s Submarine dove or rose, she enjoyed watching the lights briefly flicker. This particular lamp was named after Princess Cordelia’s first pirate boyfriend, Captain Long John Buttercups. He always said this lamp reminded him of his old galleon. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Ultimate Freezer Bunny Award
items.description: Bravo! Your Sims 3 adventures have earned you a trophy so large, your Sim can barely caress its shimmering pinnacle. But they can pat the Freezer Bunny, or hug the llama, or curl up below it in sheer wonderment. Beautiful, isn’t it? Environment: 10 Only available if you own The Sims 3 and all the expansion packs

items.name: Kid’s Floor Light
items.description: Worried about the “tone” in your kids’ room? Lighten up with this adorable floor light! Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Sunbather Lamp
items.description: Is there anything more serene than lying on a grassy hill in the countryside under the warm rays of a mid-morning sun? Bring serenity home with the Sunbather lamp, which shines so brightly you’ll swear you can feel its warm light all over your skin. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: A Lamp Named Claudine
items.description: This pillar fixture sports a trio of multicolored lampshades ready to get the party started. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Lumpen Lumeniat Pillar Lamp
items.description: A minimalist pillar lamp for all your unobtrusive lighting needs. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Lunatech Floor Lamp With Shade
items.description: Sleek contemporary lines mean you’ll never use this lampshade as a party hat. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Portola Pillar Lamp
items.description: The severe lines of this floor lamp provoke a stylish anxiety balanced by the soothing effect of its cool blue lampshade. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: You’ve Got the Light
items.description: Green is the color of growth, of spring, of safety. Green lighting helps restore depleted energy and subtly implies permission for all sorts of esoteric activities in your home. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Two Thousand Ounces of Gold Under the Sea
items.description: Dating pirates did have perks for Princess Cordelia. Birthday presents were usually flashy and made of gold. Such was the case for this candelabra, made of two thousand ounces of gold. Now released for mass market, it’s made of brass. Functional Off-the-Grid

items.name: Totality Tripod Floor Lamp
items.description: Reclamation Homeware presents a floor lamp that’s proud to be an overgrown desk lamp. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: The Arcadia
items.description: Is it a lamp? A shelf? A work of art? So many questions! Here’s a question for you: why does it have to “be” anything? Defy your compulsion to define everything you see and just let The Arcadia BE whatever it will be. The Arcadia: the new lamp from Reclamation Homeware. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Long John Buttercups Floor Lamp
items.description: Whenever Princess Cordelia’s Submarine dove or rose, she enjoyed watching the lights briefly flicker. This particular lamp was named after Princess Cordelia’s first pirate boyfriend, Captain Long John Buttercups. He always said this lamp reminded him of his old galleon. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Mega Floor Lamp
items.description: Our floor lamp incorporates everything that makes mission design great. It’s a celebration of straight lines and clean angles, the kind of perfect simplicity that can only be achieved by a warehouse of furniture crafting precision robots. Each mica shade is lovingly assembled by micabots, or would be if robots could feel love. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Anti-Lift Balloons
items.description: These anchored balloons won’t float away like a normal balloon. No need to tie them to your child’s wrist… they’re already tied to the ground. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Cornerstone Lamp
items.description: There’s a certain comfort gifted to us by reliable furniture, such as our stoic Cornerstone lamp. Wherever you need light it will stand, tall and firm, shining forth its brilliant light. It will never tire and never yield for as long as we desire. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Lemonade on a Sunny Day Torchiere
items.description: When life gives you lemons, turn on this lamp. You’ll be lounging in a hammock in no time. Power Consumption Rating: 10 Inspiring Décor: 2 Unlocked at level 9 of the Culinary career (Mixologist branch)

items.name: Flegel Studio Floor Lamp
items.description: Powerful studio-quality lighting illuminates all your artistic endeavors. Still life included. Power Consumption Rating: 10 Inspiring Décor: 3 Unlocked at level 10 of the Painter career (Master of the Real branch)

items.name: Gastown Outdoor Wall Light
items.description: Budget-friendly outdoor lighting for when you want all illumination, no ambiance. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: The Animus
items.description: Like a constellation, our lives take shape as lines traced between experiences. We live. We move forward. We love. We move forward. We trip over a garden hose and fall to the ground, weeping. We turn on a light—and move forward. The Animus outdoor path lamp, by Reclamation Homeware. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: MothBGone Outdoor Lamp
items.description: This inexpensive outdoor post lamp doubles as a bug-zapper. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Lloyd Outdoor Wall Sconce
items.description: Sooner or later, everyone needs an understated tube of light. Clean lines and modern styling give this outdoor sconce an air of quiet ennui. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Mega Wall Lantern (Deluxe)
items.description: When you see the fine craftsmanship of our deluxe Mega Wall Lantern, you’ll want to shake hands with the talented robots who put it together. We can’t let you, though, because they would pulverize every bone in your hand. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Mega Garden Lamp (Upright)
items.description: The real beauty of antiques is the unique quirks and imperfections they possess. Every antique garden lamp we produce is specially weathered on our assembly lines for a look that is truly one in a million. Sorry… of. One OF a million. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Mega Garden Lamp (Hanging)
items.description: MegaMission Warehouse lighting fixtures have to be both beautiful and functional. That’s why every single lamp we sell is carefully hand-crafted by our precision robots. Well, we say “hand…” They really have more of a spatula/clamp combination. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: The Superlative
items.description: All our lives, we are trained to stifle our true nature. To punch a time clock. To mortgage away our vitality. At Reclamation Homeware, we defy false desires. We live in a world lit only by the light of the soul’s true purpose—and by these super hip pathway lamps. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Colonial Outdoor Wall Lamp
items.description: Elegant colonial style informs this delicate outdoor wall lamp. The founding fathers would be proud. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Terrestrial Saucers
items.description: You probably won’t fear an invasion from outer space with these outdoor lights, but you may wonder if subterranean aliens are coming to visit. At least they’ll be able to see where they’re going! Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Outdoor Ground Light
items.description: Specifications for Outdoor Ground Light: Outdoor. Ground. Light. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Salem Outdoor Lamp
items.description: This Victorian-style swan-neck hanging outdoor lamp from the Salem Collection keeps ruffians and rogues at bay. Raccoons too. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Moonflower Outdoor Post Lamp
items.description: Trompe l’oeil LED lighting mimics a flower in shape, but shines like the moon after dark. Perfect for late-blooming garden parties. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Mega Wall Lantern (Basic)
items.description: Furniture is art. And no one knows art better than the programmers who invented the AI algorithms for our furniture-crafting robots. That’s why every MegaMission Wall Lantern that rolls off the line looks just as artistic as the thousands before and after it. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Warzau Outdoor Wall Lamp
items.description: A sturdy outdoor wall fixture that seethes with industrial chic. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Georgina Outdoor Lamppost With Double Hanging Planter
items.description: Add a touch of floral color to your lighting design with this Queen Anne-style lamppost adorned with two hanging baskets suitable for planting. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Dispersive Lamp
items.description: An abstract recreation of the famous prism experiment. Where spectronomy first began! Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Kid’s Wall Light
items.description: Worried about the “tone” in your kids’ room? Lighten up with this awesome wall light! Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: The Aeon
items.description: There’s a reason the light bulb is the symbol of inspiration. Who hasn’t felt that “aha” moment when presented with an exquisitely designed and yet practically lighting feature? The Aeon was specifically designed for you to stand beneath in quiet contemplation. Find your Aha. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Dollop o’ Light
items.description: Like a sweet spoonful of whipped cream, sometimes the richest comforts come from just a touch of joy. The Dollop o’ Light will fill your home with perfect little spoonfuls of light. And just to keep you grounded, each warm glow is supported by a naughty little curl of cold iron. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Lightbox Wall Fixture
items.description: Add a splash of light to any wall with this casual modern sconce. Cascading down from a brushed nickel box, the slightly flared linen shade evokes angled rays of light, but adds nothing more, being minimal and all. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Angling for Light Candle Sconce
items.description: The true artisan craftsmanship of this wall sconce is made ever more apparent by the faux-candle fixture behind its angled frame. At once elegant and rustic, its gentle flickering light creates just the right ambiance for Mission-style homes of unparalleled taste. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Coolala, The Defender Wall Light
items.description: The mystical and alluring Coolala has transformed into a wall light to protect your child’s dreams. Don’t let its cute appearance fool you. Coolala. The Defender, is a force to be reckoned with against all kinds of monsters with its blinding light… especially the ones under the bed. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: The Chimera
items.description: We understand the instinct to turn away from The Chimera. Furniture design this fearless can be startling, but we urge you not to back down. Stare directly into the light of this indomitable fixture and understand: you can be fearless, too. Own The Chimera. Tame The Chimera. Reclamation Homeware. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Unforgiving Light Wall Sconce
items.description: Frigid steel, icy glass, and the cold, cold glow of LED lighting casts clarity on all who pass beneath. Unfinished styling complements our full industrial collection, for the ultimate in urban chic. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: The Harmonic
items.description: Birthed from recycled didgeridoo parts, the Harmonic tube light fuses the glow of tomorrow’s purpose with the essential vibrations of what has come to pass. Witness that middle space. Be an instrument. Find the bathroom in the middle of the night. The Harmonic, by Reclamation Homeware. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Beam Team Vanity Light
items.description: In a good relationship, the spotlight is shared, so this intelligent light fixture provides not one, not three, not five lights, but two-the perfect number, the ultimate balance: a light for each loving party, held together by a cold metal box. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Luniverse Outdoor Wall Sconce
items.description: Looks like UFO, shines like a beacon. Galvanized aluminium plus a LED light source make for an affordable outdoor lighting option. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Naked Truth Fluorescent Light
items.description: This blindingly bright light doubles as a white noise machine since its low hum is actually somewhat soothing. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Glowstone Lamp
items.description: Luminescent stone from the depths of the earth! Ponder its mysterious origins and geochemical makeup while brushing your teeth! Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Anemone Wall Sconce
items.description: Princess Cordelia was known to lounge by a tide pool for hours, just watching the fragile beauty entrapped within. One of her favorite creatures was the anemone, its petal-like tentacles waving innocently as it waited to ensnare its lunch. With subtle curls and an organic, unassuming form, this elegant wall sconce was created in the anemone’s honor. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: The Cutlass of Light
items.description: Disguised as modern lighting design, this beautiful light doubles as a secret weapon. Of course, you may need some practice channeling its power. It’s a slippery slope to darkness. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Oceanic Wall Torchiere
items.description: This dramatic wall sconce is so reminiscent of a golden conch, guests may crowd around to hear the sea. Don’t let them try it. The brass mounting gets incredibly hot, so all they’ll hear is their own yelp of pain. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Picture Perfect Art Lighting
items.description: Why buy fine art if no one can see it? Shine a light on your own fabulous taste with this wall-mounted art lamp. Got bad art? Splurge on a light anyway, and everyone will think it’s amazing. Inspiring Décor: 2 Unlocked at level 2 of the Painter career

items.name: Athena’s Shield Wall Sconce
items.description: Light up your walls and protect them, too, with this indestructible resin wall sconce banded with titanium. Deep U-shape provides maximum wall coverage while diffusing the light to discourage attackers. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Sea Glass Wall Sconce
items.description: The glass of this wall sconce was once clear and crisp. A special machine on the Lady Cordelia’s Submarine processes the glass and gives it this opaque, soft feel. The machine blasts the glass with sand, salt, and steam which weathers this sconce in the same way as natural sea glass. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Beauty in a Box Mission Lighting
items.description: Never has a simple box contained so much beauty. With slender slats running up, down and straight across its glowing white interior, this Mission-style wall sconce adds a touch of classic elegance to your dining or living space. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Old Life Gas Lamp
items.description: When Princess Cordelia designed this lamp, she was feeling nostalgic for the land she left behind. While sitting in the workshop on her submersible, the Eppsilon, she thought of the dimly-lit gas lights that lined the streets and the silhouettes of women in long dresses and men in top hats walking by. Sigh. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Me, Oh, Me, Oh, Me Vanity Lighting
items.description: Whether you’re putting on makeup or shaving away nighttime stubble, it’s essential to see yourself in the best possible light. This three-light fixture not only illuminates every flaw, but erases it. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: AquaGlow Pool Light
items.description: The AquaGlow lends vibrant underwater illumination to your pool for safe swimming at night. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Cast Iron Flood Light
items.description: It can get dark under the sea, particularly when pirates keep toppling into your lamps. This cast iron wall sconce is nearly indestructible, especially when mounted above hat-level. It casts a light so intense that Princess Cordelia’s 2nd pirate boyfriend was known to use it for tanning, until she dumped him for being so vain. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Cup O’ Light Wall Sconce
items.description: Why clutter up your room with standing lamps when you could have a Cup O’ Light radiating from every wall? Each faux-alabaster sconce casts a glow so delectable, you’ll drink up the effect… and crave more. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Long John Buttercups Wall Sconce
items.description: Whenever Princess Cordelia’s Submarine dove or rose, she enjoyed watching the lights briefly flicker. This particular lamp was named after Princess Cordelia’s first pirate boyfriend, Captain Long John Buttercups. He always said this sconce reminded him of his old galleon. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: The Ignite
items.description: At Reclamation Homeware, we banish the word “price,” in favor of “value.” We defy “products” and present you with “tools.” We terminate our “employees” and hire our “friends.” We transform your “money” into “light” with the Ignite. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Plank Perfection Wall Light
items.description: Embrace the beauty of a simple plank and let its gorgeous symmetry shine forth. Recommended for extremely narrow hallways, small rooms, and other places where space is at a premium. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: The Quetzal
items.description: In our ongoing quest to shine the light of human progress into darkness wherever it may lie, The Quetzal is our radiant silver sword. A literal bringer of light, it serves as a beacon, a promise of the brilliance man can achieve. From Reclamation Homeware. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: The Cage Outdoor Lighting
items.description: You never can tell when someone will steal your light. Constructed of rugged, unyielding metal, this theft-proof iron cage puts your lighting literally behind bars-a blunt reminder of what will happen should anyone think of taking it. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Ice Droplet Sconce
items.description: On a cold winter’s day, Princess Cordelia would ask her pilot to bring the submarine up to the surface. She loved watching water droplets freezing so beautifully as they dripped from the Eppsilon’s hull. To commemorate and recapture that moment, she designed this wall sconce. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Bunker Be Bright Wall Light
items.description: If your space is devoid of natural light, get the next best thing: the Bunker Be Bright. Not even pretending to be attractive, these steel-caged monstrosities cast a cold fluorescent glow that doubles as a repellent against zombies and vampires. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Tunicate Wall Sconce
items.description: If you can’t live under the sea like Princess Cordelia, bring the ocean life to you! The Tunicate Wall Sconce is modelled after one of the most beautiful types of sea sponges. It was Princess Cordelia’s favorite sconce. She often parked her submarine outside a reef and just soaked in the sea life, metaphorically. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Bartleby Outdoor Wall Sconce
items.description: If you’re nostalgic for the glow of gaslight but hate the explosions, this Victorian-style electric outdoor sconce is for you. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: The Subtle Saucer Light
items.description: The Subtle Saucer is an ideal choice for those looking to illuminate their surroundings discreetly. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: The Super Subtle Saucer Light

items.name: Astro Solar System Light

items.name: Kid’s Ceiling Light

The word “can’t” is not recognized at Reclamation Homeware, and anyone who says it is fired. And the light we “couldn’t” make? We did. Power Consumption Rating: 10

items.name: Jett Pendant Lamp

items.name: Snöball Pendant Lamp

items.name: The Serendipity

items.name: The Serendipity (2)

items.name: One Cloudy Day

items.description: Hey, parents! Here’s a cool way to teach your kids how to tell time even when your tablet’s battery is dead! Tiny mechanical “hands” slowly rotate around the clock, pointing to the numbers representing the current time. Funducational!

items.description: Did you know that a 12-sided polygon is called a dodecagon? Now you do. Makes sense for a clock with no numbers, don’t you think?

items.name: Industrial Wall Clock
items.description: This industrial steel wall clock looks virtually indestructible, and it is if it doesn’t fall off your exposed brick wall, onto whatever industrial-grade flooring you probably have to go with it. So hang it well, k?

items.name: The Sentinel

items.name: Sea Captain’s Clock

items.name: Remembrance Clock

Food Quality: 3 Power Consumption Rating: 2 Reliability: 3 +Cooking Skill

Luckily one of Cordelia’s pirate boyfriends had an amazing cook aboard his galleon. While purely for decoration, this copper hood helped the new cook feel at home.

There are some moments we just know our lives will never be the same. The Noblesse stove hood, by Reclamation Homeware.

items.name: Postilion Ceiling-Mounted Range Hood

items.name: Copperrrr and Otherrr Metal Stove Hall – Ceiling
items.description: Princess Cordelia wanted to take her beloved chef, Matilda, aboard her submarine, but she was unwilling to leave her family behind. Luckily one of Cordelia’s pirate boyfriends had an amazing cook aboard his galleon. While purely for decoration, this copper hood helped the new cook feel at home.

items.description: Breathe easy as you cook up a storm. Designed for any island-based cooking range, this hood doubled as a ventilation system to purge the entire submersible of pirate smells.

items.name: Super Sucker Range Hood
items.description: This island range hood may look rustic, but its sucking power is so forceful, you may want to wait until after seasoning to turn it on full blast. Oh, and secure any teacup poodles and small children. That could suck.

items.name: Discretion Stove Hood
items.description: Compact, understated and silent as a whisper, this covert stove hood takes care of your dirtiest business without breathing a word to anyone. Environment: 2 Unlocked at level 10 of the Culinary career (Chef branch)

items.name: Breath of Fresh Air Stove Hood
items.description: Breathe in the fresh country air without a hint of smoke or odors. This charming stove hood whisks the air clean, so you can bask in sweeter aromas than whatever you just tried to cook. Environment: 2

items.name: Double Whoosh! Ceiling Stove Hood
items.description: A taller version of our original, this charming metallic stove hood is traditional and efficient. Environment: 2

items.name: Pro Performance Range Hood
items.description: Want to be a great chef? Start by looking like one. This high-performance stainless steel range hood makes quick work of smoke, grease, odors and any doubts guests might have. Environment: 2 Unlocked at level 10 of the Culinary career (Chef branch)

items.name: Wall-Mounted Modern Stove Hood
items.description: With bold angular lines and European styling, this high-power stove hood sweeps your kitchen into the modern era, while sweeping out smoke and smells. Environment: 2

items.name: Close Quarters Range Hood
items.description: This stove hood was invented by Princess Cordelia to keep her submersible from filling with smoke. Of course, it required a pretty long vent when she was leagues under the sea, but the modern version comes with everything you need. Environment: 2

items.name: Steely Fan Range Hood
items.description: Smoke and grease beware! This professional-grade stainless steel range hood takes no prisoners. And it looks great in your kitchen. Environment: 2

items.name: Dramatic Heights Stove Hood
items.description: Elevate the beauty of your country kitchen with this extra-tall stove hood. Pretty detailing around the base adds an air of fancy. Powerful performances is destined to sweep you off your feet. Environment: 2

items.name: The Obelisk
items.description: This impressive stood hood is sure to keep your kitchen smoke and odor-free like a prominent smokestack – but far more stylish. Environment: 4 Unlocked at level 10 of the Culinary career (Chef branch)

items.name: The Wavescatter
items.description: Built with salvaged materials from discarded 80’s electronic children’s toys and assembled by haphazardly-trained gerbils, the Wavescatter is the perfect microwave for the budget-conscious bachelor who loves his meals burnt on the outside and frozen in the center. Food Quality: 3 Power Consumption Rating: 4 Reliability: 3

items.name: The Food Annihilator
items.description: Our microwave will blast your leftovers with radiation so thoroughly and with such intensity that no living thing should approach it for decades. Other microwaves just raise your food’s temperature slightly, but when you want food that’s been permanently sterilized, there’s only one name in the business: FOOD ANNIHILATOR. Food Quality: 4 Power Consumption Rating: 4 Reliability: 5

items.name: The Omniwaver
items.description: For the finest in microwave cooking, it has to be the Omniwaver. This incredible device bombards your food with a previously undiscovered form of radiation. We can’t promise that the omicron waves will cook your food faster, or hotter, than conventional microwaves, but man they really bring out the flavor somehow! Food Quality: 5 Power Consumption Rating: 4 Reliability: 8

items.name: The Schmapple Micro
items.description: What if a microwave could give you less of what you don’t want, and more of what you don’t realize you need? Things like a larger viewing area, and three life-changing colors? Well you can have it right now, introducing: The Schmapple Micro. It’s Microwaves, to the Power of You. Food Quality: 8 Power Consumption Rating: 9 Reliability: 8

items.name: Joe Jockey
items.description: Are you someone who really, really loves coffee? Well, you might want to consider buying the Joe Jockey anyway. It has a feature that squirts hot water over coffee grounds, producing a lightly browned liquid. Is it fancy? No. Does it get the job done? Let’s say “Sure.” Drink Quality: 3 Reliability: 3

items.name: The Caffeininator
items.description: Caffeine: a popular pick-me-up in the fields of technology and law enforcement, this wonderful substance can be brewed in your own kitchen thanks to the Caffeininator! Delivered via a hot brown liquid, it’s sure to give you the pep you crave! Get Caffininated! Drink Quality: 4 Reliability: 3

items.name: Café Immodéré
items.description: This is a premium brew-station for connoisseurs who understand that coffee is a LIFESTYLE, not some bitter swill that only serves as a dunking place for one’s donuts. Our machine brews fine coffee, for fine men and women. Fine pastries can be enjoyed with, but never IN, our coffee. Enjoy an immodéré life! Drink Quality: 5 Reliability: 5

items.name: Stainless Steel Auto-Pot
items.description: Sleek, smooth, and impeccably crafted, this heat-regulating coffeepot has enough processing power to put a high-end computer to shame! For cuisiniers and techies alike. Drink Quality: 6 Reliability: 5 Environment: 2 Unlocked at level 3 of the Culinary career. Unlocked at level 2 of the Tech Guru career. Unlocked at Gold level of the Dinner Party.

items.name: The Schmapple Coffee
items.description: Coffee makers come with a variety of different functions and abilities. It can be hard to choose the best one. Ours come in a variety of pretty colors. Looks like your choice just got a lot easier. Introducing: The Schmapple Coffee. It’s Coffee, to the Power of You. Drink Quality: 8 Reliability: 8

items.name: Tea Magic Personal Brewer
items.description: Brew all your favorite teas at the touch of a button. Includes handy features like a programmable timer, cup and pot settings, lemon twist, and a spoonful of sugar option. Drink Quality: 4 Reliability: 3

items.name: Whipped Dream Cupcake Factory
items.description: This miracle of confection perfection will heal the wounds of your lonely childhood and make you Whole again. Features settings for fruit filling or nuts. Fun: 2 Food Quality: 4 Power Consumption Rating: 1 Unbreakable +Cooking Skill

items.name: The Professional Dish Laborer
items.description: Washing your dishes by hand is a thing of the past! With The Professional Dish Laborer you don’t need to dread an after party dish cleanup or your everyday dish duties. It combines performance and innovation with an attractive design. It’s the closest we have seen to dishwasher perfection. Reliability: 5

items.name: Carbonette Charcoal Grill
items.description: A sturdy no-frills grill just like the ones you find in public parks, minus the extra ash and grease. Food Quality: 4 +Cooking Skill Functional Off-the-Grid

items.name: Master Del Grill - Traditional Grill
items.description: Whether you call it Barbacoa, BBQ, or Parrilla, this grill will take your culinary skills to new heights. Being the perfect size for any Lot, this grill will take you through playful summer days with friends playing Dominoes while having a few sparkling juices. It will take you through every weekend that doesn’t rain, with loud music, uncoordinated dancing, and sometimes a pool party or two. A great addition to any space, with its colourful and compact design, perfect for creating memories for g

items.name: GrillWise by GrillMania
items.description: Designed for the serious fire-kissed food aficionado, this grill is built to take whatever you fling onto its eager and willing rack. Food Quality: 5 +Cooking Skill Functional Off-the-Grid

items.name: The Incendiator by GrillMania
items.description: Enjoy GrillMania’s state-of-the-art propane technology. This top-of-the-line grill proves you mean business when it comes to charred meats and veggies. Food Quality: 8 +Cooking Skill Functional Off-the-Grid

items.name: Willow Creek Mailbox
items.description: Mail boxes are essential as they are the primary way to receive bills.

items.name: Oasis Springs Mailbox
items.description: Mail boxes are essential as they are the primary way to receive bills.

items.name: Ol’ Rusty Mailbox
items.description: This quaint little device is called a mailbox. But unlike the mailboxes you might be used to, this one is a literal box with incredibly finite space. Bills and junk mail slowly accumulate inside its small, metal frame, but no one really knows how or why. A fun curiosity for collectors!

items.name: Starlit Children’s Wastebasket
items.description: A child-sized wastebasket for child-sized waste.

items.name: Baby’s First Wastebasket
items.description: This wastebasket with a cheerful design helps your child practice developmentally appropriate trash disposal skills.

items.name: Garbelle Wastebasket
items.description: Understated but hardly shy, this wastebasket holds your bathroom trash without complaint or compromise.

items.name: Generiq Plastic Wastebasket
items.description: An affordable plastic wastebasket for bathroom, laundry room or anywhere you prioritize substance over style.

items.name: Boardwalk Trashcan
items.description: This retro trashcan is stylish in some parts of the world, and less stylish in others.

items.name: WasteNot Wastebasket
items.description: A rectangular wastebasket that’s not too small, not too big, just right.

items.name: NanoCan Touchless Trash Can
items.description: The next generation of trash disposal, this hands-free bin replete with smart tech and odor filters converts organic waste into fuel, rendering the entire unit self-sufficient. Functional Off-the-Grid

items.name: CanDent Slatted Outdoor Trash Receptacle
items.description: Constructed from recycled plastic slats, this outdoor trash can is weatherproof, eco-friendly and kinda cute, too.

items.name: CanOFlage Outdoor Trash Receptacle
items.description: The handsome design and magnificent stone detailing of this outdoor trash can are unparalleled in the field of waste receptacles.

items.name: Wheeled Trash Bin
items.description: Looking to store lots of garbage on a budget? This is the receptacle for you.

items.name: Adurable Plastic Trash Bin
items.description: This hardy plastic trash bin will hold your garbage without complaint.

items.name: Vintage Books
items.description: You’re not only well read, you pride yourself on owning first editions of all the great classics. Display these brilliant finds-and your brilliance along with them. Fun: 5

items.name: Kid’s Bookcase
items.description: Add fun and color to your kids’ rooms with this handmade bookcase from Kindermade. It offers convenient storage for your little ones’ growing library. Fun: 5

items.name: Intellectual Illusion Wall-Mounted Bookcases
items.description: Why take up more room than you need to? This truly minimalist shelf set includes only the most necessary pieces. You can imagine the rest, if you want to. Fun: 5

items.name: School Binders and Bookend
items.description: Get an A+ in organization with color-coded binders and an adorable bunny bookend. Fun: 5

items.name: Bright Eyes Bookcase
items.description: As bold and bright as your little bookworm, this cheerful bookcase is great for holding…well, books. And maybe some toys, too. Fun: 5

items.name: Edgier LadderCase
items.description: Inspired shelving, adding a chic look that can scale to any space to fit books, comic books, pots of plants, and knick knacks in style!

items.name: Toddler Bookcase
items.description: All books need their own house. Whether about superheroes or princesses, books need a little rest when they aren’t being read to toddlers. It’s tough being a book. Fun: 5

items.name: Young Minds Zen Bookcase
items.description: This imperfectly balanced, zen-inspired bookcase doesn’t have time for meditation. It’s young, and bright, and ready to be filled, like a vessel, with all life has in store. Fun: 5

items.name: The Enigma
items.description: A good bookcase, like a good book, should be a journey. Trace the unexpected lines of The Enigma by Reclamation Homeware, and you might be surprised where the journey takes you! And yes, it’s made entirely from old, discarded books (mostly teen supernatural/romance fiction). Fun: 5 Environment: 2

items.name: The Shugart Bookstation
items.description: Built with the future in mind, this high-tech shelf stores books both analog and digital! Fun: 5 Environment: 2

items.name: Hovercraft Miniframe
items.description: Last year, scientists unveiled their solution for climate change: the zero-emission hoverbus! This to-scale model won’t save the world, but it’ll hold your stuff! Fun: 5 Environment: 2

items.name: Mega Bookcase
items.description: If there’s only room for one piece of antique furniture in your home, it has to be a bookcase. There’s just something inherently old-fashioned about them! That’s why our team of precision robots is programmed to put extra care into each and every one of the hundreds of bookcases they assemble every day. Fun: 5 Environment: 2

items.name: RAW Bookshelf
items.description: This well-built shelving unit from PostRustic brings a bit of industrial flair to your book collection. Fun: 5 Environment: 3

items.name: Simple Symmetry Bookcase
items.description: As shapes go, the rectangle is rather under-celebrated, but in contemporary décor, it’s truly king. Versatile storage, uncluttered cabinetry, and tidy perfection: all achieved through rectangles and rectangles alone. Fun: 5 Environment: 4

items.name: Executron Bookshelf
items.description: As we all know, today’s executive doesn’t have time to read – that’s what subordinates are for! But it’s important that your office décor gives you the authority of one who does. Fun: 5 Environment: 7 Unlocked at level 8 of the Business career (Management branch)

items.name: Industrial Étagère
items.description: A practical place for knickknacks. Because even the modern minimalist has stuff that needs to be stored, and showed off, just a little. Fun: 5 Environment: 4

items.name: Deep Thoughts Bookcase
items.description: With four extra-deep shelves and room for more disheveled tomes on top, this solid-oak bookshelf is not for the intellectual lightweight. Fun: 5 Inspiring Décor: 8 Unlocked at level 10 of the Writer career (Journalist branch)

items.name: Caress Bookcase
items.description: The design of the Countryside Caress bookcase is so pleasing, you’ll wish you were a book just so you could slide inside and nestle into place among the tales of adventure and romance. Your books will be so happy here, they’ll get tingles up their spines! Fun: 5 Environment: 5

items.name: Towering Intellect Dual Book Case
items.description: Show off your impressive book collection on these two, slightly intimidating bookcases-an essential staple for anyone with half a brain, or more. Fun: 5 Environment: 5

items.name: The Muse
items.description: Inspiration comes in many shapes and sizes, and so we created the Muse. With four standard bookshelves atop one taller compartment, the Muse also features two mysterious drawers and two shuttered cabinets, in order to conceal one’s lesser muses. Fun: 5 Inspiring Décor: 8 Unlocked at level 9 of the Writer career (Author branch)

items.name: Princess Cordelia Bookcase
items.description: When Princess Cordelia fled to her submersible, she left most of her books behind. But she couldn’t bear to look uneducated, and so she had this bookcase constructed. Despite its delicate crablike legs, it’s actually built sturdily to withstand the occasional turbulence at sea. Fun: 5 Environment: 7

items.name: Thumbkin Child’s Dresser
items.description: Child-sized four-drawer dresser doubles as a bench, desk, or changing table. Sturdy enough to withstand repeated “monkey on the bed” games.

items.name: Kindermade Dresser for Children
items.description: Bring a piece of happiness to your child’s bedroom today with this whimsical low dresser. Kid tested, child approved.

items.name: Enigma Dresser
items.description: With the Enigma dresser, as with so many things, it’s what’s beneath the surface that counts. Hiding below its unassuming top is a treasure trove of hidden curves and secrets. Intricate designs and fine details dare you to explore its depths fully.

items.name: Thank You, Wardrobe
items.description: Designed by: peacemaker_ic Thanks to all the wardrobes out there who help Sims get dressed every day for the past 21 years...and thanks to those who choose their outfits with care. Thanks to those who dress in a rush and accidentally leave the house wearing bunny slippers. And special thanks to those cold, awkward blurry moments where there are no clothes, because in those times we appreciate wardrobes most of all.

items.name: Audrinite Dresser
items.description: Cutting-edge polymers protect your clothes from moths, eavesdropping by government intelligence, and ever going out of fashion.

items.name: Weathered Wonder Dresser
items.description: Nothing says romance like a few bumps, bruises and mysterious scars. And nothing shelters your clothes with such stoic elegance as the Weathered Wonder. Standing tall, with long graceful lines and four proud, battered drawers, this triumphant antique is the stuff of true fantasy.

items.name: Cozy Cubby
items.description: This cubby allows for a little flair by pairing boxes with icons for easy toddler use. Some cubbies even have their own splash of color to make this an instant win for any child.

items.name: Zes Horizontal Dresser
items.description: Your clothing will keep a low profile in this preternaturally understated six-drawer dresser.

items.name: Ysabel Horizontal Dresser
items.description: True Mission-style design isn’t just about hardwood grain, metal pulls, and geometric lines. It’s also about dovetails, cornices, mortise, and tenons. If you know what any of this means, then you want this dresser.

items.name: The Architrave
items.description: Subtly evoking Inquisition-era furnishings, Reclamation Homeware’s six-drawer dresser is girdled in cold steel, like a horizontal Iron Maiden or a mad scientist’s apothecary chest.

items.name: The Neo
items.description: Your dresser holds clothing which can be rearranged into an amazing array of styles and outfits. Like the human heart, the dresser is the container of all of the different permutations of YOU. It deserves the consideration and attention you’d put into choosing your own casket. Might we at Reclamation Homeware humbly suggest… The Neo?

items.name: Unmentionables Dresser
items.description: Princess Cordelia enjoyed structured clothing. Often sporting a bustle and a corset, undergarments were everything to her! She needed a lot of space to store her unmentionables so she designed this bottomless dresser that allowed her to change outfits at will. Amazing!

items.name: Hvit Armoire
items.description: Tall and handsome, this armoire knows better than to mar its Nordic beauty with even a smidgen of extraneous trim.

items.name: Willowdale High Boy Dresser
items.description: Is that your bedroom or a country inn? Only your dresser knows for sure. A heirloom-quality piece in rich finishes. Environment: 2

items.name: Trendsetter’s Dresser
items.description: This dresser is flawless. I heard that Diego Lobo has a dresser like this, and he filled it with clothes, so I got a dresser like this, and I filled it with clothes. Environment: 2

items.name: Wall o’ Gym Lockers, Small
items.description: You never used your locker in school, but now that you’re home, they’re suddenly trendy. Try one in the bathroom, play room, laundry room, or mud room.

items.name: Wall o’ Gym Lockers, Large
items.description: A bank of lockers for those who feel nostalgic about high school gym class. Stores everything short of freshman hazing victims.
