items.name: Featureless Fiberglass Door
items.description: Fiberglass doors are durable and resistant to water damage, making them a good choice for bathrooms, saunas and laundry facilities.

items.name: Seeing Glass
items.description: Understated elegance, smooth finishes. Entice your guests by casually revealing your domain, keeping them guessing of what lies beyond.

items.name: Edgar the Generous
items.description: Edgar, a lion of generous repute… Always shared his labors fruit… Never without… An ounce of doubt… Could any, of his generosity, refute.

items.name: Stoar the Bearded Trickster Door
items.description: A trickster troll by the name of Stoar… Was oft fond of a playful trick or four… Until one day… Ended his play… And his head ended upon this door.

items.name: Door 1 Wide
items.description: Door 1 Wide, handcrafted with love and care by Ways Entryways Manufacturing and Mass Production Studios and Ramen Shop. Creating entryways for your home, business, or walled space, also catering.

items.name: Simple Single-Panel Door
items.description: An unassuming wooden door suitable for use anywhere you need an unobtrusive portal.

items.name: Chalky Friends
items.description: These friendly companions are there to comfort children when they look at their doors in the dark. Hopefully there will be no nightmares here.

items.name: Simple Two-Panel Door
items.description: Your basic wooden door found at the entrance to bedrooms, offices and closets everywhere.

items.name: Wooden Four-Panel Door
items.description: Four panels lend visual interest to this otherwise basic door.

items.name: Wooden Five-Panel Door
items.description: Five panels is an unusual design choice for an interior door, but not so unusual as to be utterly distracting.

items.name: Wooden Three-Panel Door
items.description: The curved top panel and rectangular bottom panels of this wooden door evoke the Dutch doors of yesteryear.

items.name: Geometric Six-Panel Door
items.description: Six panels make a statement in this basic interior door.

items.name: Rainbow Effect
items.description: In almost every color of the rainbow, chose the door that is right for you. Warning: Product may not be actually available in your preferred rainbow color, but does offer a one rainbow of colors.

items.name: Wooden Prairie-Style Two-Panel Door
items.description: A single wooden door in Prairie style.

items.name: Queen’s Door
items.description: Only female Sims are allowed beyond this door. Any problem with that?

items.name: King’s Door
items.description: Only male Sims are allowed beyond this door.

items.name: Unbranded Entry Device
items.description: Sure, it might not have a fancy label, but our unbranded entry device is just as effective as all those name brand Doors. Built from many of the same materials, the unbranded entry device offers an opening and closing experience just as good as the major brands and at just as good a price!

items.name: Overdesigned Window
items.description: We’ll be honest. We set out to make a simple window, split into three equal panes. Then we just kept adding and adding features and now everyone thinks it’s a door. Our fault really – we can see now how the whole project is a little overdesigned. Use it however you’d like.

items.name: Marine Biologist’s Choice
items.description: When you come home from a day of measuring the seasonal rise of Vibrio bacteria in brackish waters, you need a door you can rely on. That’s why so many Marine biologists choose this door. You might be worried about ineffective efforts to save the Atlantic sturgeon, but you’ll never have to worry about coming home to an inferior door.

items.name: Perfect Pane Door
items.description: Hardwood window frames can cause your glass panes to scratch and crumble at the edges. They can even stress your windows to the point of shattering! The Perfect Pane door has firm yet pliable frames that keep glass pristine. That’s because they’re made entirely from the bones of Atlantic Sturgeon!

items.name: Kablammo Superdoor
items.description: POW!!! Kablammo Superdoor! You’ve NEVER seen a door like this one! Featuring Rite-Grip knob technology and triple-swing hinges for extra opening/closing power! You haven’t doored a day in your pathetic life until you’ve stepped through a KABLAMMO!!!

items.name: Yes Siree Door!
items.description: Yes siree, nothing says “fine living” like a high-quality door. No mis-shuts or swing opens with a door like this one! You got your brass knob, your strong hinges, a nice rectangle shape. Boy howdy, that is some fine door right there!

items.name: Exterior Door with Multipane Window
items.description: A wooden exterior door with a multipane glass inset that helps minimize any risk of breakage.

items.name: Two-Panel Wooden Door
items.description: An unpretentious two-panel wooden door.

items.name: Diamond Panel Entry Door with Window
items.description: A handsome exterior door featuring a glass window and diamond detailing on the lower panel.

items.name: Mega Door (Budget DeLite)
items.description: One of our top designers challenged us to make a door “without all the bells and whistles.” We found out later that he was crazy and meant it literally, but we still went ahead with our plans for the Budget DeLite model of our Mega Door. The minimally acceptable amount of door for not a lot of Simoleans!

items.name: Mega Door (Deluxe)
items.description: The phrase “exceptional quality in mission-style door-making” gets thrown around a lot these days. We at the MegaMission Outdoor Warehouse like to think that we’ve truly earned that praise with the deluxe model of our Mega Door.

items.name: Hidden Bookcase Door
items.description: What’s a spy without a secret entrance—or exit? This bookcase doubles as a door for when you might need to make a quick getaway. Confident Décor: 2 Unlocked at level 7 of the Secret Agent career

items.name: Plain Wooden Door
items.description: A solid wooden door with no frills.

items.name: Modern Wooden Door with Frosted Glass Insets
items.description: A front door that combines the warmth of wood and the impersonal coldness of frosted glass.

items.name: Stark Front Door
items.description: A featureless front door that avoids all signs of personality.

items.name: Two-Panel Arched Door with Frosted Glass
items.description: A classic front door design enhanced by curved panels, a central medallion and a frosted glass window.

items.name: Door of Perception
items.description: It has long been thought that books were the gateways to new worlds. It couldn’t be truer in this case. Use this bookcase door to disguise the entrance to your study for a bit of peace and quiet. Focusing Décor: 2 Unlocked at level 10 of the Writer career (Author branch)

items.name: Arched Door with Double Panes
items.description: A stylish entryway door with two arched windows.

items.name: Modern Wood Door Plus Short Sidelights and Transom
items.description: The modern geometric design of this wooden front door is echoed in its accompanying rectangular glass sidelights and transom.

items.name: Commercial Double Door with Push Bar
items.description: A durable commercial double door set. Push bars allow easy entrance for your customers.

items.name: Door 2 Wide
items.description: Door 2 Wide is twice the door Door 1 Wide is, no matter what Antonio says! Why settle for 1, when you can have 2.

items.name: Two-Panel Double Door
items.description: Wooden double door set with rectangular panels.

items.name: Double Door with Curved Panels
items.description: Wooden double door with curved door panels.

items.name: Simple Wooden Double Door
items.description: Interior wooden double door set suitable for walk-in closets and conference rooms.

items.name: Just A Simple Double Door
items.description: A pair of simple doors of the sort you’d see at the entrance of anyplace that would like a double door that doesn’t draw much attention, but still is stylish and chic.

items.name: Mega Double Doors (Basic)
items.description: When it comes to quality, this set of double doors is absolutely the most average. Our door-carving robots spend a decent amount of time using materials that are clearly good enough for the job. It’s not the fanciest set of doors we make, and it shows in the price! Save now, enjoy decent-quality doors forever!

items.name: Mega Double Doors (Deluxe)
items.description: When it comes to quality, this set of double doors is absolutely the best. Our door-carving robots take their time and use materials that are second-to-none. It’s the fanciest set of doors we make, and it shows in the price! Save now, enjoy top-quality doors forever!

items.name: Simple Double Door with Transom
items.description: Understated double door with transom to provide a modicum of gravitas.

items.name: Steel and Glass Double Door with Narrow Transom
items.description: Steel-framed glass commercial double door set topped with a narrow transom. Storefront-ready.

items.name: Framed Double Door
items.description: Wooden double door framed with eye-catching wooden trim. Minor Environment Gain: 1

items.name: Double Door with Sidelights and Faux Columns
items.description: Ornate wooden double door suitable for your fanciest entryway. Minor Environment Gain: 1

items.name: Keystone-Style Arch
items.description: The keystone detailing is not integral to the arch; it just looks nice.

items.name: Arch Door
items.description: Arch Door provides all the interior benefits of a door, without the pesky “get in my way” center parts often found with most doors.

items.name: Arch E
items.description: There were four prototypes… the first prototype didn’t open, the second prototype refined the concept, removing the defect by making a hole, the third prototype increased the size of the hole, the fourth prototype removed the sharp edges that were causing an increase in workplace accidents. The fifth, Arch E, should be great…

items.name: Narrow Post and Lintel Frame
items.description: A narrow entryway for when you don’t even require a door for a room divider.

items.name: Simple Post and Lintel Frame
items.description: The post and lintel design is a fundamental building block of architecture. This entryway frame is a fundamental building block, too.

items.name: Cha Cha Sliding Door
items.description: Slide to the left. Slide to the right. Pass through, Pass through!

items.name: Narrow Mission-Style Arch
items.description: Arches have a higher load-bearing capacity than a simple post-and-lintel structure, allowing for a wider range of use and facilitating taller construction.

items.name: Prairie Post and Lintel Knockoff
items.description: Visually evoke Prairie-style architecture without breaking the bank; save money on the lack of door, too.

items.name: Trabeated Entry Frame
items.description: A simple but effective example of a trabeated entryway, which depends upon a load-bearing lintel to provide structural integrity.

items.name: Wide Entry Frame
items.description: A simple post-and-lintel entryway, designed extra-wide to lend a sense of space to adjoining rooms.

items.name: Prairie-Style Entry Frame
items.description: Post-and-lintel entry frame with Prairie-style detailing.

items.name: Arch with Keystone
items.description: The keystone arch has been an architectural staple since Roman times.

items.name: Island Mahogany Sliding Door
items.description: East Shore Chateau sat abandoned for years. A brisk jaunt from the beach and surrounded by thick vegetation, its interior smelled of jungle musk, decaying mahogany, and sea air. Various species of vibrantly plumed birds and neon specked frogs called its dilapidated remains home. Few locals who remained on the island remembered the mystery surrounding its downfall—even fewer still spoke of it.

items.name: Exterior Door with Multipane Window and Fanlight
items.description: A wooden exterior door with a multipane glass inset plus a curved fanlight.

items.name: Diamond Panel Entry Door with Window and Fanlight
items.description: An exterior door with a square window and small fanlight above to provide an extra dose of natural light.

items.name: Two-Panel Arched Door with Frosted Glass Plus Fanlight
items.description: A classic front door design gets a dose of added character when topped by a curved fanlight.

items.name: Modern Wood Door Plus Tall Sidelights and Transom
items.description: This modern wooden door framed by extra-tall sidelights plus a square transom adds the illusion of height to your front entryway.

items.name: Mega Double Doors (Grand)
items.description: Our assembly line of door-carving robots actually designed the Grand model of our Mega Double Doors on their own. They said that the combination of double doors with a half-circle would create a “design balance” that would lead to a “unity of spirit.” We’re honestly not sure what they meant by that or even why they’re thinking of such things!

items.name: Steel and Glass Double Door with Tall Transom
items.description: Steel-framed double door set topped with a wide rectangular transom lends the illusion of extra height to your commercial storefront.

items.name: Double Door Framed by Faux Columns
items.description: Sturdy double doors framed by fanciful faux columns add dignity to any interior.

items.name: Double Door with Arch, Fanlight and Sidelights
items.description: Stately and impressive, this entryway features the full monty – a double door with two sidelight panels and a fanlight under a classic keystone arch. Minor Environment Gain: 1

items.name: Cha Cha Real Tall Sliding Door
items.description: How tall can it go? Can it go real tall? All the way up the wall?

items.name: Mission-style Arch
items.description: A curved entryway with Mission detailing. Makes a lovely garden gate.

items.name: Island Mahogany Grand Sliding Door
items.description: The closest form of civilization to East Shore Chateau was a small coastal fishing village. The community watched from afar as Mason Lupoe first purchased the estate and soon after began repairs. The sounds of saws and hammers echoed through the dense surrounding jungle, washed out by the nearby waves breaking against the beach. Then one day… nothing.

items.name: The Action-item
items.description: Who needs a house when you can have an office building? Our premier brand is guaranteed to make any cozy place feel just like that awful desk-job you’ve had forever!

items.name: Pointless Renovation
items.description: Missing walls make the perfect statement in a home. Feel the freedom of having no doors! Let the crossbreeze flow through you.

items.name: Short Classic Casement
items.description: A sensible solution that never goes out of style.

items.name: Light Box Window
items.description: Clean. Simple. Minimal. Perfect.

items.name: Extended Vertical Window
items.description: This large window still manages to maintain a slim frame while allowing plenty of open space for grand views. Perfect in any living room that wants to let the light in!

items.name: Voices Carry Single Pane
items.description: Voices carry, but not through this window! All sound is 100% guaranteed to be minimalized as it passes effortlessly through this window. Certified silent by the Deaf Poets Society of Window Dressers.

items.name: Window 1 Wide Version Angular
items.description: Everyone knows a window with too much window on top is just a waiting lawsuit. It’s above your line of sight, you have to bend your neck to look up. It’s painful. It hurts. It’s the quickest way to the grave. Window 1 Wide Version Angular saves lives. Saves your life, and the lives of your children. If not for you, for them?

items.name: Window 1 Wide Version Rectangular
items.description: When I think of a window, I think of a thing you can look through to see what’s on the other side. Everyone wants to know what’s on the other side. We show you the other side. Live beyond your view of reality, look to the other side.

items.name: Window 2 Wide Version Angular
items.description: We know the value you have in your life. We know why you loved Window 1 Wide Version Angular, but sometimes life is worth the risk! Throw caution to the wind, take it all in, live your life today! Life needs challenge… challenge yours!

items.name: Octopane
items.description: Because the world is so much easier to deal with when you compartmentalize.

items.name: Classic Casement
items.description: A sensible solution that never goes out of style.

items.name: The Woodcutter’s Window
items.description: Inspired by the quaint allure of a country woodcutter’s cottage, this window was constructed of reclaimed, hand-dented barn wood to add authentic character.

items.name: Double Hung Window
items.description: Ideal for a bathroom or other narrow space, this window slides open when you simply must have a breath of fresh air.

items.name: As Time Goes By
items.description: Watch the world grow, through the As Time Goes By window.

items.name: Farmyard Window
items.description: Ideal for estates with sweeping vistas, this quaint window set is comprised of rediscovered windows from real, abandoned farms, with all-new glass of course.

items.name: Shutters to Think
items.description: Delivers total privacy and just a smidgeon of natural light.

items.name: Almost Secure Safety Window
items.description: It may look like an ordinary window, but the faux-wood trim is reinforced with iron and a few concealed spikes, just to keep things interesting.

items.name: The Peacock
items.description: Place it where it’s sure to get noticed. Minor Environment Gain: 1

items.name: Barn Sash Window
items.description: This vintage window is as solidly crafted as it looks. Opens best in cool weather.

items.name: Surburban Outlook
items.description: Simple decorative wooden shutters add a touch of charm and nothing else.

items.name: Energy King
items.description: Double framed, double paned, double sealed and laminated for good measure, this eco hero won’t let an ion of heat pass through.

items.name: The Craftsman
items.description: Simple yet decorative, these hand-carved wooden windows add beauty to any Craftsman home.

items.name: Tall Order
items.description: This tall, formal window adds a dash of style and light to your living or dining room, without pretending to be grander than it is.

items.name: Square on Square
items.description: Get more symmetry for your Simoleans with this ultra-chic modern window set.

items.name: TriPane Three-Panel Window
items.description: This three-panel window gives any room a wide, bright bank of light. Perfect for indoor living that feels like it’s outdoor.

items.name: Modern Awning
items.description: The ultimate in functional fenestras, this slim rectangle lets in only the light and air you can’t do without.

items.name: Narrow Outlook
items.description: Gaze at the world outside your window, without letting it gaze in.

items.name: Kitty Corner Casement
items.description: Perhaps the cat ears are intentional, perhaps not, but we find them quite bewitching.

items.name: Pessimist’s Porthole
items.description: This modern submersible window features reinforced glass and vacuum-sealed industrial-steel braces, just in case of, well, anything.

items.name: Mega Window (Budget DeLite)
items.description: For the budget-conscious consumer with a taste for antiques, we offer the Budget DeLite version of our popular Mega Window. Carved from discarded holiday trees that we buy in bulk, each window features 6 panes of Glaz, our semi-transparent glass substitute.

items.name: Mega Window (Cloverleaf)
items.description: This window is the result of a design challenge. We asked our assembly line robots to produce something that would let in as little light as possible but still be considered a “window” by human standards. Despite the rather subjective requirements of the test they did quite well!

items.name: Mega Window (Budget DeLuxe)
items.description: If you like your windows to be a piece of glass in a wooden frame, oh boy, have we got the window for you! This is the window that gets manufactured when we press the “Test” button after rebooting our assembly line robots.

items.name: Mega Window
items.description: 99.9% of our antique windows are mass produced on our assembly line; however, as a special promotion, we had an actual human artisan come in and hand carve 100 Mega Windows. We won’t tell you which ones are his, but if you buy enough to cover your house there’s a good chance you get at least one, right?

items.name: Mega Window (Deluxe)
items.description: People always ask us how we are able to make such a narrow window at such high quality. The answer is simple! When we program our assembly line robots to make windows, we set both “narrow” and “high quality” to true!

items.name: Mega Window (Double Budget DeLite)
items.description: What’s that you say? Six panes of Glaz aren’t enough? You want even more of our proprietary glass substitute in your antique window? Well say no more. We had our assembly line robots stick two Mega Windows together using the finest wood glue on the market. Now you can show all the neighbors that you’re a twelve-paner!

items.name: Mega Window (Double Deluxe)
items.description: At MegaMission Outdoor Warehouse, every one of our antique windows and doors is made by hand by assembly line robots. Now, thanks to a slight error in a recursive function in their deluxe window-crafting program, we have produced thousands of high quality double windows. Some of the greatest inventions were born from simple errors!

items.name: Angle on the World
items.description: Bold shapes add a touch of style while framing your outlook on life.

items.name: Let There Be Light
items.description: Seriously, what else do you need beside a hole and some glass?

items.name: Tête-à-Tête
items.description: A classic modern solution for households with short and tall inhabitants.

items.name: Double Vision
items.description: A striking addition to any home, these wood-frame windows feature subtle embellishments that are truly timeless.

items.name: Mega Window (Shutter)
items.description: We wanted a window that would practically scream “handmade antique.” That’s why we programmed our battery of assembly line robots to add a quaint wooden shutter to our popular Mega Window. You won’t believe the hands that made it were 40% tungsten!

items.name: Mega Window (Reverse Shutter)
items.description: Thanks to an error that flipped the blueprint image we scanned into the database of our assembly line robots, we have manufactured thousands of windows with the shutter attached to the wrong side. Use with our original shuttered Mega Window to create a nice symmetrical look.

items.name: Old Meets View
items.description: Add an air of old world charm with an eye-catching, mission-style arched window.

items.name: Bunker Bather
items.description: Ideal for basements or rooms where privacy is essential, this high-set window bathes your darkest secrets with beautiful natural light.

items.name: The Clapper
items.description: Easy to clap shut when solicitors and tree huggers come by.

items.name: Mega Window (Double Grand)
items.description: We asked the AI for our assembly line robots how it could construct a window that was twice as good as the Grand Mega Window, and it produced this in reply. We’re still not sure if it was being sarcastic or not.

items.name: Mega Window (Grand)
items.description: It turns out that robots are incredibly good at breaking glass. When we realized our assembly line robots smashed 30% of the windows they constructed, we found a simple solution: program them to feel deep shame whenever they break a window. Now we get beauties like this Grand Mega Window without so much as a chip in the glass!

items.name: Quadruple Awning
items.description: Get the ultimate in ventilation without risking a fall!

items.name: Mega Window (Double Budget Grand Deluxe DeLite)
items.description: We produced this window by combining the plans for all of our other Mega Windows. It’s pretty good quality, a great size, decently attractive… It’s not necessarily everything you want but it’s certainly none of the things that you don’t want! Buy dozens!

items.name: Let There Be More Light
items.description: Want more light? Cut a bigger hole and insert a bigger piece of glass.

items.name: The Looker
items.description: Undeniably chic in an urban sort of way.

items.name: Fenestral Maneuvers in the Dark
items.description: Love natural light and unnatural darkness? Have it all with the shadowy yet striking silhouette of the FMD. Minor Environment Gain: 1

items.name: Porthole Peeper
items.description: Sail away to happy seas with this fanciful wooden maritime window.

items.name: Bay-utiful Designs
items.description: Open up your space and bask in the view with this classic bay window.

items.name: Basic Bay Window
items.description: Maximize your view and add a feeling of space even to the most modest home. Minor Environment Gain: 2

items.name: Outside In Window Wall
items.description: Bring the outside inside with these gorgeous, floor-to-ceiling window panels. But if you have a lot of them, be careful not to throw stones.

items.name: Vintage Vista
items.description: Hand crafted by a local artisan family, this stately old window brightens any home.

items.name: Angel Wing
items.description: Graceful arched window and matching shutters appear so airy, you almost expect them to take flight.

items.name: The High Brow
items.description: A charming suburban window with a heavily emphasized “brow”-popular with Italian families.

items.name: Arch You Happy to See Me?
items.description: This dramatic architectural feature is both arresting and appreciated.

items.name: Outside In Double-Window Wall
items.description: Bring the outside inside with these gorgeous, floor-to-ceiling double-width windows. But if you have a lot of them, be careful not to throw stones.

items.name: Mega Window (Grand Deluxe)
items.description: Robots have difficulty with the concept of human excess, but we were able to work around that by swapping their definitions for “efficient” and “inefficient.” Now our window-crafting bots have been able to manufacture our grandest window yet, the Mega Window Grand Deluxe!

items.name: The Lofty Looker
items.description: The epitome of urban chic, this extra-tall window is ideal for lofts, warehouses and other repurposed spaces.

items.name: Glacemaster 1700C - EpicWide
items.description: No proper fenestrator could go without the Glacemaster 1700C—supreme among household windows. The EpicWide version. You’ve been warned.

items.name: Glacemaster 1700C
items.description: No proper fenestrator could go without the Glacemaster 1700C—supreme among household windows.

items.name: Glacemaster 1700C - Combo
items.description: No proper fenestrator could go without the Glacemaster 1700C—supreme among household windows. The Combo version.

items.name: Elm Tree
items.description: Elms are among the most widely planted ornamental trees in the world. They make excellent shade trees. Minor Environment Gain: 1 Eco Footprint Green: 1

items.name: Majestic Palm
items.description: Palm trees are low-maintenance ornamental trees that offer dramatic foliage and lend a tropical ambiance to any landscape. Minor Environment Gain: 1 Eco Footprint Green: 1

items.name: Desert Fan Palm
items.description: The fan palm can grow to nearly 100 feet high and tolerates poor soil and drought. Choose full sun. Minor Environment Gain: 1 Eco Footprint Green: 1

items.name: Upright Cypress Tree
items.description: Plant a row of fast-growing cypress trees for an instant, evergreen privacy screen. Minor Environment Gain: 1 Eco Footprint Green: 2

items.name: Graveyard Cypress Tree
items.description: Cypresses are traditionally planted in graveyards and are thus a symbol of mourning – perfect for your uber-Gothic garden. Minor Environment Gain: 1 Eco Footprint Green: 2

items.name: Ornamental Magnolia Tree
items.description: Magnolias have a wide, shallow root system and do not tolerate being crowded; make this tree a centerpiece of your landscaping instead. Minor Environment Gain: 1 Eco Footprint Green: 2

items.name: Ornamental Bamboo Tree
items.description: Botanically speaking, bamboo is classified as a grass rather than as a true tree. Bamboo grows quickly and can be a pest when not properly maintained. Minor Environment Gain: 1 Eco Footprint Green: 2

items.name: Royal Palm
items.description: Dramatic of profile and with over 2,500 species worldwide, the palm is a symbol of victory and abundance. Minor Environment Gain: 1 Eco Footprint Green: 1

items.name: Hawthorne Tree

items.name: American Beech Tree

items.name: Pine Tree
items.description: Pine trees are the ultimate coniferous evergreen, known for their decorative cones and resinous sap. They smell nice, too. Minor Environment Gain: 1 Eco Footprint Green: 2

items.name: Southern Magnolia Tree
items.description: Magnolias are prized for their showy, fragrant flowers. They are among the first trees to bloom in spring. Minor Environment Gain: 1 Eco Footprint Green: 2

items.name: Mesquite Tree

items.name: Quaking Aspen Tree

items.name: European Beech Tree

items.name: Evergreen
items.description: For a pine-scented evergreen, this is your go-to choice. Minor Environment Gain: 1 Eco Footprint Green: 2

items.name: Slender Cypress Tree
items.description: Prune this fast-growing ornamental tree early and often for best landscaping results. Minor Environment Gain: 1 Eco Footprint Green: 2

items.name: Birch Tree

items.name: Washington Palm

items.name: Ponderosa Pine Tree

items.name: Oak Tree

items.name: Upright Cherry Tree

items.name: Green, Green Grass

items.name: Silent Sentinel Rock

items.name: Decorative Corbel

items.name: Scrollwork Corbel
items.description: Weight-bearing architecture at its most stylish.

items.name: Wall Vent of No Particular Distinction
items.description: Ducts and vents never get any respect. They deliver both hot and cool air as needed with nary a thank-you. You owe your duct this stylish yet practical metal vent.

items.name: Mission-Style Slatted Wooden Balcony
items.description: Mission-style balcony constructed from handsome wooden slats.

items.name: Curved Iron Balcony
items.description: Curved Mission-style balcony with wrought iron rail. Romeo and Juliet-ready.

items.name: A Simple Fence
items.description: Do not be fooled by its unassuming look. This fence means business, it is a pretty good fence. It does the job.

items.name: Ladder-Style Horizontal Fencing

items.name: Smooth Keeper
items.description: With smooth lines and elegant curves, this fence will make you Lot look like a text book example of minimalistic elegant style. Place it to make your Lot exude effortless elegance.

items.name: Fence
items.description: Fence, it’s like a wall, but harder to spell for kids.

items.name: Wooden Horizontal Fencing
items.description: Ladder=like fencing with a rustic, unfinished look.

items.name: Contrast Wooden Fencing
items.description: Tall posts with geometric caps alternate with timeless wooden pickets for a fencing solution both handsome and sturdy.

items.name: Simple Picket Fence
items.description: No embellishments are needed for this simple picket fence laden with symbolic virtue.

items.name: The ATOMIC Fence!!
items.description: Market research showed the word Atomic tested well. So… The ATOMIC Fence!! Um, it’s a fence.

items.name: Narrow Slatted Fence
items.description: This fence with narrow pickets has a delicate, unimposing air.

items.name: Archetypal Picket Fence
items.description: Nothing fancy, just a picket fence.

items.name: Mega Fence (Budget DeLite)
items.description: At first glance, it might strike you how much the Budget DeLite model of our Mega Fence resembles a plain slab of concrete.

items.name: Low Stone Wall
items.description: Cut stone is arranged to form a low wall of mostly symbolic value.

items.name: Privacy Wall
items.description: Carved stone and concrete lend an air of implacability to this privacy wall.

items.name: Mega Fence (Basic)
items.description: In honor of the simple beauty of mission style, we wanted to offer as many straight lines on our basic fence as possible. We stopped at 76, though. More than that would just be decadent.

items.name: High Hedgerow
items.description: Edge your property line and defend your privacy with a dense row of shrubbery. Eco Footprint Green: 2

items.name: Wrought Iron Fence

items.name: Flimsy Picket Fence
items.description: A picket fence more decorative than functional.

items.name: Fancy Picket Fence
items.description: Wooden slats are framed by tall, ball-topped posts for an elegant take on the classic picket fence.

items.name: Composite Fencing
items.description: Carved wood posts alternate with wooden slats reinforced by metal bars.

items.name: Short Picket Fence
items.description: A picket fence with wide columns and wide slats.

items.name: Balustrade Fencing
items.description: Turned wood fenceposts support slender composite slats, resulting in a handsome and versatile fencing option.

items.name: Green Privacy Hedge

items.name: Monolithic Wall
items.description: Large slabs of stone define a very Modernist wall.

items.name: Paneled Fence with Round Posts
items.description: The stark blankness of the large fencing panels is softened by the rounded curves of hardwood fence posts.

items.name: The Velvet Rope
items.description: There is no better visual tool to separate the haves from the have-nots than this plush velvet rope. A must for all nightclubs, movie premieres and banks.

items.name: Lines and Curves Balustrade
items.description: Turned wood balusters plus square posts equals a pleasing contrast for the eye to behold.

items.name: Curved Iron Fence

items.name: Mega Fence (Deluxe)
items.description: Due to a catastrophe error in the logic of our fence-crafting robot AI, our assembly line of robots suddenly forgot how to make straight lines and produced these intricate fences. While not strictly mission-style, they are pretty nice looking. We decided to call this our “Deluxe” model.

items.name: Prairie-Style Fencing
items.description: Geometric designs in metal add eye appeal to this sturdy fencing rendered in the Prairie style.

items.name: Fancy Fencing
items.description: Classy yet no-nonsense, expensive but practical, a muscular fence such as this makes a clear visual statement when surrounding your estate. Minor Environment Gain: 1

items.name: High Floral Hedgerow
items.description: Edge your property line and defend your privacy with a flower row of shrubbery. Eco Footprint Green: 2

items.name: Mission-Style Wooden Slat Fence

items.name: Rustic Stone Wall
items.description: Rough-hewn slabs of sandstone provide little ambiance but plenty of privacy.

items.name: Woven Lattice Fence
items.description: A privacy screen with extra visual interest thanks to interwoven lattice panels that provide a peek beyond the fence line.

items.name: Stonework Wall
items.description: One’s home is one’s castle, and a castle needs fortifications. This hulking stone privacy fence is up to the job. Good for cemeteries and Gothic mansions, too.

items.name: Tall Paneled Fence

items.name: Spanish Revival Wall

items.name: Garden Gate
items.description: An invitingly rustic gate for your cottage, farmhouse or garden.

items.name: Cottage Gate
items.description: A simple, graceful entry for your home sweet home.

items.name: Modern Wonder
items.description: Just imposing enough to make the neighbors wonder.

items.name: Sanctum Gate
items.description: Exquisite geometric design reminds visitors that they are entering your circle of trust.

items.name: Mega Gate (Budget DeLite)
items.description: At MegaMission Outdoor Warehouse, we know that the worst part of the fence is that there’s no way through it! It’s a perfectly impenetrable border! That’s why we developed the greatest breakthrough ever in fence technology: the Gate! Now you can go inside OR outside the fence, again and again!

items.name: Elven Gate
items.description: Full of rustic charm, this simple gate adds a woodsy touch to your garden.

items.name: The Squealer
items.description: Grease the hinges for privacy, or leave them squealing to tattle on sneaking teens (or grownups who think like them).

items.name: Mega Gate (Basic)
items.description: Can’t you just picture the old artisan hunched over his workbench, his strong but knobby hands reaching out for just the right tool to coax his artistic version forward from the oak? We can’t because these gates were made on an assembly line by robots, but they look EXACTLY like the handmade antique kind.

items.name: Mega Gate (Deluxe)
items.description: You’ll pay a little more for the deluxe model of our Mega Gate, but the second you open one you’ll see why: Hinge-Rite technology. Every swing of the gate is the promise of smooth, soundless action from the finest hinges outside of the space program. You will weep when you see these hinges.

items.name: Palatial Gate
items.description: Featuring regal marble columns and a royally heavy door.

items.name: The Lefty
items.description: Created for households where lefties have the upper hand, this modern gate leaves righties reaching.

items.name: Narrow Vista Gate
items.description: Offers a glimpse of your contemporary home while ensuring no one can enter.

items.name: Maiden’s Gate
items.description: Perfect for discreet encounters, it comes with a lantern to signal late-night visitors.

items.name: Empire Gate
items.description: Expertly designed to belittle your guests while deflecting prying eyes.

items.name: Simply Secure
items.description: Kind of like a penitentiary gate, but classier.

items.name: Nature’s Welcome
items.description: So woodsy and wild, your friends will want to slip off their shoes and skip barefoot through its branches.

items.name: Mega Gate (Double Deluxe)
items.description: A gate only NEEDS one door, but you know who stops at one door? Peasants. That’s the number of doors peasants use. You can do better, and that’s why it’s worth investing in the double deluxe model of the Mega Gate. It’s like having a gate, only yours is better!

items.name: Grand Estate Gate
items.description: Impress your guests even before you turn them away.

items.name: Simple Shudder
items.description: Stern enough to give guests pause without being completely rude.

items.name: Modern Vista Gate
items.description: Offers a glimpse of your contemporary home without welcoming everyone and their mother.

items.name: Don’t Even Pry
items.description: The perfect defense against peeping toms, solicitors and strays.

items.name: To the Point
items.description: These dignified modern security gates send a clear and pointed message.

items.name: Woodn’t You Like to Know
items.description: Hefty yet dignified wooden gate offers the utmost security and privacy.

items.name: Spanish Inquisition
items.description: Tiled columns and fanciful wrought iron keep intruders beautifully at bay.

items.name: Capistrano Round Column

items.name: Annesley Square Column

items.name: Mega Column (Basic)

items.name: Soledad Square Column
items.description: A solid square column enhanced by sharp corners and severe lines.

items.name: Mega Column (Budget DeLite)
items.description: We were admiring the use of straight lines in mission-style design, and someone said “Hey, you know what’s really straight? Columns!” So we designed a series of columns. Here’s the Budget DeLite version for beginning column collectors.

items.name: Mega Column (Deluxe)
items.description: Are you prepared to start collecting columns with the big boys? Ready to take that next step? You will NEVER find another column that is both as straight and as round as this one. We know because we asked robots to design it. The Deluxe Mega Column: because you are seriously not messing around anymore.

items.name: Buenaventura Column
items.description: Square geometric patterns help to add interest to an otherwise rather plain architectural column. Max Height Restricted Minor Environment Gain: 1

items.name: Greco-Roman Column
items.description: A round column with a square cap reminiscent of ancient architecture but without the frills. Minor Environment Gain: 1

items.name: Tintoretto Column
items.description: Square column, round cap, Italian inspiration. Minor Environment Gain: 1

items.name: FitzHerbert Column
items.description: An architectural column reminiscent of antique staircase spindles. Max Height Restricted Minor Environment Gain: 1

items.name: Design Calabria Hexagonal Column
items.description: A hexagonal fluted column with a wide cap. Minor Environment Gain: 1

items.name: Grosvenor Column
items.description: There’s no such thing as excess when it comes to outfitting your architectural column. Max Height Restricted Minor Environment Gain: 1

items.description: Wooden spandrel with an unfinished look to match your rustic interior.

items.name: Geometric Spandrel
items.description: Decorative spandrel with an angular geometric pattern for maximum eye appeal.

items.description: Clean lines placed at varying distances intrigue the eye without overtiring it.

items.name: Frieze to Be Me

items.name: Would You Like Frieze with That?

items.name: High-tide Exterior Trim
items.description: The perfect undercurve—great for surfing!

items.name: Jutting Exterior Trim
items.description: Like a drainstorm without the drain! For the brutalists out there.

items.name: Simple Exterior Trim
items.description: A straightforward exterior trim.

items.name: Inlaid Exterior Trim
items.description: Smooth and clean. For those that love the details!

items.name: Stepped Exterior Trim
items.description: This molding adds a bit of interest at each story of your home.

items.name: Dentil Exterior Trim
items.description: A classic molding.

items.name: Sturdy Stairs
items.description: These stairs are solid and uncompromising.

items.name: Unremarkable Staircase
items.description: Function first, aesthetics later.

items.name: Sturdy Stairs in Brick
items.description: These stairs are solid and uncompromising.

items.name: Stairs
items.description: Stairs wouldn’t be complete without stairs. One floor, two floors, partial floors, all made possible with Stairs’ stairs. And each stair of Stairs is handcrafted to give Stairs that unique up and down stairs experience, only found with Stairs’ stairs. Whether your desire is upstairs, or downstairs, Stairs’ stairs will accommodate your stair needs.

items.name: Ladder-Like Stairway
items.description: The open riser stair design is modern and airy without being trendy.

items.name: Some Wooden Stairs
items.description: Wood makes for a solid if unremarkable set of stairs.

items.name: Treadworthy Stairway
items.description: Not too shallow, not too steep, this set of stairs is just right for any home.

items.name: Workaday Stairway
items.description: A wooden staircase without pretensions.

items.name: Mega Stairs (Basic)
items.description: Look, while these charming stairs are the perfect complement to a mission-style home, you don’t literally have to live in a mission to purchase them. It just seemed like it was worth reminding people, because not a lot of people are buying these stairs.

items.name: Townhouse Stairway
items.description: Don’t take your staircase for granted. Respect its quiet dignity and quality of construction.

items.name: Modern Floating Stairway
items.description: Chic and contemporary in design, this set of stairs seems to float in midair.

items.name: Pragmatic Stairway
items.description: A staircase is an architectural element that allows people to move from one level of a building to another smoothly and without impediment.

items.name: Mega Stairs (Ooh Fancy)
items.description: Stairs are nice and all, but don’t you want stairs that will make people say “Ooh, fancy!” Well that is the exact exclamation people will make when they see the Ooh Fancy model of our Mega Stairs. And just wait until you tell them that each tile was meticulously painted by robots!

items.name: Classic Wooden Ladder
items.description: You can climb it up. You can climb it down. Then back to the top and slide waaaaaay down!

items.name: Galvanized Horizontal Railing
items.description: Long horizontal lines lengthen the look of your stairwell.

items.name: Horizontal Aluminium Railing System
items.description: Horizontal stair rails are an unusual design choice best suited for child-free households.

items.name: Mahogany Geometric Banister
items.description: Add a touch of Modernist whimsy to your stairwell décor with this ornamental banister.

items.name: Slatted Railing with Square Newels
items.description: A stair rail that resembles a picket fence.

items.name: Slatted Railing with Chunky Newels
items.description: Another stair rail that resembles a picket fence.

items.name: Stair Railing
items.description: This Stair Railing is the perfect match to place with Stairs. Every variation of Stairs was considered during the design phase of Stair Railing, and as such, each detail of Stair Railing is already a ready match for Stairs. We invite you to experience Stair Railing for yourself! Stair Railing… for Stairs!

items.name: Square Post Stair Railing
items.description: Not too utilitarian yet not overly ornate, this banister does exactly what it’s intended to – help people travel up and down the stairs.

items.name: Shoe Rail with Square Newels
items.description: Shoe rail designs place a small space between the stairs and their balusters, just big enough for the toe of someone’s shoe to poke through. No, we don’t know why.

items.name: Fluted Banister
items.description: Tapered balusters lighten the silhouette of this stylish banister.

items.name: House of Splinters Stair Railing
items.description: A basic banister to keep guests and residents from falling off the stairs.

items.name: Kendall Composite Banister
items.description: A banister both stylish and sturdy thanks to its composite balusters of both wood and metal.

items.name: Abitha Colonial Knuckled Banister
items.description: Understated colonial design brings an air of authority to your stairwell.

items.name: Banister with Teardrop Balusters
items.description: Ornate balusters add authority to a practical piece of interior architecture.

items.name: Elegant Shoe Rail with Rounded Newels
items.description: Shoe rails are less sturdy than other railing options but add an understated, airy elegance to your stairwell interiors.

items.name: Mega Railing
items.description: We took a long, honest look at our Budget DeLite railing and realized we could do better. With very little effort. Now, we are pleased to offer the Basic model of our Mega Railing – for when you’re climbing stairs, but you’re not sure what to do with your hands.

items.name: Sleek Closed Rail
items.description: A closed stair railing system that provides maximum safety without sacrificing style.

items.name: Mission-Style Turned Wood Banister
items.description: Balusters of turned wood with decorative knuckles are a timeless classic.

items.name: Handsome Knuckled Banister
items.description: Hefty balusters adorned with a large turned wood “knuckle” in the middle present an imposing barrier to careless stair walkers.

items.name: Weathered Wood Shingles
items.description: Why live in fear of the elements? Embrace the allure of time-weathered wood and live at one with nature.

items.name: Scalloped Pine Roof

items.name: “Woodn’t” You Wonder Composite Roof

items.name: Happy Haunts Shingle Roof

items.description: This glass roof is paneled with square frames, making it near-optional for sky-viewing while still preventing those scary moments where one might think the roof was absent altogether. Minor Environment Gain: 1 Eco Footprint Green: 1

items.description: The most classic of glass roofs. Minor Environment Gain: 1 Eco Footprint Green: 1

items.description: Few roofs scream, “Science!” quite like this one does… Minor Environment Gain: 1 Eco Footprint Green: 1

items.description: Upsides: Easy Weather Viewing, Chic Style, Fair Thermal Insulation, the Hilarity of Watching Father Winter Navigate it’s Surface Downsides: Cleaning Smeared Glass, Hearing the “Thunk” of Birds Hitting Said Clean Glass Minor Environment Gain: 1 Eco Footprint Green: 1

items.description: Most glass roofs are fairly fancy due to simply being a glass roof. Well, this one is fancier! One might say, “Ornate” even… Minor Environment Gain: 1 Eco Footprint Green: 1

items.description: A practical and durable concrete chimney with a triangular metal cap.

items.description: Lil’ Jony was a household name in the chimney business by this time, and it was well known that in order to keep her, and her greased pig, far from danger, a chimney cap was a required piece for the protection of all.

items.name: Wide Brick Chimney with Cap
items.description: A wide brick chimney plus metal cap to keep birds and bats at bay.

items.name: Rectangular Chimney with Cap
items.description: A wide concrete chimney topped with a metal cap.

items.name: Mega Chimney
items.description: At MegaMission Outdoor Warehouse, we know that the quality of your chimney says a lot about your home. Our chimneys are manufactured from Doe-bee, our proprietary adobe substitute, and topped with one of our synthetic minerals. Ayurn or Coppur, or our synthetic alloy, Brahnz.

items.name: Wide Concrete Double Chimney
items.description: Durable double chimney made of reinforced concrete. Boxy and no-nonsense.

items.name: Large-Bricked Chimney
items.description: The large bricks and curved silhouette of this chimney provide a modern twist on an old classic.

items.name: Mega Chimney (Deluxe)
items.description: A chimney is that extra little bit of construction that completes a look and adds a touch of class to any house. It’s like a necktie for your roof! And our deluxe, mission-tile crested Mega Chimney is like the designer brand silk necktie of chimneys. Hang/place one on your neck/roof today!

items.name: Tall Brick Chimney with Cap
items.description: Combines modern chimney safety and classic styling in a tall cool package.

items.name: Classic Tall Brick Chimney

And you’d like to be the juggler with the chainsaws, but you like arms; and the hoop jumping dogs growl at you; so you end being a stilt walker only to fall every third step? Yep, Stilt Foundation is like that, but for your foundation.

items.description: Spinning the hits of the 2000’s all day everyday… “Blast Techno Beats.”

items.description: Specially formulated with plant super food, this amazing soil gives flowers, fruits, and vegetables the power they need to conquer the world, one shoot at a time.

items.name: Smarter Starter Soil
items.description: Give your sweet little seeds the smartest start with this expertly crafted, nutrient-rich soil.

items.name: Sun-Kissed Sands
items.description: Your skin needs UV protection. This sand simply glows.

items.name: Just Desert
items.description: The perfect wasteland.

items.name: Garden Bedlam
items.description: Let your garden grow wild with Garden Bedlam, the only soil with ingredients so surprising, you never know what will pop up next!

items.name: Ultimate Green Thumb Challenger
items.description: For gardeners who love a challenge, this ultra-rough, ultra-dry soil is your perfect proving ground.

items.name: Just Beachy
items.description: So soft and warm, you’ll want to wiggle around in it barefoot, every time you pass by.

items.name: Sand Castle Dream
items.description: Textured by wind and dampened by waves-the stuff castles are made of!

items.name: Putter’s Pit
items.description: Life is full of sand pits. Add one of your very own.

items.name: Scorched Earth
items.description: It’s hot in the desert. This sand has the tan to prove it.

items.name: Salted Earth
items.description: Some soft parts some rough parts, but overall just right. You might not want to fall on this tho.

items.name: Muddy Mud
items.description: Slippy, sloppy, and damp this mud is sure to get everywhere!
